Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * ω-cocontinuous functors

This file contains theory about (omega-) cocontinuous functors, i.e. functors
which preserve (sequential-) colimits ([is_omega_cocont] and [is_cocont]).

This file contains proofs that the following functors are (omega-)cocontinuous:

- Identity functor
  [is_cocont_functor_identity] [is_omega_cocont_functor_identity]
- Constant functor: F_x : C -> D, c |-> x
  [is_omega_cocont_constant_functor]
- Composition of omega-cocontinuous functors
  [is_cocont_functor_composite] [is_omega_cocont_functor_composite]
- Iteration of omega-cocontinuous functors: F^n : C -> C
  [is_cocont_iter_functor] [is_omega_cocont_iter_functor]
- Pairing of (omega-)cocont functors (F,G) : A * B -> C * D, (x,y) |-> (F x,G y)
  [is_cocont_pair_functor] [is_omega_cocont_pair_functor]
- Indexed families of (omega-)cocont functors F^I : A^I -> B^I
  [is_cocont_family_functor] [is_omega_cocont_family_functor]
- Binary delta functor: C -> C^2, x |-> (x,x)
  [is_cocont_bindelta_functor] [is_omega_cocont_bindelta_functor]
- General delta functor: C -> C^I
  [is_cocont_delta_functor] [is_omega_cocont_delta_functor]
- Binary coproduct functor: C^2 -> C, (x,y) |-> x + y
  [is_cocont_bincoproduct_functor] [is_omega_cocont_bincoproduct_functor]
- General coproduct functor: C^I -> C
  [is_cocont_coproduct_functor] [is_omega_cocont_coproduct_functor]
- Binary coproduct of functors: F + G : C -> D, x |-> F x + G x
  [is_cocont_BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt] [is_omega_cocont_BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt]
  [is_cocont_BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt2] [is_omega_cocont_BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt2]
  [is_cocont_BinCoproduct_of_functors] [is_omega_cocont_BinCoproduct_of_functors]
- Coproduct of families of functors: + F_i : C -> D  (generalization of coproduct of functors)
  [is_cocont_coproduct_of_functors_alt] [is_cocont_coproduct_of_functors]
  [is_omega_cocont_coproduct_of_functors_alt] [is_omega_cocont_coproduct_of_functors]
- Constant product functors: C -> C, x |-> a * x  and  x |-> x * a
  [is_cocont_constprod_functor1] [is_cocont_constprod_functor2]
  [is_omega_cocont_constprod_functor1] [is_omega_cocont_constprod_functor2]
- Binary product functor: C^2 -> C, (x,y) |-> x * y
  [is_omega_cocont_binproduct_functor]
- Product of functors: F * G : C -> D, x |-> (x,x) |-> (F x,G x) |-> F x * G x
  [is_omega_cocont_BinProduct_of_functors_alt] [is_omega_cocont_BinProduct_of_functors]
- Precomposition functor: _ o K : ⟦C,A⟧ -> ⟦M,A⟧ for K : M -> C
  [preserves_colimit_pre_composition_functor] [is_omega_cocont_pre_composition_functor]
- Postcomposition with a left adjoint:
  [is_cocont_post_composition_functor] [is_omega_cocont_post_composition_functor]
- Swapping of functor category arguments:
  [is_cocont_functor_cat_swap] [is_omega_cocont_functor_cat_swap]
- The forgetful functor from Set/X to Set preserves colimits
  ([preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET])

Written by: Anders Mörtberg and Benedikt Ahrens, 2015-2016
*)


Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Propositions.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.NaturalNumbers.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.PartA.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Graphs.Colimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Slice.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Limits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Colimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Structures.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Initial.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorAlgebras.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Products.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Graphs.Limits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.ProductCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Examples.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Exponentials.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.RightKanExtension.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.slicecat.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Chains.Chains.

Local Open Scope cat.

(** * Examples of (omega) cocontinuous functors *)
Section cocont_functors.

(** ** Left adjoints preserve colimits *)

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
H: is_left_adjoint F
is_cocont F


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
H: is_left_adjoint F
is_cocont F

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
H: is_left_adjoint F
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
ccL: cocone d L
preserves_colimit F d L ccL

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
H: is_left_adjoint F
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
ccL: cocone d L
is_left_adjoint F

  exact H.
Defined.

(* Print Assumptions left_adjoint_cocont. *)

(** Cocontinuity is preserved by isomorphic functors *)
Section cocont_iso.

(* As this section is proving a proposition, the hypothesis can be weakened from a specified iso to
F and G being isomorphic. *)
Context {C D : category} {F G : functor C D}
        (αiso : @z_iso [C, D] F G).

Section preserves_colimit_iso.

Context {g : graph} (d : diagram g C) (L : C) (cc : cocone d L) (HF : preserves_colimit F d L cc).

Let αinv := inv_from_z_iso αiso.
Let α := pr1 αiso.
Let Hα : is_z_isomorphism α := pr2 αiso.


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
cocone (mapdiagram F d) y


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
cocone (mapdiagram F d) y


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
∏ v : vertex g, D ⟦ dob (mapdiagram F d) v, y ⟧
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
forms_cocone (mapdiagram F d) ?f


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
∏ v : vertex g, D ⟦ dob (mapdiagram F d) v, y ⟧
 intro v; apply (pr1 α (dob d v) · coconeIn ccGy v).

C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
forms_cocone (mapdiagram F d)
  (λ v : vertex g, pr1 α (dob d v) · coconeIn ccGy v)
 abstract (simpl; intros u v e; rewrite <- (coconeInCommutes ccGy u v e), !assoc;
            apply cancel_postcomposition, nat_trans_ax).
Defined.


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
∏ v : vertex g,
# G (coconeIn cc v) · (pr1 αinv L · f) =
coconeIn ccGy v


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C

HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc

Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
∏ v : vertex g,
# G (coconeIn cc v) · (pr1 αinv L · f) =
coconeIn ccGy v


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc

α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
v: vertex g
# G (coconeIn cc v) · pr1 αinv L · f = coconeIn ccGy v


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
v: vertex g
αinv (dob d v) · # F (coconeIn cc v) · f =
coconeIn ccGy v


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc

Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
v: vertex g
αinv (dob d v) · pr1 α (dob d v) · coconeIn ccGy v =
coconeIn ccGy v


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc

y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
v: vertex g
αinv (dob d v) · pr1 α (dob d v) · coconeIn ccGy v =
?b

F, G: C ⟶ D

g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc

α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
v: vertex g
?b = coconeIn ccGy v

  
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
v: vertex g
αinv (dob d v) · pr1 α (dob d v) = ?f'
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
v: vertex g
?f' · coconeIn ccGy v = coconeIn ccGy v

  
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
v: vertex g
identity G (dob d v) · coconeIn ccGy v =
coconeIn ccGy v

now rewrite id_left.
Qed.


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
HHf: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
      (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = f,, Hf
f': D ⟦ G L, y ⟧
Hf': ∏ v : vertex g,
# G (coconeIn cc v) · f' = coconeIn ccGy v
f' = pr1 αinv L · f

F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc

t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,

      (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = f,, Hf
f': D ⟦ G L, y ⟧
Hf': ∏ v : vertex g,
# G (coconeIn cc v) · f' = coconeIn ccGy v
f' = pr1 αinv L · f

f': D ⟦ G L, y ⟧

C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧

Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
HHf: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
      (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = f,, Hf
f': D ⟦ G L, y ⟧
Hf': ∏ v : vertex g,
# G (coconeIn cc v) · f' = coconeIn ccGy v
HH:= ?Goal: ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x
f' = pr1 αinv L · f


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
HHf: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
      (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = f,, Hf
f': D ⟦ G L, y ⟧
Hf': ∏ v : vertex g,
# G (coconeIn cc v) · f' = coconeIn ccGy v
∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x
 
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
HHf: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
      (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = f,, Hf
f': D ⟦ G L, y ⟧
Hf': ∏ v : vertex g,
# G (coconeIn cc v) · f' = coconeIn ccGy v
D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
HHf: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
      (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = f,, Hf
f': D ⟦ G L, y ⟧
Hf': ∏ v : vertex g,
# G (coconeIn cc v) · f' = coconeIn ccGy v
(λ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
 is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x)
  ?pr1

  
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
HHf: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
      (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = f,, Hf
f': D ⟦ G L, y ⟧
Hf': ∏ v : vertex g,
# G (coconeIn cc v) · f' = coconeIn ccGy v
D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
 apply (pr1 α L · f').
  
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
HHf: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
      (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = f,, Hf
f': D ⟦ G L, y ⟧
Hf': ∏ v : vertex g,
# G (coconeIn cc v) · f' = coconeIn ccGy v
(λ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
 is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x)
  (pr1 α L · f')
 
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
HHf: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
      (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = f,, Hf
f': D ⟦ G L, y ⟧
Hf': ∏ v : vertex g,
# G (coconeIn cc v) · f' = coconeIn ccGy v
∏ v : vertex g,
# F (coconeIn cc v) · (pr1 α L · f') =
pr1 α (dob d v) · coconeIn ccGy v
 abstract (intro v; rewrite <- Hf', !assoc; apply cancel_postcomposition, nat_trans_ax).

C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
HHf: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
      (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = f,, Hf
f': D ⟦ G L, y ⟧
Hf': ∏ v : vertex g,
# G (coconeIn cc v) · f' = coconeIn ccGy v
HH:= pr1 α L · f',,
((αinv_f_unique_subproof y ccGy f' Hf'
  :
  ∏ v : vertex g,
  coconeIn (mapcocone F d cc) v · (pr1 α L · f') =
  coconeIn (ccFy y ccGy) v)
 :
 (λ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
  is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x)
   (pr1 α L · f')): ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x
f' = pr1 αinv L · f


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
HHf: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
      (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = f,, Hf
f': D ⟦ G L, y ⟧
Hf': ∏ v : vertex g,
# G (coconeIn cc v) · f' = coconeIn ccGy v
HH:= pr1 α L · f',,
((αinv_f_unique_subproof y ccGy f' Hf'
  :
  ∏ v : vertex g,
  coconeIn (mapcocone F d cc) v · (pr1 α L · f') =
  coconeIn (ccFy y ccGy) v)
 :
 (λ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
  is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x)
   (pr1 α L · f')): ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x
pr1 αinv L · f = f'


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: G ⟹ F
α:= pr1 αiso: F ⟹ G
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
HHf: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
      (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = f,, Hf
f': D ⟦ G L, y ⟧
Hf': ∏ v : vertex g,
# G (coconeIn cc v) · f' = coconeIn ccGy v
HH:= pr1 α L · f',,
αinv_f_unique_subproof y ccGy f' Hf': ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x
Htemp: pr1 α L · f' = f
pr1 αinv L · f = f'


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: G ⟹ F
α:= pr1 αiso: F ⟹ G
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
HHf: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
      (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = f,, Hf
f': D ⟦ G L, y ⟧
Hf': ∏ v : vertex g,
# G (coconeIn cc v) · f' = coconeIn ccGy v
HH:= pr1 α L · f',,
αinv_f_unique_subproof y ccGy f' Hf': ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x
Htemp: pr1 α L · f' = f
pr1 αinv L · pr1 α L · f' = f'


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: G ⟹ F
α:= pr1 αiso: F ⟹ G
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
HHf: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
      (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = f,, Hf
f': D ⟦ G L, y ⟧
Hf': ∏ v : vertex g,
# G (coconeIn cc v) · f' = coconeIn ccGy v
HH:= pr1 α L · f',,
αinv_f_unique_subproof y ccGy f' Hf': ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x
Htemp: pr1 α L · f' = f
pr1 αinv L · pr1 α L · f' = ?b
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: G ⟹ F
α:= pr1 αiso: F ⟹ G
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
HHf: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
      (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = f,, Hf
f': D ⟦ G L, y ⟧
Hf': ∏ v : vertex g,
# G (coconeIn cc v) · f' = coconeIn ccGy v
HH:= pr1 α L · f',,
αinv_f_unique_subproof y ccGy f' Hf': ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x
Htemp: pr1 α L · f' = f
?b = f'

  
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: G ⟹ F
α:= pr1 αiso: F ⟹ G
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
HHf: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
      (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = f,, Hf
f': D ⟦ G L, y ⟧
Hf': ∏ v : vertex g,
# G (coconeIn cc v) · f' = coconeIn ccGy v
HH:= pr1 α L · f',,
αinv_f_unique_subproof y ccGy f' Hf': ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x
Htemp: pr1 α L · f' = f
pr1 αinv L · pr1 α L = ?f'
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: G ⟹ F
α:= pr1 αiso: F ⟹ G
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
HHf: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
      (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = f,, Hf
f': D ⟦ G L, y ⟧
Hf': ∏ v : vertex g,
# G (coconeIn cc v) · f' = coconeIn ccGy v
HH:= pr1 α L · f',,
αinv_f_unique_subproof y ccGy f' Hf': ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x
Htemp: pr1 α L · f' = f
?f' · f' = f'

  
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: G ⟹ F
α:= pr1 αiso: F ⟹ G
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
f: D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf: is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) f
HHf: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
      (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = f,, Hf
f': D ⟦ G L, y ⟧
Hf': ∏ v : vertex g,
# G (coconeIn cc v) · f' = coconeIn ccGy v
HH:= pr1 α L · f',,
αinv_f_unique_subproof y ccGy f' Hf': ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x
Htemp: pr1 α L · f' = f
identity G L · f' = f'

now apply id_left.
Qed.


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
preserves_colimit G d L cc


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
preserves_colimit G d L cc


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
HccL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
∃! x : D ⟦ G L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone G d cc) ccGy x


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
HccL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
H:= HF HccL y (ccFy y ccGy): ∃! x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x
∃! x : D ⟦ G L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone G d cc) ccGy x


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
HccL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
H:= HF HccL y (ccFy y ccGy): ∃! x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x
f:= pr1 (pr1 H): D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf:= pr2 (pr1 H): (λ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
 is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x)
  (pr1 (pr1 H))
HHf:= pr2 H: (λ cntr : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
            (ccFy y ccGy) x,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
       (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = cntr) 
  (pr1 H)
∃! x : D ⟦ G L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone G d cc) ccGy x


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
HccL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
H:= HF HccL y (ccFy y ccGy): ∃! x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x
f:= pr1 (pr1 H): D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf:= pr2 (pr1 H): (λ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
 is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x)
  (pr1 (pr1 H))
HHf:= pr2 H: (λ cntr : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
            (ccFy y ccGy) x,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
       (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = cntr) 
  (pr1 H)
D ⟦ G L, y ⟧
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
HccL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
H:= HF HccL y (ccFy y ccGy): ∃! x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x
f:= pr1 (pr1 H): D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf:= pr2 (pr1 H): (λ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
 is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x)
  (pr1 (pr1 H))
HHf:= pr2 H: (λ cntr : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
            (ccFy y ccGy) x,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
       (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = cntr) 
  (pr1 H)
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone G d cc) ccGy ?x
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
HccL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
H:= HF HccL y (ccFy y ccGy): ∃! x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x
f:= pr1 (pr1 H): D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf:= pr2 (pr1 H): (λ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
 is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x)
  (pr1 (pr1 H))
HHf:= pr2 H: (λ cntr : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
            (ccFy y ccGy) x,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
       (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = cntr) 
  (pr1 H)
∏ y0 : D ⟦ G L, y ⟧,
isaprop (is_cocone_mor (mapcocone G d cc) ccGy y0)
C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
HccL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
H:= HF HccL y (ccFy y ccGy): ∃! x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x
f:= pr1 (pr1 H): D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf:= pr2 (pr1 H): (λ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
 is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x)
  (pr1 (pr1 H))
HHf:= pr2 H: (λ cntr : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
            (ccFy y ccGy) x,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
       (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = cntr) 
  (pr1 H)
∏ y0 : D ⟦ G L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone G d cc) ccGy y0 → y0 = ?x


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
HccL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
H:= HF HccL y (ccFy y ccGy): ∃! x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x
f:= pr1 (pr1 H): D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf:= pr2 (pr1 H): (λ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
 is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x)
  (pr1 (pr1 H))
HHf:= pr2 H: (λ cntr : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
            (ccFy y ccGy) x,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
       (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = cntr) 
  (pr1 H)
D ⟦ G L, y ⟧
 apply (pr1 αinv L · f).

C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
HccL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
H:= HF HccL y (ccFy y ccGy): ∃! x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x
f:= pr1 (pr1 H): D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf:= pr2 (pr1 H): (λ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
 is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x)
  (pr1 (pr1 H))
HHf:= pr2 H: (λ cntr : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
            (ccFy y ccGy) x,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
       (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = cntr) 
  (pr1 H)
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone G d cc) ccGy (pr1 αinv L · f)
 unfold is_cocone_mor; simpl; apply (αinv_f_commutes y ccGy f Hf).

C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
HccL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
H:= HF HccL y (ccFy y ccGy): ∃! x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x
f:= pr1 (pr1 H): D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf:= pr2 (pr1 H): (λ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
 is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x)
  (pr1 (pr1 H))
HHf:= pr2 H: (λ cntr : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
            (ccFy y ccGy) x,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
       (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = cntr) 
  (pr1 H)
∏ y0 : D ⟦ G L, y ⟧,
isaprop (is_cocone_mor (mapcocone G d cc) ccGy y0)
 abstract (intro; apply impred; intro; apply homset_property).

C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HF: preserves_colimit F d L cc
αinv:= inv_from_z_iso αiso: [C, D] ⟦ G, F ⟧
α:= pr1 αiso: [C, D] ⟦ F, G ⟧
Hα:= pr2 αiso: is_z_isomorphism α
HccL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: D
ccGy: cocone (mapdiagram G d) y
H:= HF HccL y (ccFy y ccGy): ∃! x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x
f:= pr1 (pr1 H): D ⟦ F L, y ⟧
Hf:= pr2 (pr1 H): (λ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
 is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc) (ccFy y ccGy) x)
  (pr1 (pr1 H))
HHf:= pr2 H: (λ cntr : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
            (ccFy y ccGy) x,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x : D ⟦ F L, y ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor (mapcocone F d cc)
       (ccFy y ccGy) x, t = cntr) 
  (pr1 H)
∏ y0 : D ⟦ G L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone G d cc) ccGy y0
→ y0 = pr1 αinv L · f
 abstract (simpl in *; intros f' Hf'; apply (αinv_f_unique y ccGy f Hf); trivial;
            intro t; rewrite (HHf t); reflexivity).
Defined.

End preserves_colimit_iso.


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
is_cocont F → is_cocont G


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
is_cocont F → is_cocont G

now intros H g d c cc; apply (preserves_colimit_z_iso).
Defined.


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
is_omega_cocont F → is_omega_cocont G


C, D: category
F, G: C ⟶ D
αiso: z_iso F G
is_omega_cocont F → is_omega_cocont G

now intros H g d c cc; apply (preserves_colimit_z_iso).
Defined.

End cocont_iso.

(** ** The identity functor is (omega) cocontinuous *)
Section functor_identity.

Context (C : category).


C: category
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
preserves_colimit (functor_identity C) d L cc


C: category
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
preserves_colimit (functor_identity C) d L cc


C: category
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: C
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (functor_identity C) d) y
∃! x : C ⟦ L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (functor_identity C) d cc)
  ccy x


C: category
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: C
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (functor_identity C) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone d L cc HcL: ColimCocone d
∃! x : C ⟦ L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (functor_identity C) d cc)
  ccy x


C: category
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: C
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (functor_identity C) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone d L cc HcL: ColimCocone d
∑ x : C ⟦ L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (functor_identity C) d cc)
  ccy x
C: category
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: C
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (functor_identity C) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone d L cc HcL: ColimCocone d
(λ cntr : ∑ x : C ⟦ L, y ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor
            (mapcocone (functor_identity C) d cc) ccy
            x,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x : C ⟦ L, y ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor
       (mapcocone (functor_identity C) d cc) ccy x,
 t = cntr) ?pr1


C: category
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: C
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (functor_identity C) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone d L cc HcL: ColimCocone d
∑ x : C ⟦ L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (functor_identity C) d cc)
  ccy x
 
C: category
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: C
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (functor_identity C) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone d L cc HcL: ColimCocone d
C ⟦ L, y ⟧
C: category
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: C
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (functor_identity C) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone d L cc HcL: ColimCocone d
(λ x : C ⟦ L, y ⟧,
 is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (functor_identity C) d cc)
   ccy x) ?pr1

  
C: category
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: C
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (functor_identity C) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone d L cc HcL: ColimCocone d
C ⟦ L, y ⟧
 apply (colimArrow CC), ccy.
  
C: category
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: C
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (functor_identity C) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone d L cc HcL: ColimCocone d
(λ x : C ⟦ L, y ⟧,
 is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (functor_identity C) d cc)
   ccy x) (colimArrow CC y ccy)
 abstract (simpl; intro n; apply (colimArrowCommutes CC)).

C: category
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: C
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (functor_identity C) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone d L cc HcL: ColimCocone d
(λ cntr : ∑ x : C ⟦ L, y ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor
            (mapcocone (functor_identity C) d cc) ccy
            x,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x : C ⟦ L, y ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor
       (mapcocone (functor_identity C) d cc) ccy x,
 t = cntr)
  (colimArrow CC y ccy,,
   preserves_colimit_identity_subproof g d L cc HcL y
     ccy)
 abstract (simpl; intro t; apply subtypePath;
    [ simpl; intro v; apply impred; intro; apply homset_property
    | apply (colimArrowUnique CC); intro n; apply (pr2 t)]).
Defined.


C: category
is_cocont (functor_identity C)


C: category
is_cocont (functor_identity C)

now intros g; apply preserves_colimit_identity.
Defined.


C: category
is_omega_cocont (functor_identity C)


C: category
is_omega_cocont (functor_identity C)

now intros c; apply is_cocont_functor_identity.
Defined.

Definition omega_cocont_functor_identity : omega_cocont_functor C C :=
  tpair _ _ is_omega_cocont_functor_identity.

End functor_identity.

(** ** The constant functor is omega cocontinuous *)
Section constant_functor.

Context {C D : category} (x : D).

(* Without the conn argument this is is too weak as diagrams are not necessarily categories *)

C, D: category
x: D
g: graph
v: vertex g
conn: ∏ u : vertex g, edge v u
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
preserves_colimit (constant_functor C D x) d L cc


C, D: category
x: D
g: graph
v: vertex g
conn: ∏ u : vertex g, edge v u
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
preserves_colimit (constant_functor C D x) d L cc


C, D: category
x: D
g: graph
v: vertex g
conn: ∏ u : vertex g, edge v u
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: D
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (constant_functor C D x) d) y
∃! x0 : D ⟦ x, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (constant_functor C D x) d cc) ccy x0


C, D: category
x: D
g: graph
v: vertex g
conn: ∏ u : vertex g, edge v u
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: D
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (constant_functor C D x) d) y
∑ x0 : D ⟦ x, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (constant_functor C D x) d cc) ccy x0
C, D: category
x: D
g: graph
v: vertex g
conn: ∏ u : vertex g, edge v u
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: D
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (constant_functor C D x) d) y
(λ cntr : ∑ x0 : D ⟦ x, y ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor
            (mapcocone (constant_functor C D x) d cc)
            ccy x0,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x0 : D ⟦ x, y ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor
       (mapcocone (constant_functor C D x) d cc) ccy
       x0, t = cntr) ?pr1


C, D: category
x: D
g: graph
v: vertex g
conn: ∏ u : vertex g, edge v u
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: D
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (constant_functor C D x) d) y
∑ x0 : D ⟦ x, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (constant_functor C D x) d cc) ccy x0
 
C, D: category
x: D
g: graph
v: vertex g
conn: ∏ u : vertex g, edge v u
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: D
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (constant_functor C D x) d) y
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (constant_functor C D x) d cc) ccy
  (coconeIn ccy v)

  abstract (now intro u; generalize (coconeInCommutes ccy _ _ (conn u));
            rewrite !id_left; intro H; rewrite H).

C, D: category
x: D
g: graph
v: vertex g
conn: ∏ u : vertex g, edge v u
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: D
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (constant_functor C D x) d) y
(λ cntr : ∑ x0 : D ⟦ x, y ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor
            (mapcocone (constant_functor C D x) d cc)
            ccy x0,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x0 : D ⟦ x, y ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor
       (mapcocone (constant_functor C D x) d cc) ccy
       x0, t = cntr)
  (coconeIn ccy v,,
   preserves_colimit_constant_functor_subproof g v
     conn d L cc y ccy)
 abstract (intro p; apply subtypePath;
              [ intro; apply impred; intro; apply homset_property
              | now destruct p as [p H]; rewrite <- (H v), id_left ]).
Defined.

(** The constant functor is omega cocontinuous *)

C, D: category
x: D
is_omega_cocont (constant_functor C D x)


C, D: category
x: D
is_omega_cocont (constant_functor C D x)


C, D: category
x: D
c: chain C
L: C
ccL: cocone c L
HccL: isColimCocone c L ccL
y: D
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (constant_functor C D x) c) y
∃! x0 : D ⟦ constant_functor C D x L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (constant_functor C D x) c ccL) ccy x0


C, D: category
x: D
c: chain C
L: C
ccL: cocone c L
HccL: isColimCocone c L ccL
y: D
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (constant_functor C D x) c) y
∑ x0 : D ⟦ constant_functor C D x L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (constant_functor C D x) c ccL) ccy x0
C, D: category
x: D
c: chain C
L: C
ccL: cocone c L
HccL: isColimCocone c L ccL
y: D
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (constant_functor C D x) c) y
(λ cntr : ∑ x0 : D ⟦ constant_functor C D x L, y ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor
            (mapcocone (constant_functor C D x) c ccL)
            ccy x0,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x0 : D ⟦ constant_functor C D x L, y ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor
       (mapcocone (constant_functor C D x) c ccL) ccy
       x0, t = cntr) ?pr1


C, D: category
x: D
c: chain C
L: C
ccL: cocone c L
HccL: isColimCocone c L ccL
y: D
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (constant_functor C D x) c) y
∑ x0 : D ⟦ constant_functor C D x L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (constant_functor C D x) c ccL) ccy x0
 
C, D: category
x: D
c: chain C
L: C
ccL: cocone c L
HccL: isColimCocone c L ccL
y: D
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (constant_functor C D x) c) y
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (constant_functor C D x) c ccL) ccy
  (coconeIn ccy 0)

  abstract (intro n; rewrite id_left; destruct ccy as [f Hf]; simpl;
            now induction n as [|n IHn]; [apply idpath|]; rewrite IHn, <- (Hf n (S n) (idpath _)), id_left).

C, D: category
x: D
c: chain C
L: C
ccL: cocone c L
HccL: isColimCocone c L ccL
y: D
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (constant_functor C D x) c) y
(λ cntr : ∑ x0 : D ⟦ constant_functor C D x L, y ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor
            (mapcocone (constant_functor C D x) c ccL)
            ccy x0,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x0 : D ⟦ constant_functor C D x L, y ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor
       (mapcocone (constant_functor C D x) c ccL) ccy
       x0, t = cntr)
  (coconeIn ccy 0,,
   is_omega_cocont_constant_functor_subproof c L ccL y
     ccy)
 abstract (intro p; apply subtypePath;
              [ intros f; apply impred; intro; apply homset_property
              | now simpl; destruct p as [p H]; rewrite <- (H 0), id_left]).
Defined.

Definition omega_cocont_constant_functor : omega_cocont_functor C D :=
  tpair _ _ is_omega_cocont_constant_functor.

End constant_functor.

(** ** Functor composition preserves omega cocontinuity *)
Section functor_composite.

Context {C D E : category}.


C, D, E: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
H1: preserves_colimit F d L cc
H2: preserves_colimit G (mapdiagram F d) (F L)
  (mapcocone F d cc)
preserves_colimit (F ∙ G) d L cc


C, D, E: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
H1: preserves_colimit F d L cc
H2: preserves_colimit G (mapdiagram F d) (F L)
  (mapcocone F d cc)
preserves_colimit (F ∙ G) d L cc


C, D, E: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
H1: preserves_colimit F d L cc
H2: preserves_colimit G (mapdiagram F d) (F L)
  (mapcocone F d cc)
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: E
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (F ∙ G) d) y
∃! x : E ⟦ G (F L), y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (F ∙ G) d cc) ccy x


C, D, E: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
H1: preserves_colimit F d L cc
H2: preserves_colimit G (mapdiagram F d) (F L)
  (mapcocone F d cc)
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: E
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (F ∙ G) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram G (mapdiagram F d))
  (G (F L))
  (mapcocone G (mapdiagram F d) (mapcocone F d cc))
  (H2 (H1 HcL)): ColimCocone (mapdiagram G (mapdiagram F d))
∃! x : E ⟦ G (F L), y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (F ∙ G) d cc) ccy x


C, D, E: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
H1: preserves_colimit F d L cc
H2: preserves_colimit G (mapdiagram F d) (F L)
  (mapcocone F d cc)
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: E
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (F ∙ G) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram G (mapdiagram F d))
  (G (F L))
  (mapcocone G (mapdiagram F d) (mapcocone F d cc))
  (H2 (H1 HcL)): ColimCocone (mapdiagram G (mapdiagram F d))
∑ x : E ⟦ G (F L), y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (F ∙ G) d cc) ccy x
C, D, E: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
H1: preserves_colimit F d L cc
H2: preserves_colimit G (mapdiagram F d) (F L)
  (mapcocone F d cc)
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: E
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (F ∙ G) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram G (mapdiagram F d))
  (G (F L))
  (mapcocone G (mapdiagram F d) (mapcocone F d cc))
  (H2 (H1 HcL)): ColimCocone (mapdiagram G (mapdiagram F d))
(λ cntr : ∑ x : E ⟦ G (F L), y ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (F ∙ G) d cc) ccy x,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x : E ⟦ G (F L), y ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (F ∙ G) d cc) ccy x,
 t = cntr) ?pr1


C, D, E: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
H1: preserves_colimit F d L cc
H2: preserves_colimit G (mapdiagram F d) (F L)
  (mapcocone F d cc)
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: E
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (F ∙ G) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram G (mapdiagram F d))
  (G (F L))
  (mapcocone G (mapdiagram F d) (mapcocone F d cc))
  (H2 (H1 HcL)): ColimCocone (mapdiagram G (mapdiagram F d))
∑ x : E ⟦ G (F L), y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (F ∙ G) d cc) ccy x
 
C, D, E: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
H1: preserves_colimit F d L cc
H2: preserves_colimit G (mapdiagram F d) (F L)
  (mapcocone F d cc)
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: E
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (F ∙ G) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram G (mapdiagram F d))
  (G (F L))
  (mapcocone G (mapdiagram F d) (mapcocone F d cc))
  (H2 (H1 HcL)): ColimCocone (mapdiagram G (mapdiagram F d))
E ⟦ G (F L), y ⟧
C, D, E: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
H1: preserves_colimit F d L cc
H2: preserves_colimit G (mapdiagram F d) (F L)
  (mapcocone F d cc)
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: E
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (F ∙ G) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram G (mapdiagram F d))
  (G (F L))
  (mapcocone G (mapdiagram F d) (mapcocone F d cc))
  (H2 (H1 HcL)): ColimCocone (mapdiagram G (mapdiagram F d))
(λ x : E ⟦ G (F L), y ⟧,
 is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (F ∙ G) d cc) ccy x) ?pr1

  
C, D, E: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
H1: preserves_colimit F d L cc
H2: preserves_colimit G (mapdiagram F d) (F L)
  (mapcocone F d cc)
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: E
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (F ∙ G) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram G (mapdiagram F d))
  (G (F L))
  (mapcocone G (mapdiagram F d) (mapcocone F d cc))
  (H2 (H1 HcL)): ColimCocone (mapdiagram G (mapdiagram F d))
E ⟦ G (F L), y ⟧
 apply (colimArrow CC), ccy.
  
C, D, E: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
H1: preserves_colimit F d L cc
H2: preserves_colimit G (mapdiagram F d) (F L)
  (mapcocone F d cc)
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: E
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (F ∙ G) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram G (mapdiagram F d))
  (G (F L))
  (mapcocone G (mapdiagram F d) (mapcocone F d cc))
  (H2 (H1 HcL)): ColimCocone (mapdiagram G (mapdiagram F d))
(λ x : E ⟦ G (F L), y ⟧,
 is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (F ∙ G) d cc) ccy x)
  (colimArrow CC y ccy)
 abstract (simpl; intro v; apply (colimArrowCommutes CC)).

C, D, E: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
H1: preserves_colimit F d L cc
H2: preserves_colimit G (mapdiagram F d) (F L)
  (mapcocone F d cc)
HcL: isColimCocone d L cc
y: E
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (F ∙ G) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone (mapdiagram G (mapdiagram F d))
  (G (F L))
  (mapcocone G (mapdiagram F d) (mapcocone F d cc))
  (H2 (H1 HcL)): ColimCocone (mapdiagram G (mapdiagram F d))
(λ cntr : ∑ x : E ⟦ G (F L), y ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (F ∙ G) d cc) ccy x,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x : E ⟦ G (F L), y ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (F ∙ G) d cc) ccy x,
 t = cntr)
  (colimArrow CC y ccy,,
   preserves_colimit_functor_composite_subproof F G g
     d L cc H1 H2 HcL y ccy)
 abstract (simpl; intro t; apply subtypePath;
    [ intros f; apply impred; intro; apply homset_property
    | simpl; apply (colimArrowUnique CC), (pr2 t) ]).
Defined.


C, D, E: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: is_cocont F
HG: is_cocont G
is_cocont (F ∙ G)


C, D, E: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: is_cocont F
HG: is_cocont G
is_cocont (F ∙ G)


C, D, E: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
HF: is_cocont F
HG: is_cocont G
g: graph
d: diagram g C
L: C
cc: cocone d L
preserves_colimit (F ∙ G) d L cc

apply preserves_colimit_functor_composite; [ apply HF | apply HG ].
Defined.


C, D, E: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
is_omega_cocont F
→ is_omega_cocont G → is_omega_cocont (F ∙ G)


C, D, E: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
is_omega_cocont F
→ is_omega_cocont G → is_omega_cocont (F ∙ G)


C, D, E: category
F: C ⟶ D
G: D ⟶ E
hF: is_omega_cocont F
hG: is_omega_cocont G
c: chain C
L: C
cc: cocone c L
preserves_colimit (F ∙ G) c L cc

apply preserves_colimit_functor_composite; [ apply hF | apply hG ].
Defined.

Definition omega_cocont_functor_composite
  (F : omega_cocont_functor C D) (G : omega_cocont_functor D E) :
  omega_cocont_functor C E := tpair _ _ (is_omega_cocont_functor_composite _ _ (pr2 F) (pr2 G)).

End functor_composite.

(** ** Functor iteration preserves (omega)-cocontinuity *)
Section iter_functor.


C: category
F: C ⟶ C
hF: is_cocont F
n: nat
is_cocont (iter_functor F n)


C: category
F: C ⟶ C
hF: is_cocont F
n: nat
is_cocont (iter_functor F n)


C: category
F: C ⟶ C
hF: is_cocont F
is_cocont (functor_identity C)
C: category
F: C ⟶ C
hF: is_cocont F
n: nat
IH: is_cocont (iter_functor F n)
is_cocont (iter_functor F n ∙ F)


C: category
F: C ⟶ C
hF: is_cocont F
is_cocont (functor_identity C)
 apply (is_cocont_functor_identity _).

C: category
F: C ⟶ C
hF: is_cocont F
n: nat
IH: is_cocont (iter_functor F n)
is_cocont (iter_functor F n ∙ F)
 apply (is_cocont_functor_composite _ _ IH hF).
Defined.


C: category
F: C ⟶ C
hF: is_omega_cocont F
n: nat
is_omega_cocont (iter_functor F n)


C: category
F: C ⟶ C
hF: is_omega_cocont F
n: nat
is_omega_cocont (iter_functor F n)


C: category
F: C ⟶ C
hF: is_omega_cocont F
is_omega_cocont (functor_identity C)
C: category
F: C ⟶ C
hF: is_omega_cocont F
n: nat
IH: is_omega_cocont (iter_functor F n)
is_omega_cocont (iter_functor F n ∙ F)


C: category
F: C ⟶ C
hF: is_omega_cocont F
is_omega_cocont (functor_identity C)
 apply (is_omega_cocont_functor_identity _).

C: category
F: C ⟶ C
hF: is_omega_cocont F
n: nat
IH: is_omega_cocont (iter_functor F n)
is_omega_cocont (iter_functor F n ∙ F)
 apply (is_omega_cocont_functor_composite _ _ IH hF).
Defined.

Definition omega_cocont_iter_functor {C : category}
  (F : omega_cocont_functor C C) n : omega_cocont_functor C C :=
  tpair _ _ (is_omega_cocont_iter_functor _ (pr2 F) n).

End iter_functor.

(** ** A pair of functors (F,G) : A * B -> C * D is omega cocontinuous if F and G are *)
Section pair_functor.

Context {A B C D : category} (F : functor A C) (G : functor B D).



A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) (ob1 ab)


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) (ob1 ab)


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
∏ v : vertex g,
A ⟦ dob (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) v, ob1 ab ⟧
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
forms_cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) ?f


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
∏ v : vertex g,
A ⟦ dob (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) v, ob1 ab ⟧
 simpl; intro n; apply (mor1 (coconeIn ccab n)).

A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
forms_cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB)
  ((λ n : vertex g, mor1 (coconeIn ccab n))
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   A ⟦ dob (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) v,
   ob1 ab ⟧)
 
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
m, n: vertex g
e: edge m n
dmor (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) e
· mor1 (coconeIn ccab n) = mor1 (coconeIn ccab m)

  
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
m, n: vertex g
e: edge m n
X:= coconeInCommutes ccab m n e: dmor cAB e · coconeIn ccab n = coconeIn ccab m
dmor (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) e
· mor1 (coconeIn ccab n) = mor1 (coconeIn ccab m)

  
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
m, n: vertex g
e: edge m n
X:= coconeInCommutes ccab m n e: dmor cAB e · coconeIn ccab n = coconeIn ccab m
dmor (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) e
· mor1 (coconeIn ccab n) = ?b
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
m, n: vertex g
e: edge m n
X:= coconeInCommutes ccab m n e: dmor cAB e · coconeIn ccab n = coconeIn ccab m
?b = mor1 (coconeIn ccab m)
 
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
m, n: vertex g
e: edge m n
X:= coconeInCommutes ccab m n e: dmor cAB e · coconeIn ccab n = coconeIn ccab m
?b = mor1 (coconeIn ccab m)
 
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
m, n: vertex g
e: edge m n
X:= coconeInCommutes ccab m n e: dmor cAB e · coconeIn ccab n = coconeIn ccab m
?t1 = coconeIn ccab m
 apply X. 
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
m, n: vertex g
e: edge m n
X:= coconeInCommutes ccab m n e: dmor cAB e · coconeIn ccab n = coconeIn ccab m
dmor (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) e
· mor1 (coconeIn ccab n) =
mor1 (dmor cAB e · coconeIn ccab n)

  apply idpath.
Defined.


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
isColimCocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB)
  (ob1 ab) (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccab)


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
isColimCocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB)
  (ob1 ab) (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccab)


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) x
∃! x0 : A ⟦ ob1 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccab)
  ccx x0


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) x
cocone cAB (x,, ob2 ab)
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= ?Goal: cocone cAB (x,, ob2 ab)
∃! x0 : A ⟦ ob1 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccab)
  ccx x0


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) x
cocone cAB (x,, ob2 ab)
 
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) x
∏ v : vertex g,
category_binproduct A B ⟦ dob cAB v, x,, ob2 ab ⟧
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) x
forms_cocone cAB ?f

  
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) x
∏ v : vertex g,
category_binproduct A B ⟦ dob cAB v, x,, ob2 ab ⟧
 simpl; intro n; split;
      [ apply (pr1 ccx n) | apply (# (pr2_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n)) ].
  
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) x
forms_cocone cAB
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    pr1 ccx n,, # (pr2_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n))
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ dob cAB v, x,, ob2 ab ⟧)
 abstract(simpl; intros m n e; apply pathsdirprod;
               [ apply (pr2 ccx m n e) | apply (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 ((pr2 ccab) m n e)) ]).

A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    pr1 ccx n,, # (pr2_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n))
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, x,, ob2 ab ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr1_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (x,, ob2 ab)
∃! x0 : A ⟦ ob1 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccab)
  ccx x0


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    pr1 ccx n,, # (pr2_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n))
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, x,, ob2 ab ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr1_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (x,, ob2 ab)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         x,, ob2 ab ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
∃! x0 : A ⟦ ob1 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccab)
  ccx x0


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    pr1 ccx n,, # (pr2_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n))
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, x,, ob2 ab ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr1_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (x,, ob2 ab)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         x,, ob2 ab ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
∑ x0 : A ⟦ ob1 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccab)
  ccx x0
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    pr1 ccx n,, # (pr2_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n))
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, x,, ob2 ab ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr1_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (x,, ob2 ab)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         x,, ob2 ab ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
(λ cntr : ∑ x0 : A ⟦ ob1 ab, x ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor
            (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx
            x0,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x0 : A ⟦ ob1 ab, x ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor
       (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx x0,
 t = cntr) ?pr1


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    pr1 ccx n,, # (pr2_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n))
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, x,, ob2 ab ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr1_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (x,, ob2 ab)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         x,, ob2 ab ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
∑ x0 : A ⟦ ob1 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccab)
  ccx x0
 
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    pr1 ccx n,, # (pr2_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n))
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, x,, ob2 ab ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr1_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (x,, ob2 ab)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         x,, ob2 ab ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccab)
  ccx x1

  abstract (intro n; apply (maponpaths pr1 (p1 n))).

A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B

Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) x

  ((λ n : vertex g,
    pr1 ccx n,, # (pr2_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n))
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, x,, ob2 ab ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr1_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (x,, ob2 ab)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         x,, ob2 ab ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
(λ cntr : ∑ x0 : A ⟦ ob1 ab, x ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor
            (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx
            x0,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x0 : A ⟦ ob1 ab, x ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor
       (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx x0,
 t = cntr)
  (x1,,
   isColimCocone_pr1_functor_subproof0 g cAB ab ccab x
     ccx x1 x2 p1)

A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    pr1 ccx n,, # (pr2_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n))
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, x,, ob2 ab ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr1_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (x,, ob2 ab)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         x,, ob2 ab ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
t: ∑ x0 : A ⟦ ob1 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx x0
∑
x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab,
     make_catbinprod x (pr2 ab) ⟧,
∏ v : vertex g,
coconeIn ccab v · x0 =
catbinprodmor (pr1 ccx v) (pr2 (pr1 ccab v))

t = (x1,, x2),, p1

is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx x0
X:= ?Goal: ∑
x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab,
     make_catbinprod x (pr2 ab) ⟧,
∏ v : vertex g,
coconeIn ccab v · x0 =
catbinprodmor (pr1 ccx v) (pr2 (pr1 ccab v))
t =
x1,,
isColimCocone_pr1_functor_subproof0 g cAB ab ccab x
  ccx x1 x2 p1

category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab,
make_catbinprod x (pr2 ab) ⟧

g: graph

x: A

  ((λ n : vertex g,

t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab,

t = (x1,, x2),, p1
t: ∑ x0 : A ⟦ ob1 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx x0
(λ x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab,
        make_catbinprod x (pr2 ab) ⟧,
 ∏ v : vertex g,
 coconeIn ccab v · x0 =
 catbinprodmor (pr1 ccx v) (pr2 (pr1 ccab v))) 
  ?pr1

    
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    pr1 ccx n,, # (pr2_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n))
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, x,, ob2 ab ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr1_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (x,, ob2 ab)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         x,, ob2 ab ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
t: ∑ x0 : A ⟦ ob1 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx x0
category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab,
make_catbinprod x (pr2 ab) ⟧
 split; [ apply (pr1 t) | apply (identity _) ].
    
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    pr1 ccx n,, # (pr2_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n))
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, x,, ob2 ab ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr1_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (x,, ob2 ab)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         x,, ob2 ab ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
t: ∑ x0 : A ⟦ ob1 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx x0
(λ x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab,
        make_catbinprod x (pr2 ab) ⟧,
 ∏ v : vertex g,
 coconeIn ccab v · x0 =
 catbinprodmor (pr1 ccx v) (pr2 (pr1 ccab v)))
  (pr1 t,, identity (pr2 ab))
 
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    pr1 ccx n,, # (pr2_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n))
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, x,, ob2 ab ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr1_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (x,, ob2 ab)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         x,, ob2 ab ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
t: ∑ x0 : A ⟦ ob1 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx x0
∏ v : vertex g,
make_dirprod (pr1 (coconeIn ccab v) · pr1 t)
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccab v) · identity (pr2 ab)) =
catbinprodmor (pr1 ccx v) (pr2 (pr1 ccab v))
 abstract (intro n; rewrite id_right; apply pathsdirprod;
                 [ apply (pr2 t) | apply idpath ]).
  
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    pr1 ccx n,, # (pr2_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n))
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, x,, ob2 ab ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr1_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (x,, ob2 ab)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (x,, ob2 ab) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         x,, ob2 ab ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
t: ∑ x0 : A ⟦ ob1 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx x0
X:= (pr1 t,, identity (pr2 ab)),,
(isColimCocone_pr1_functor_subproof1 g cAB ab ccab
   x ccx t
 :
 (λ x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab,
         make_catbinprod x (pr2 ab) ⟧,
  ∏ v : vertex g,
  coconeIn ccab v · x0 =
  catbinprodmor (pr1 ccx v) (pr2 (pr1 ccab v)))
   (pr1 t,, identity (pr2 ab))): ∑
x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab,
     make_catbinprod x (pr2 ab) ⟧,
∏ v : vertex g,
coconeIn ccab v · x0 =
catbinprodmor (pr1 ccx v) (pr2 (pr1 ccab v))
t =
x1,,
isColimCocone_pr1_functor_subproof0 g cAB ab ccab x
  ccx x1 x2 p1

  abstract (apply subtypePath; simpl;
            [ intro f; apply impred; intro; apply homset_property
            | apply (maponpaths (λ x, pr1 (pr1 x)) (p2 X))]).
Defined.


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
is_cocont (pr1_functor A B)


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
is_cocont (pr1_functor A B)

now intros c L ccL M H; apply isColimCocone_pr1_functor.
Defined.


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) (pr2 ab)

F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) (pr2 ab)


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
∏ v : vertex g,
B ⟦ dob (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) v, pr2 ab ⟧
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
forms_cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) ?f


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
∏ v : vertex g,
B ⟦ dob (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) v, pr2 ab ⟧
 simpl; intro n; apply (pr2 (coconeIn ccab n)).

A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
forms_cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB)
  ((λ n : vertex g, pr2 (coconeIn ccab n))
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   B ⟦ dob (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) v,
   pr2 ab ⟧)
 
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
m, n: vertex g
e: edge m n
dmor (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) e
· pr2 (coconeIn ccab n) = pr2 (coconeIn ccab m)

  
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
m, n: vertex g
e: edge m n
dmor (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) e
· pr2 (coconeIn ccab n) = ?b
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
m, n: vertex g
e: edge m n
?b = pr2 (coconeIn ccab m)
 
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
m, n: vertex g
e: edge m n
?b = pr2 (coconeIn ccab m)
 
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
m, n: vertex g
e: edge m n
?t1 = coconeIn ccab m
 apply (coconeInCommutes ccab m n e). 
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
m, n: vertex g
e: edge m n
dmor (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) e
· pr2 (coconeIn ccab n) =
pr2 (dmor cAB e · coconeIn ccab n)

  apply idpath.
Defined.


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
isColimCocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB)
  (pr2 ab) (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab)


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
isColimCocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB)
  (pr2 ab) (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab)


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
∃! x0 : B ⟦ pr2 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab)
  ccx x0


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
cocone cAB (pr1 ab,, x)
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= ?Goal: cocone cAB (pr1 ab,, x)
∃! x0 : B ⟦ pr2 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab)
  ccx x0

Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
