cocone cAB (pr1 ab,, x)
 
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
∏ v : vertex g,
category_binproduct A B ⟦ dob cAB v, pr1 ab,, x ⟧
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
forms_cocone cAB ?f

  
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
∏ v : vertex g,
category_binproduct A B ⟦ dob cAB v, pr1 ab,, x ⟧
 simpl; intro n; split;
      [ apply (# (pr1_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n)) | apply (pr1 ccx n) ].
  
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
forms_cocone cAB
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    # (pr1_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n),, pr1 ccx n)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ dob cAB v, pr1 ab,, x ⟧)
 abstract (simpl; intros m n e; apply pathsdirprod;
                [ apply (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 ccab m n e)) | apply (pr2 ccx m n e) ]).
 
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    # (pr1_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n),, pr1 ccx n)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, pr1 ab,, x ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (pr1 ab,, x)
∃! x0 : B ⟦ pr2 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab)
  ccx x0


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    # (pr1_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n),, pr1 ccx n)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, pr1 ab,, x ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (pr1 ab,, x)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         pr1 ab,, x ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
∃! x0 : B ⟦ pr2 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab)
  ccx x0


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    # (pr1_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n),, pr1 ccx n)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, pr1 ab,, x ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (pr1 ab,, x)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         pr1 ab,, x ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
∑ x0 : B ⟦ pr2 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab)
  ccx x0
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    # (pr1_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n),, pr1 ccx n)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, pr1 ab,, x ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (pr1 ab,, x)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         pr1 ab,, x ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
(λ cntr : ∑ x0 : B ⟦ pr2 ab, x ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor
            (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx
            x0,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x0 : B ⟦ pr2 ab, x ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor
       (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx x0,
 t = cntr) ?pr1


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    # (pr1_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n),, pr1 ccx n)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, pr1 ab,, x ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (pr1 ab,, x)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         pr1 ab,, x ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
∑ x0 : B ⟦ pr2 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab)
  ccx x0
 
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    # (pr1_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n),, pr1 ccx n)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, pr1 ab,, x ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (pr1 ab,, x)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         pr1 ab,, x ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab)
  ccx x2

  abstract (intro n; apply (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 (p1 n))).

A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    # (pr1_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n),, pr1 ccx n)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, pr1 ab,, x ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (pr1 ab,, x)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         pr1 ab,, x ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
(λ cntr : ∑ x0 : B ⟦ pr2 ab, x ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor
            (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx
            x0,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x0 : B ⟦ pr2 ab, x ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor
       (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx x0,
 t = cntr)
  (x2,,
   isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof0 g cAB ab ccab x
     ccx x1 x2 p1)
 
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    # (pr1_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n),, pr1 ccx n)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, pr1 ab,, x ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (pr1 ab,, x)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         pr1 ab,, x ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
t: ∑ x0 : B ⟦ pr2 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx x0
t =
x2,,
isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof0 g cAB ab ccab x
  ccx x1 x2 p1

  
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    # (pr1_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n),, pr1 ccx n)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, pr1 ab,, x ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (pr1 ab,, x)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         pr1 ab,, x ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
t: ∑ x0 : B ⟦ pr2 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx x0
∑
x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab,
     make_catbinprod (pr1 ab) x ⟧,
∏ v : vertex g,
coconeIn ccab v · x0 =
catbinprodmor (pr1 (pr1 ccab v)) (pr1 ccx v)
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    # (pr1_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n),, pr1 ccx n)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, pr1 ab,, x ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (pr1 ab,, x)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         pr1 ab,, x ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
t: ∑ x0 : B ⟦ pr2 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx x0
X:= ?Goal: ∑
x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab,
     make_catbinprod (pr1 ab) x ⟧,
∏ v : vertex g,
coconeIn ccab v · x0 =
catbinprodmor (pr1 (pr1 ccab v)) (pr1 ccx v)
t =
x2,,
isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof0 g cAB ab ccab x
  ccx x1 x2 p1

  
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    # (pr1_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n),, pr1 ccx n)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, pr1 ab,, x ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (pr1 ab,, x)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         pr1 ab,, x ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
t: ∑ x0 : B ⟦ pr2 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx x0
∑
x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab,
     make_catbinprod (pr1 ab) x ⟧,
∏ v : vertex g,
coconeIn ccab v · x0 =
catbinprodmor (pr1 (pr1 ccab v)) (pr1 ccx v)
 
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    # (pr1_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n),, pr1 ccx n)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, pr1 ab,, x ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (pr1 ab,, x)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         pr1 ab,, x ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
t: ∑ x0 : B ⟦ pr2 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx x0
category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab,
make_catbinprod (pr1 ab) x ⟧
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    # (pr1_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n),, pr1 ccx n)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, pr1 ab,, x ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (pr1 ab,, x)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         pr1 ab,, x ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
t: ∑ x0 : B ⟦ pr2 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx x0
(λ x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab,
        make_catbinprod (pr1 ab) x ⟧,
 ∏ v : vertex g,
 coconeIn ccab v · x0 =
 catbinprodmor (pr1 (pr1 ccab v)) (pr1 ccx v)) 
  ?pr1

    
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    # (pr1_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n),, pr1 ccx n)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, pr1 ab,, x ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (pr1 ab,, x)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         pr1 ab,, x ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
t: ∑ x0 : B ⟦ pr2 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx x0
category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab,
make_catbinprod (pr1 ab) x ⟧
 split; [ apply (identity _) | apply (pr1 t) ].
    
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    # (pr1_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n),, pr1 ccx n)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, pr1 ab,, x ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (pr1 ab,, x)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         pr1 ab,, x ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
t: ∑ x0 : B ⟦ pr2 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx x0
(λ x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab,
        make_catbinprod (pr1 ab) x ⟧,
 ∏ v : vertex g,
 coconeIn ccab v · x0 =
 catbinprodmor (pr1 (pr1 ccab v)) (pr1 ccx v))
  (identity (pr1 ab),, pr1 t)
 
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    # (pr1_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n),, pr1 ccx n)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, pr1 ab,, x ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (pr1 ab,, x)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         pr1 ab,, x ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
t: ∑ x0 : B ⟦ pr2 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx x0
∏ v : vertex g,
make_dirprod
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccab v) · identity (pr1 ab))
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccab v) · pr1 t) =
catbinprodmor (pr1 (pr1 ccab v)) (pr1 ccx v)
 abstract (intro n; rewrite id_right; apply pathsdirprod;
                 [ apply idpath | apply (pr2 t) ]).
  
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
g: graph
cAB: diagram g (category_binproduct A B)
ab: A × B
ccab: cocone cAB ab
Hccab: isColimCocone cAB ab ccab
x: B
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ n : vertex g,
    # (pr1_functor A B) (pr1 ccab n),, pr1 ccx n)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   category_binproduct A B ⟦ 
   dob cAB v, pr1 ab,, x ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof g cAB ab
     ccab x ccx): cocone cAB (pr1 ab,, x)
x1: A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
x2: B ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 (pr1 ab,, x) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccab HHH (x1,, x2)
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab, 
         pr1 ab,, x ⟧, is_cocone_mor ccab HHH x0,
t = (x1,, x2),, p1
t: ∑ x0 : B ⟦ pr2 ab, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccab) ccx x0
X:= (identity (pr1 ab),, pr1 t),,
(isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof1 g cAB ab ccab
   x ccx t
 :
 (λ x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab,
         make_catbinprod (pr1 ab) x ⟧,
  ∏ v : vertex g,
  coconeIn ccab v · x0 =
  catbinprodmor (pr1 (pr1 ccab v)) (pr1 ccx v))
   (identity (pr1 ab),, pr1 t)): ∑
x0 : category_binproduct A B ⟦ ab,
     make_catbinprod (pr1 ab) x ⟧,
∏ v : vertex g,
coconeIn ccab v · x0 =
catbinprodmor (pr1 (pr1 ccab v)) (pr1 ccx v)
t =
x2,,
isColimCocone_pr2_functor_subproof0 g cAB ab ccab x
  ccx x1 x2 p1

  abstract (apply subtypePath; simpl;
              [ intro f; apply impred; intro; apply homset_property
              | apply (maponpaths (λ x, dirprod_pr2 (pr1 x)) (p2 X)) ]).
Defined.


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
is_cocont (pr2_functor A B)


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
is_cocont (pr2_functor A B)

now intros c L ccL M H; apply isColimCocone_pr2_functor.
Defined.


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
gr: graph
HF: ∏ (d : diagram gr A) (c : A) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram F d) (F c)
    (mapcocone F d cc)
HG: ∏ (d : diagram gr B) (c : B) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram G d) (G c)
    (mapcocone G d cc)
∏ (d : diagram gr (category_binproduct A B))
(cd : A × B) (cc : cocone d cd),
isColimCocone d cd cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (pair_functor F G) d)
    (pair_functor F G cd)
    (mapcocone (pair_functor F G) d cc)


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
gr: graph
HF: ∏ (d : diagram gr A) (c : A) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram F d) (F c)
    (mapcocone F d cc)
HG: ∏ (d : diagram gr B) (c : B) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram G d) (G c)
    (mapcocone G d cc)
∏ (d : diagram gr (category_binproduct A B))
(cd : A × B) (cc : cocone d cd),
isColimCocone d cd cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (pair_functor F G) d)
    (pair_functor F G cd)
    (mapcocone (pair_functor F G) d cc)


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
gr: graph
HF: ∏ (d : diagram gr A) (c : A) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram F d) (F c)
    (mapcocone F d cc)
HG: ∏ (d : diagram gr B) (c : B) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram G d) (G c)
    (mapcocone G d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (category_binproduct A B)
ml: A × B
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: category_binproduct C D
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (pair_functor F G) cAB) xy
∃! x : category_binproduct C D ⟦ pair_functor F G ml,
       xy ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (pair_functor F G) cAB ccml)
  ccxy x


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
gr: graph
HF: ∏ (d : diagram gr A) (c : A) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram F d) (F c)
    (mapcocone F d cc)
HG: ∏ (d : diagram gr B) (c : B) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram G d) (G c)
    (mapcocone G d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (category_binproduct A B)
ml: A × B
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: category_binproduct C D
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (pair_functor F G) cAB) xy
cocone
  (mapdiagram F (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr1 xy)
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
gr: graph
HF: ∏ (d : diagram gr A) (c : A) 
(cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram F d) 
    (F c) (mapcocone F d cc)
HG: ∏ (d : diagram gr B) (c : B) 
(cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram G d) 
    (G c) (mapcocone G d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (category_binproduct A B)
ml: A × B
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: category_binproduct C D
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (pair_functor F G) cAB) xy
cFAX:= ?Goal: cocone
  (mapdiagram F
     (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr1 xy)
∃! x : category_binproduct C D ⟦ 
       pair_functor F G ml, xy ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (pair_functor F G) cAB ccml)
  ccxy x

xy: category_binproduct C D

  (mapdiagram F (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr1 xy)

∏ v : vertex gr,
C

A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
gr: graph
HF: ∏ (d : diagram gr A) (c : A)

→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram F d)

    (G c) (mapcocone G d cc)

Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: category_binproduct C D
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (pair_functor F G) cAB) xy
forms_cocone
  (mapdiagram F (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB)) 
  ?f

  
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
gr: graph
HF: ∏ (d : diagram gr A) (c : A) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram F d) (F c)
    (mapcocone F d cc)
HG: ∏ (d : diagram gr B) (c : B) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram G d) (G c)
    (mapcocone G d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (category_binproduct A B)
ml: A × B
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: category_binproduct C D
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (pair_functor F G) cAB) xy
∏ v : vertex gr,
C
⟦ dob
    (mapdiagram F (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB))
    v, pr1 xy ⟧
 intro n; apply (pr1 (pr1 ccxy n)).
  
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
gr: graph
HF: ∏ (d : diagram gr A) (c : A) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram F d) (F c)
    (mapcocone F d cc)
HG: ∏ (d : diagram gr B) (c : B) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram G d) (G c)
    (mapcocone G d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (category_binproduct A B)
ml: A × B
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: category_binproduct C D
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (pair_functor F G) cAB) xy
forms_cocone
  (mapdiagram F (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB))
  (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 (pr1 ccxy n))
 abstract (intros m n e; apply (maponpaths dirprod_pr1 (pr2 ccxy m n e))).

A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
gr: graph
HF: ∏ (d : diagram gr A) (c : A) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram F d) (F c)
    (mapcocone F d cc)
HG: ∏ (d : diagram gr B) (c : B) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram G d) (G c)
    (mapcocone G d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (category_binproduct A B)
ml: A × B
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: category_binproduct C D
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (pair_functor F G) cAB) xy
cFAX:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof gr cAB xy
     ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram F
     (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr1 xy)
∃! x : category_binproduct C D ⟦ pair_functor F G ml,
       xy ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (pair_functor F G) cAB ccml)
  ccxy x

gr: graph

→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram G d) (G c)
    (mapcocone G d cc)

xy: category_binproduct C D

  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof gr cAB xy

  (mapdiagram G

∃! x : category_binproduct C D ⟦ 
       pair_functor F G ml, xy ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (pair_functor F G) cAB ccml)
  ccxy x

F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D

→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram F d) (F c)

    (mapcocone G d cc)

∏ v : vertex gr,
D
⟦ dob
    (mapdiagram G (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB))
    v, pr2 xy ⟧
 intro n; apply (pr2 (pr1 ccxy n)).
  
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D

HF: ∏ (d : diagram gr A) (c : A) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram F d) (F c)
    (mapcocone F d cc)
HG: ∏ (d : diagram gr B) (c : B) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram G d) (G c)
    (mapcocone G d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (category_binproduct A B)
ml: A × B
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: category_binproduct C D
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (pair_functor F G) cAB) xy
cFAX:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof gr cAB xy
     ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram F
     (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr1 xy)
forms_cocone
  (mapdiagram G (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB))
  (λ n : vertex gr, pr2 (pr1 ccxy n))
 abstract (intros m n e; apply (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 (pr2 ccxy m n e))).

A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
gr: graph
HF: ∏ (d : diagram gr A) (c : A) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram F d) (F c)
    (mapcocone F d cc)
HG: ∏ (d : diagram gr B) (c : B) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram G d) (G c)
    (mapcocone G d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (category_binproduct A B)
ml: A × B
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: category_binproduct C D
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (pair_functor F G) cAB) xy
cFAX:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof gr cAB xy
     ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram F
     (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr1 xy)
cGBY:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr2 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof0 gr cAB
     xy ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram G
     (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr2 xy)
∃! x : category_binproduct C D ⟦ pair_functor F G ml,
       xy ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (pair_functor F G) cAB ccml)
  ccxy x


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
gr: graph
HF: ∏ (d : diagram gr A) (c : A) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram F d) (F c)
    (mapcocone F d cc)
HG: ∏ (d : diagram gr B) (c : B) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram G d) (G c)
    (mapcocone G d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (category_binproduct A B)
ml: A × B
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: category_binproduct C D
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (pair_functor F G) cAB) xy
cFAX:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof gr cAB xy
     ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram F
     (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr1 xy)
cGBY:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr2 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof0 gr cAB
     xy ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram G
     (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr2 xy)
f: C ⟦ F (ob1 ml), pr1 xy ⟧
hf1: is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone F
     (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB)
     (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccml))
  cFAX f
hf2: ∏
t : ∑ x : C ⟦ F (ob1 ml), pr1 xy ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor
      (mapcocone F
         (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB)
         (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccml))
      cFAX x, t = f,, hf1
∃! x : category_binproduct C D ⟦ pair_functor F G ml,
       xy ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (pair_functor F G) cAB ccml)
  ccxy x


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
gr: graph
HF: ∏ (d : diagram gr A) (c : A) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram F d) (F c)
    (mapcocone F d cc)
HG: ∏ (d : diagram gr B) (c : B) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram G d) (G c)
    (mapcocone G d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (category_binproduct A B)
ml: A × B
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: category_binproduct C D
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (pair_functor F G) cAB) xy
cFAX:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof gr cAB xy
     ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram F
     (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr1 xy)
cGBY:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr2 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof0 gr cAB
     xy ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram G
     (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr2 xy)
f: C ⟦ F (ob1 ml), pr1 xy ⟧
hf1: is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone F
     (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB)
     (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccml))
  cFAX f
hf2: ∏
t : ∑ x : C ⟦ F (ob1 ml), pr1 xy ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor
      (mapcocone F
         (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB)
         (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccml))
      cFAX x, t = f,, hf1
g: D ⟦ G (pr2 ml), pr2 xy ⟧
hg1: is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone G
     (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB)
     (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccml))
  cGBY g
hg2: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ G (pr2 ml), pr2 xy ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor
      (mapcocone G
         (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB)
         (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccml))
      cGBY x, t = g,, hg1
∃! x : category_binproduct C D ⟦ pair_functor F G ml,
       xy ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (mapcocone (pair_functor F G) cAB ccml)
  ccxy x


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
gr: graph
HF: ∏ (d : diagram gr A) (c : A) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram F d) (F c)
    (mapcocone F d cc)
HG: ∏ (d : diagram gr B) (c : B) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram G d) (G c)
    (mapcocone G d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (category_binproduct A B)
ml: A × B
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: category_binproduct C D
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (pair_functor F G) cAB) xy
cFAX:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof gr cAB xy
     ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram F
     (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr1 xy)
cGBY:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr2 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof0 gr cAB
     xy ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram G
     (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr2 xy)
f: C ⟦ F (ob1 ml), pr1 xy ⟧
hf1: ∏ v : vertex gr,
coconeIn
  (mapcocone F
     (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB)
     (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccml)) v
· f = coconeIn cFAX v
hf2: ∏
t : ∑ x : C ⟦ F (ob1 ml), pr1 xy ⟧,
    ∏ v : vertex gr,
    coconeIn
      (mapcocone F
         (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB)
         (mapcocone (pr1_functor A B) cAB ccml))
      v · x = coconeIn cFAX v, 
t = f,, hf1
g: D ⟦ G (pr2 ml), pr2 xy ⟧
hg1: ∏ v : vertex gr,
coconeIn
  (mapcocone G
     (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB)
     (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccml)) v
· g = coconeIn cGBY v
hg2: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ G (pr2 ml), pr2 xy ⟧,
    ∏ v : vertex gr,
    coconeIn
      (mapcocone G
         (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB)
         (mapcocone (pr2_functor A B) cAB ccml))
      v · x = coconeIn cGBY v, 
t = g,, hg1
∃! x : category_binproduct C D ⟦ pair_functor F G ml,
       xy ⟧,
∏ v : vertex gr,
coconeIn (mapcocone (pair_functor F G) cAB ccml) v · x =
coconeIn ccxy v
 
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
gr: graph
HF: ∏ (d : diagram gr A) (c : A) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram F d) (F c)
    (mapcocone F d cc)
HG: ∏ (d : diagram gr B) (c : B) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram G d) (G c)
    (mapcocone G d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (precategory_binproduct A B)
ml: A × B
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: C × D
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (pair_functor F G) cAB) xy
cFAX:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof gr cAB xy
     ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram F
     (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr1 xy)
cGBY:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr2 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof0 gr cAB
     xy ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram G
     (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr2 xy)
f: C ⟦ F (ob1 ml), pr1 xy ⟧
hf1: ∏ v : vertex gr,
# F (pr1 (coconeIn ccml v)) · f =
pr1 (pr1 ccxy v)
hf2: ∏
t : ∑ x : C ⟦ F (ob1 ml), pr1 xy ⟧,
    ∏ v : vertex gr,
    # F (pr1 (coconeIn ccml v)) · x =
    pr1 (pr1 ccxy v), t = f,, hf1
g: D ⟦ G (pr2 ml), pr2 xy ⟧
hg1: ∏ v : vertex gr,
# G (pr2 (coconeIn ccml v)) · g =
pr2 (pr1 ccxy v)
hg2: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ G (pr2 ml), pr2 xy ⟧,
    ∏ v : vertex gr,
    # G (pr2 (coconeIn ccml v)) · x =
    pr2 (pr1 ccxy v), t = g,, hg1
∃! x : precategory_binproduct_mor C D
         (make_catbinprod (F (pr1 ml)) (G (pr2 ml)))
         xy,
∏ v : vertex gr,
catbinprodmor (# F (pr1 (coconeIn ccml v)))
  (# G (pr2 (coconeIn ccml v))) · x = coconeIn ccxy v


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
gr: graph
HF: ∏ (d : diagram gr A) (c : A) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram F d) (F c)
    (mapcocone F d cc)
HG: ∏ (d : diagram gr B) (c : B) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram G d) (G c)
    (mapcocone G d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (precategory_binproduct A B)
ml: A × B
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: C × D
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (pair_functor F G) cAB) xy
cFAX:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof gr cAB xy
     ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram F
     (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr1 xy)
cGBY:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr2 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof0 gr cAB
     xy ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram G
     (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr2 xy)
f: C ⟦ F (ob1 ml), pr1 xy ⟧
hf1: ∏ v : vertex gr,
# F (pr1 (coconeIn ccml v)) · f =
pr1 (pr1 ccxy v)
hf2: ∏
t : ∑ x : C ⟦ F (ob1 ml), pr1 xy ⟧,
    ∏ v : vertex gr,
    # F (pr1 (coconeIn ccml v)) · x =
    pr1 (pr1 ccxy v), t = f,, hf1
g: D ⟦ G (pr2 ml), pr2 xy ⟧
hg1: ∏ v : vertex gr,
# G (pr2 (coconeIn ccml v)) · g =
pr2 (pr1 ccxy v)
hg2: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ G (pr2 ml), pr2 xy ⟧,
    ∏ v : vertex gr,
    # G (pr2 (coconeIn ccml v)) · x =
    pr2 (pr1 ccxy v), t = g,, hg1
∑
x : precategory_binproduct_mor C D
      (make_catbinprod (F (pr1 ml)) (G (pr2 ml))) xy,
∏ v : vertex gr,
catbinprodmor (# F (pr1 (coconeIn ccml v)))
  (# G (pr2 (coconeIn ccml v))) · x = coconeIn ccxy v
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
gr: graph
HF: ∏ (d : diagram gr A) (c : A) 
(cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram F d) 
    (F c) (mapcocone F d cc)
HG: ∏ (d : diagram gr B) (c : B) 
(cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram G d) 
    (G c) (mapcocone G d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (precategory_binproduct A B)
ml: A × B
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: C × D
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (pair_functor F G) cAB) xy
cFAX:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof gr cAB xy
     ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram F
     (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr1 xy)
cGBY:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr2 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof0 gr cAB
     xy ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram G
     (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr2 xy)
f: C ⟦ F (ob1 ml), pr1 xy ⟧
hf1: ∏ v : vertex gr,
# F (pr1 (coconeIn ccml v)) · f =
pr1 (pr1 ccxy v)
hf2: ∏
t : ∑ x : C ⟦ F (ob1 ml), pr1 xy ⟧,
    ∏ v : vertex gr,
    # F (pr1 (coconeIn ccml v)) · x =
    pr1 (pr1 ccxy v), t = f,, hf1
g: D ⟦ G (pr2 ml), pr2 xy ⟧
hg1: ∏ v : vertex gr,
# G (pr2 (coconeIn ccml v)) · g =
pr2 (pr1 ccxy v)
hg2: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ G (pr2 ml), pr2 xy ⟧,
    ∏ v : vertex gr,
    # G (pr2 (coconeIn ccml v)) · x =
    pr2 (pr1 ccxy v), t = g,, hg1
(λ cntr : ∑
          x : precategory_binproduct_mor C D
                (make_catbinprod 
                   (F (pr1 ml)) 
                   (G (pr2 ml))) xy,
          ∏ v : vertex gr,
          catbinprodmor (# F (pr1 (coconeIn ccml v)))
            (# G (pr2 (coconeIn ccml v))) · x =
          coconeIn ccxy v,
 ∏
 t : ∑
     x : precategory_binproduct_mor C D
           (make_catbinprod (F (pr1 ml)) (G (pr2 ml)))
           xy,
     ∏ v : vertex gr,
     catbinprodmor (# F (pr1 (coconeIn ccml v)))
       (# G (pr2 (coconeIn ccml v))) · x =
     coconeIn ccxy v, t = cntr) 
  ?pr1


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
gr: graph
HF: ∏ (d : diagram gr A) (c : A) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram F d) (F c)
    (mapcocone F d cc)
HG: ∏ (d : diagram gr B) (c : B) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram G d) (G c)
    (mapcocone G d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (precategory_binproduct A B)
ml: A × B
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: C × D
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (pair_functor F G) cAB) xy
cFAX:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof gr cAB xy
     ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram F
     (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr1 xy)
cGBY:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr2 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof0 gr cAB
     xy ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram G
     (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr2 xy)
f: C ⟦ F (ob1 ml), pr1 xy ⟧
hf1: ∏ v : vertex gr,
# F (pr1 (coconeIn ccml v)) · f =
pr1 (pr1 ccxy v)
hf2: ∏
t : ∑ x : C ⟦ F (ob1 ml), pr1 xy ⟧,
    ∏ v : vertex gr,
    # F (pr1 (coconeIn ccml v)) · x =
    pr1 (pr1 ccxy v), t = f,, hf1
g: D ⟦ G (pr2 ml), pr2 xy ⟧
hg1: ∏ v : vertex gr,
# G (pr2 (coconeIn ccml v)) · g =
pr2 (pr1 ccxy v)
hg2: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ G (pr2 ml), pr2 xy ⟧,
    ∏ v : vertex gr,
    # G (pr2 (coconeIn ccml v)) · x =
    pr2 (pr1 ccxy v), t = g,, hg1
∑
x : precategory_binproduct_mor C D
      (make_catbinprod (F (pr1 ml)) (G (pr2 ml))) xy,
∏ v : vertex gr,
catbinprodmor (# F (pr1 (coconeIn ccml v)))
  (# G (pr2 (coconeIn ccml v))) · x = coconeIn ccxy v
 
A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
gr: graph
HF: ∏ (d : diagram gr A) (c : A) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram F d) (F c)
    (mapcocone F d cc)
HG: ∏ (d : diagram gr B) (c : B) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram G d) (G c)
    (mapcocone G d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (precategory_binproduct A B)
ml: A × B
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: C × D
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (pair_functor F G) cAB) xy
cFAX:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof gr cAB xy
     ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram F
     (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr1 xy)
cGBY:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr2 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof0 gr cAB
     xy ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram G
     (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr2 xy)
f: C ⟦ F (ob1 ml), pr1 xy ⟧
hf1: ∏ v : vertex gr,
# F (pr1 (coconeIn ccml v)) · f =
pr1 (pr1 ccxy v)
hf2: ∏
t : ∑ x : C ⟦ F (ob1 ml), pr1 xy ⟧,
    ∏ v : vertex gr,
    # F (pr1 (coconeIn ccml v)) · x =
    pr1 (pr1 ccxy v), t = f,, hf1
g: D ⟦ G (pr2 ml), pr2 xy ⟧
hg1: ∏ v : vertex gr,
# G (pr2 (coconeIn ccml v)) · g =
pr2 (pr1 ccxy v)
hg2: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ G (pr2 ml), pr2 xy ⟧,
    ∏ v : vertex gr,
    # G (pr2 (coconeIn ccml v)) · x =
    pr2 (pr1 ccxy v), t = g,, hg1
∏ v : vertex gr,
catbinprodmor (# F (pr1 (coconeIn ccml v)))
  (# G (pr2 (coconeIn ccml v))) · (f,, g) =
coconeIn ccxy v

  abstract (intro n; unfold catbinprodmor, compose; simpl;
            now rewrite hf1, hg1).

A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
gr: graph
HF: ∏ (d : diagram gr A) (c : A) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram F d) (F c)
    (mapcocone F d cc)
HG: ∏ (d : diagram gr B) (c : B) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram G d) (G c)
    (mapcocone G d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (precategory_binproduct A B)
ml: A × B
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: C × D
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (pair_functor F G) cAB) xy
cFAX:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof gr cAB xy
     ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram F
     (mapdiagram (pr1_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr1 xy)
cGBY:= make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr2 (pr1 ccxy n))
  (isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof0 gr cAB
     xy ccxy): cocone
  (mapdiagram G
     (mapdiagram (pr2_functor A B) cAB))
  (pr2 xy)
f: C ⟦ F (ob1 ml), pr1 xy ⟧
hf1: ∏ v : vertex gr,
# F (pr1 (coconeIn ccml v)) · f =
pr1 (pr1 ccxy v)
hf2: ∏
t : ∑ x : C ⟦ F (ob1 ml), pr1 xy ⟧,
    ∏ v : vertex gr,
    # F (pr1 (coconeIn ccml v)) · x =
    pr1 (pr1 ccxy v), t = f,, hf1
g: D ⟦ G (pr2 ml), pr2 xy ⟧
hg1: ∏ v : vertex gr,
# G (pr2 (coconeIn ccml v)) · g =
pr2 (pr1 ccxy v)
hg2: ∏
t : ∑ x : D ⟦ G (pr2 ml), pr2 xy ⟧,
    ∏ v : vertex gr,
    # G (pr2 (coconeIn ccml v)) · x =
    pr2 (pr1 ccxy v), t = g,, hg1
(λ cntr : ∑
          x : precategory_binproduct_mor C D
                (make_catbinprod (F (pr1 ml))
                   (G (pr2 ml))) xy,
          ∏ v : vertex gr,
          catbinprodmor (# F (pr1 (coconeIn ccml v)))
            (# G (pr2 (coconeIn ccml v))) · x =
          coconeIn ccxy v,
 ∏
 t : ∑
     x : precategory_binproduct_mor C D
           (make_catbinprod (F (pr1 ml)) (G (pr2 ml)))
           xy,
     ∏ v : vertex gr,
     catbinprodmor (# F (pr1 (coconeIn ccml v)))
       (# G (pr2 (coconeIn ccml v))) · x =
     coconeIn ccxy v, t = cntr)
  ((f,, g),,
   isColimCocone_pair_functor_subproof1 gr cAB ml ccml
     xy ccxy f hf1 g hg1)
 abstract (intro t; apply subtypePath; simpl;
             [ intro x; apply impred; intro; apply isaset_dirprod; apply homset_property
             | induction t as [[f1 f2] p]; simpl in *; apply pathsdirprod;
               [ apply (maponpaths pr1 (hf2 (f1,, (λ n, maponpaths pr1 (p n)))))
               | apply (maponpaths pr1 (hg2 (f2,, (λ n, maponpaths dirprod_pr2 (p n)))))]]).
Defined.


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
HF: is_cocont F
HG: is_cocont G
is_cocont (pair_functor F G)


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
HF: is_cocont F
HG: is_cocont G
is_cocont (pair_functor F G)


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
HF: is_cocont F
HG: is_cocont G
gr: graph
cAB: diagram gr (category_binproduct A B)
ml: category_binproduct A B
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
isColimCocone (mapdiagram (pair_functor F G) cAB)
  (pair_functor F G ml)
  (mapcocone (pair_functor F G) cAB ccml)

now apply isColimCocone_pair_functor; [apply HF|apply HG|].
Defined.


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont (pair_functor F G)


A, B, C, D: category
F: A ⟶ C
G: B ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont (pair_functor F G)

now intros cAB ml ccml Hccml; apply isColimCocone_pair_functor.
Defined.

End pair_functor.

(** ** A functor F : A -> product_category I B is (omega-)cocontinuous if each F_i : A -> B_i is *)
Section functor_into_product_category.
(* NOTE: section below on [power_category] may be easily(?) generalised to [product_category]. *)
(* NOTE: binary analogue for this section. *)

Context {I : UU} {A : category} {B : I -> category}.

(* A cocone in the [product_category] is a colimit cocone if each of its components is.

Cf. the converse [isColimCocone_functor_into_power] below (currently only for special case of power,
not product), which seems to require some additional assumption (e.g. decidable equality on [I];
perhaps other conditions might also suffice. *)
(* NOTE: other lemmas in below on cocones in [power_category] may be able to be simplified using this. *)

I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_category B)
b: product_precategory B
cc: cocone c b
M: ∏ i : I,
isColimCocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I B i) c)
  (pr_functor I B i b)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I B i) c cc)
isColimCocone c b cc


I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_category B)
b: product_precategory B
cc: cocone c b
M: ∏ i : I,
isColimCocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I B i) c)
  (pr_functor I B i b)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I B i) c cc)
isColimCocone c b cc

  
I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_category B)
b: product_precategory B
cc: cocone c b
M: ∏ i : I,
isColimCocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I B i) c)
  (pr_functor I B i b)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I B i) c cc)
b': product_category B
cc': cocone c b'
∃! x : product_category B ⟦ b, b' ⟧,
is_cocone_mor cc cc' x

  
I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_category B)
b: product_precategory B
cc: cocone c b
M: ∏ i : I,
isColimCocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I B i) c)
  (pr_functor I B i b)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I B i) c cc)
b': product_category B
cc': cocone c b'
isaprop
  (∑ x : product_category B ⟦ b, b' ⟧,
   is_cocone_mor cc cc' x)
I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_category B)
b: product_precategory B
cc: cocone c b
M: ∏ i : I,
isColimCocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I B i) c)
  (pr_functor I B i b)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I B i) c cc)
b': product_category B
cc': cocone c b'
∑ x : product_category B ⟦ b, b' ⟧,
is_cocone_mor cc cc' x

  
I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_category B)
b: product_precategory B
cc: cocone c b
M: ∏ i : I,
isColimCocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I B i) c)
  (pr_functor I B i b)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I B i) c cc)
b': product_category B
cc': cocone c b'
isaprop
  (∑ x : product_category B ⟦ b, b' ⟧,
   is_cocone_mor cc cc' x)
 abstract (
    apply invproofirrelevance; intros f1 f2;
    apply subtypePath;
    [ intros f; apply impred_isaprop; intros v;
      apply has_homsets_product_precategory | ];
    apply funextsec; intros i;
    assert (MM := M i _ (mapcocone (pr_functor I B i) _ cc'));
    assert (H := proofirrelevancecontr MM);
    use (maponpaths pr1 (H (pr1 f1 i,,_) (pr1 f2 i,,_)));
      clear MM H; intros v ;
      [ exact (toforallpaths _ _ _ (pr2 f1 v) i) |
        exact (toforallpaths _ _ _ (pr2 f2 v) i) ]
      ) .
  
I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_category B)
b: product_precategory B
cc: cocone c b
M: ∏ i : I,
isColimCocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I B i) c)
  (pr_functor I B i b)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I B i) c cc)
b': product_category B
cc': cocone c b'
∑ x : product_category B ⟦ b, b' ⟧,
is_cocone_mor cc cc' x
 
I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_category B)
b: product_precategory B
cc: cocone c b
M: ∏ i : I,
isColimCocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I B i) c)
  (pr_functor I B i b)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I B i) c cc)
b': product_category B
cc': cocone c b'
product_category B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_category B)
b: product_precategory B
cc: cocone c b
M: ∏ i : I,
isColimCocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I B i) c)
  (pr_functor I B i b)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I B i) c cc)
b': product_category B
cc': cocone c b'
(λ x : product_category B ⟦ b, b' ⟧,
 is_cocone_mor cc cc' x) ?pr1

    
I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_category B)
b: product_precategory B
cc: cocone c b
M: ∏ i : I,
isColimCocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I B i) c)
  (pr_functor I B i b)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I B i) c cc)
b': product_category B
cc': cocone c b'
product_category B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
 
I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_category B)
b: product_precategory B
cc: cocone c b
M: ∏ i : I,
isColimCocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I B i) c)
  (pr_functor I B i b)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I B i) c cc)
b': product_category B
cc': cocone c b'
i: I
B i ⟦ b i, b' i ⟧

      use (pr1 (pr1 (M i _ (mapcocone (pr_functor I B i) _ cc')))).
    
I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_category B)
b: product_precategory B
cc: cocone c b
M: ∏ i : I,
isColimCocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I B i) c)
  (pr_functor I B i b)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I B i) c cc)
b': product_category B
cc': cocone c b'
(λ x : product_category B ⟦ b, b' ⟧,
 is_cocone_mor cc cc' x)
  ((λ i : I,
    pr1
      (pr1
         (M i (pr_functor I B i b')
            (mapcocone (pr_functor I B i) c cc'))))
   :
   product_category B ⟦ b, b' ⟧)
 abstract (
          intros v; apply funextsec; intros i;
          use (pr2 (pr1 (M i _ (mapcocone (pr_functor I B i) _ cc'))) v)
        ).
Defined.


I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
F: A ⟶ product_category B
HF: ∏ i : I, is_cocont (F ∙ pr_functor I B i)
is_cocont F


I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
F: A ⟶ product_category B
HF: ∏ i : I, is_cocont (F ∙ pr_functor I B i)
is_cocont F

  
I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
F: A ⟶ product_category B
HF: ∏ i : I, is_cocont (F ∙ pr_functor I B i)
gr: graph
cA: diagram gr A
a: A
cc: cocone cA a
Hcc: isColimCocone cA a cc
isColimCocone (mapdiagram F cA) (F a)
  (mapcocone F cA cc)

  
I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
F: A ⟶ product_category B
HF: ∏ i : I, is_cocont (F ∙ pr_functor I B i)
gr: graph
cA: diagram gr A
a: A
cc: cocone cA a
Hcc: isColimCocone cA a cc
∏ i : I,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (pr_functor I B i) (mapdiagram F cA))
  (pr_functor I B i (F a))
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I B i) (mapdiagram F cA)
     (mapcocone F cA cc))

  
I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
F: A ⟶ product_category B
HF: ∏ i : I, is_cocont (F ∙ pr_functor I B i)
gr: graph
cA: diagram gr A
a: A
cc: cocone cA a
Hcc: isColimCocone cA a cc
i: I
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (pr_functor I B i) (mapdiagram F cA))
  (pr_functor I B i (F a))
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I B i) (mapdiagram F cA)
     (mapcocone F cA cc))

  
I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
F: A ⟶ product_category B
HF: ∏ i : I, is_cocont (F ∙ pr_functor I B i)
gr: graph
cA: diagram gr A
a: A
cc: cocone cA a
Hcc: isColimCocone cA a cc
i: I
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (pr_functor I B i) (mapdiagram F cA))
  (pr_functor I B i (F a))
  (mapcocone (F ∙ pr_functor I B i) cA cc)

  now apply HF, Hcc.
Defined.


I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
F: A ⟶ product_category B
HF: ∏ i : I, is_omega_cocont (F ∙ pr_functor I B i)
is_omega_cocont F


I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
F: A ⟶ product_category B
HF: ∏ i : I, is_omega_cocont (F ∙ pr_functor I B i)
is_omega_cocont F

  
I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
F: A ⟶ product_category B
HF: ∏ i : I, is_omega_cocont (F ∙ pr_functor I B i)
cA: chain A
a: A
cc: cocone cA a
Hcc: isColimCocone cA a cc
isColimCocone (mapdiagram F cA) (F a)
  (mapcocone F cA cc)

  
I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
F: A ⟶ product_category B
HF: ∏ i : I, is_omega_cocont (F ∙ pr_functor I B i)
cA: chain A
a: A
cc: cocone cA a
Hcc: isColimCocone cA a cc
∏ i : I,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (pr_functor I B i) (mapdiagram F cA))
  (pr_functor I B i (F a))
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I B i) (mapdiagram F cA)
     (mapcocone F cA cc))

  
I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
F: A ⟶ product_category B
HF: ∏ i : I, is_omega_cocont (F ∙ pr_functor I B i)
cA: chain A
a: A
cc: cocone cA a
Hcc: isColimCocone cA a cc
i: I
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (pr_functor I B i) (mapdiagram F cA))
  (pr_functor I B i (F a))
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I B i) (mapdiagram F cA)
     (mapcocone F cA cc))

  
I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
F: A ⟶ product_category B
HF: ∏ i : I, is_omega_cocont (F ∙ pr_functor I B i)
cA: chain A
a: A
cc: cocone cA a
Hcc: isColimCocone cA a cc
i: I
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (pr_functor I B i) (mapdiagram F cA))
  (pr_functor I B i (F a))
  (mapcocone (F ∙ pr_functor I B i) cA cc)

  now apply HF, Hcc.
Defined.

End functor_into_product_category.

Section tuple_functor.

Context {I : UU} {A : category} {B : I -> category}.


I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
F: ∏ i : I, A ⟶ B i
HF: ∏ i : I, is_cocont (F i)
is_cocont (tuple_functor F)


I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
F: ∏ i : I, A ⟶ B i
HF: ∏ i : I, is_cocont (F i)
is_cocont (tuple_functor F)

  
I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
F: ∏ i : I, A ⟶ B i
HF: ∏ i : I, is_cocont (F i)
∏ i : I,
is_cocont (tuple_functor F ∙ pr_functor I B i)

  intro i; rewrite pr_tuple_functor; apply HF.
Defined.


I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
F: ∏ i : I, A ⟶ B i
HF: ∏ i : I, is_omega_cocont (F i)
is_omega_cocont (tuple_functor F)


I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
F: ∏ i : I, A ⟶ B i
HF: ∏ i : I, is_omega_cocont (F i)
is_omega_cocont (tuple_functor F)

  
I: UU
A: category
B: I → category
F: ∏ i : I, A ⟶ B i
HF: ∏ i : I, is_omega_cocont (F i)
∏ i : I,
is_omega_cocont (tuple_functor F ∙ pr_functor I B i)

  intro i; rewrite pr_tuple_functor; apply HF.
Defined.

End tuple_functor.

(** ** A family of functor F^I : A^I -> B^I is omega cocontinuous if each F_i is *)
(** TODO: split out section [pr_functor], and then factor results on [family_functor] using that
together with [tuple_functor] (maybe after redefining [family_functor] using [tuple_functor]. *)
Section family_functor.

Context {I : UU} {A B : category}.

(* The index set I needs decidable equality for pr_functor to be cocont *)
Hypothesis (HI : isdeceq I).

Local Definition ifI (i j : I) (a b : A) : A :=
  coprod_rect (λ _, A) (λ _,a) (λ _,b) (HI i j).


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
i: I
x, y: A
ifI i i x y = x


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
i: I
x, y: A
ifI i i x y = x

now unfold ifI; destruct (HI i i) as [p|p]; [|destruct (p (idpath _))].
Defined.


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (power_category I A)
L: power_category I A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
∏ i : I,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c)
  (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i L)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL)


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (power_category I A)
L: power_category I A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
∏ i : I,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c)
  (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i L)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL)


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
∃! x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL) ccx
  x0


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
HHH:= ?Goal: cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
∃! x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL) ccx
  x0


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
 
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
cocone c
  (λ j : I,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) (HI i j))

  
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
∏ v : vertex g,
product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
λ j : I,
coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
  (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) (HI i j) ⟧
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
forms_cocone c ?f

  
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
∏ v : vertex g,
product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
λ j : I,
coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
  (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) (HI i j) ⟧
 
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
n: vertex g
j: I
A ⟦ dob c n j,
coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
  (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) (HI i j) ⟧

    
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
n: vertex g
j: I
p: i = j
A ⟦ dob c n j,
coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
  (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) (inl p) ⟧
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
n: vertex g
j: I
p: i != j
A ⟦ dob c n j,
coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
  (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) (inr p) ⟧

    
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
n: vertex g
j: I
p: i = j
A ⟦ dob c n j,
coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
  (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) (inl p) ⟧
 apply (transportf (λ i, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧) p (coconeIn ccx n)).
    
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
n: vertex g
j: I
p: i != j
A ⟦ dob c n j,
coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
  (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) (inr p) ⟧
 apply (# (pr_functor I (λ _, A) j) (coconeIn ccL n)).
  
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
forms_cocone c
  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0
      return
        (A ⟦ dob c n j,
         coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
           (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧) p0
           (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>
        (λ _ : i != j,
         # (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) j)
           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0
    end)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
   λ j : I,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) (HI i j) ⟧)
 abstract (simpl; intros m n e;
      apply funextsec; intro j; unfold compose; simpl;
      destruct (HI i j);
        [ destruct p; apply (pr2 ccx m n e)
        | apply (toforallpaths _ _ _ (pr2 ccL m n e) j)]).

I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0
      return
        (A ⟦ dob c n j,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
           (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
           c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧)
           p0 (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>
        (λ _ : i != j,
         # (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) j)
           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0
    end)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
   λ j : I,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
     (HI i j) ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof g c L ccL i
     x ccx)
:
cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j)): cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
∃! x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL) ccx
  x0


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0
      return
        (A ⟦ dob c n j,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
           (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
           c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧)
           p0 (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>
        (λ _ : i != j,
         # (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) j)
           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0
    end)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
   λ j : I,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
     (HI i j) ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof g c L ccL i
     x ccx)
:
cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j)): cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
x1: product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x1
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x0, t = x1,, p1
∃! x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL) ccx
  x0


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0
      return
        (A ⟦ dob c n j,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
           (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
           c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧)
           p0 (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>
        (λ _ : i != j,
         # (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) j)
           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0
    end)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
   λ j : I,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
     (HI i j) ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof g c L ccL i
     x ccx)
:
cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j)): cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
x1: product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x1
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x0, t = x1,, p1
∑ x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL) ccx
  x0
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0
      return
        (A ⟦ dob c n j,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
           (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
           c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧)
           p0 (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>
        (λ _ : i != j,
         # (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) j)
           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0
    end)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
   λ j : I,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
     (HI i j) ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof g c L ccL i
     x ccx)
:
cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j)): cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
x1: product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x1
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x0, t = x1,, p1
(λ cntr : ∑ x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor
            (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c
               ccL) ccx x0,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor
       (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL)
       ccx x0, t = cntr) ?pr1


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0
      return
        (A ⟦ dob c n j,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
           (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
           c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧)
           p0 (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>
        (λ _ : i != j,
         # (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) j)
           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0
    end)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
   λ j : I,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
     (HI i j) ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof g c L ccL i
     x ccx)
:
cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j)): cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
x1: product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x1
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x0, t = x1,, p1
∑ x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL) ccx
  x0
 
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0
      return
        (A ⟦ dob c n j,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
           (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
           c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧)
           p0 (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>
        (λ _ : i != j,
         # (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) j)
           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0
    end)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
   λ j : I,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
     (HI i j) ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof g c L ccL i
     x ccx)
:
cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j)): cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
x1: product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x1
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x0, t = x1,, p1
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL) ccx
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (L i))
     (ifI_eq i x (L i)) (x1 i))

  abstract (intro n;
    rewrite <- idtoiso_postcompose, assoc;
    eapply pathscomp0;
      [eapply cancel_postcomposition, (toforallpaths _ _ _ (p1 n) i)|];
    unfold ifI, ifI_eq; simpl;
    destruct (HI i i); [|destruct (n0 (idpath _))];
    rewrite idtoiso_postcompose, idpath_transportf;
    assert (hp : p = idpath i); [apply (isasetifdeceq _ HI)|];
    now rewrite hp, idpath_transportf).

I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0
      return
        (A ⟦ dob c n j,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
           (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
           c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧)
           p0 (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>
        (λ _ : i != j,
         # (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) j)
           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0
    end)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
   λ j : I,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
     (HI i j) ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof g c L ccL i
     x ccx)
:
cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j)): cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
x1: product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x1
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x0, t = x1,, p1
(λ cntr : ∑ x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor
            (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c
               ccL) ccx x0,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor
       (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL)
       ccx x0, t = cntr)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (L i))
     (ifI_eq i x (L i)) (x1 i),,
   isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof0 g c L ccL i x
     ccx x1 p1)
 
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0
      return
        (A ⟦ dob c n j,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
           (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
           c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧)
           p0 (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>
        (λ _ : i != j,
         # (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) j)
           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0
    end)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
   λ j : I,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
     (HI i j) ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof g c L ccL i
     x ccx)
:
cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j)): cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
x1: product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x1
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x0, t = x1,, p1
t: ∑ x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL)
  ccx x0
t =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (L i))
  (ifI_eq i x (L i)) (x1 i),,
isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof0 g c L ccL i x ccx
  x1 p1

  
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0
      return
        (A ⟦ dob c n j,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
           (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
           c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧)
           p0 (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>
        (λ _ : i != j,
         # (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) j)
           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0
    end)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
   λ j : I,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
     (HI i j) ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof g c L ccL i
     x ccx)
:
cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j)): cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
x1: product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x1
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x0, t = x1,, p1
t: ∑ x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL)
  ccx x0
∑
x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
     λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
∏ n : vertex g, coconeIn ccL n · x0 = coconeIn HHH n
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0
      return
        (A ⟦ dob c n j,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
           (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
           c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧)
           p0 (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>
        (λ _ : i != j,
         # (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) j)
           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0
    end)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
   λ j : I,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
     (HI i j) ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof g c L ccL i
     x ccx)
:
cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j)): cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
x1: product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x1
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x0, t = x1,, p1
t: ∑ x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL)
  ccx x0
X:= ?Goal: ∑
x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
     λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
∏ n : vertex g,
coconeIn ccL n · x0 = coconeIn HHH n
t =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (L i))
  (ifI_eq i x (L i)) (x1 i),,
isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof0 g c L ccL i x ccx
  x1 p1

A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0
      return
        (A ⟦ dob c n j,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
           (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
           c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧)
           p0 (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>
        (λ _ : i != j,
         # (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) j)
           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0
    end)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
   λ j : I,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
     (HI i j) ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof g c L ccL i
     x ccx)
:
cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j)): cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))

λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x1
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,

    is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x0, t = x1,, p1

         coprod_rect

    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0

         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)

           c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧)
           p0 (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>

           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0

   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,

   λ j : I,

     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
     (HI i j) ⟧)

     x ccx)

  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0

         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
           (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
           c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧)
           p0 (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>
        (λ _ : i != j,
         # (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) j)
           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0

   :

   λ j : I,

     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
     (HI i j) ⟧)

  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in

      d as c0

         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)

A ⟦ L j,
coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
  (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) (inl p) ⟧
 apply (transportf (λ i, A ⟦ L i, x ⟧) p (pr1 t)).

    | inl p =>

    | inr n0 =>
