cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j)): cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
x1: product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x1
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x0, t = x1,, p1
t: ∑ x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL)
  ccx x0
j: I
n: i != j
A ⟦ L j,
coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
  (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) (inr n) ⟧
 apply identity.
    
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0
      return
        (A ⟦ dob c n j,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
           (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
           c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧)
           p0 (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>
        (λ _ : i != j,
         # (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) j)
           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0
    end)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
   λ j : I,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
     (HI i j) ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof g c L ccL i
     x ccx)
:
cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j)): cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
x1: product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x1
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x0, t = x1,, p1
t: ∑ x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL)
  ccx x0
(λ x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
        λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
 ∏ n : vertex g, coconeIn ccL n · x0 = coconeIn HHH n)
  ((λ j : I,
    (let d := HI i j in
     match
       d as c
       return
         (A ⟦ L j,
          coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
            (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) c ⟧)
     with
     | inl p =>
         (λ p0 : i = j,
          transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ L i, x ⟧) p0
            (pr1 t)) p
     | inr n =>
         (λ n0 : i != j,
          identity
            (coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
               (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
               (inr n0))) n
     end)
    :
    A ⟦ L j, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧)
   :
   product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
   λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧)
 
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0
      return
        (A ⟦ dob c n j,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
           (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
           c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧)
           p0 (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>
        (λ _ : i != j,
         # (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) j)
           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0
    end)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
   λ j : I,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
     (HI i j) ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof g c L ccL i
     x ccx)
:
cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j)): cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
x1: product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x1
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x0, t = x1,, p1
t: ∑ x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL)
  ccx x0
∏ n : vertex g,
(λ i0 : I,
 coconeIn ccL n i0
 · match
     HI i i0 as c
     return
       (A ⟦ L i0,
        coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = i0) ⨿ (i != i0), A)
          (λ _ : i = i0, x) (λ _ : i != i0, L i0) c ⟧)
   with
   | inl p =>
       transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ L i, x ⟧) p (pr1 t)
   | inr _ => identity (L i0)
   end) =
(λ j : I,
 match
   HI i j as c0
   return
     (A ⟦ dob c n j,
      coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
        (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) c0 ⟧)
 with
 | inl p =>
     transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧) p
       (coconeIn ccx n)
 | inr _ => coconeIn ccL n j
 end)
 abstract (intro n; apply funextsec; intro j; unfold ifI; destruct (HI i j);
          [ now destruct p; rewrite <- (pr2 t), !idpath_transportf
          | apply id_right ]).
  
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0
      return
        (A ⟦ dob c n j,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
           (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
           c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧)
           p0 (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>
        (λ _ : i != j,
         # (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) j)
           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0
    end)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
   λ j : I,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
     (HI i j) ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof g c L ccL i
     x ccx)
:
cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j)): cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
x1: product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x1
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x0, t = x1,, p1
t: ∑ x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL)
  ccx x0
X:= ((λ j : I,
  (let d := HI i j in
   match
     d as c
     return
       (A ⟦ L j,
        coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
          (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) c ⟧)
   with
   | inl p =>
       (λ p0 : i = j,
        transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ L i, x ⟧) p0
          (pr1 t)) p
   | inr n =>
       (λ n0 : i != j,
        identity
          (coprod_rect
             (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
             (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
             (inr n0))) n
   end)
  :
  A ⟦ L j, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧)
 :
 product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
 λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧),,
(isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof1 g c L ccL i x
   ccx t
 :
 (λ x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
  ∏ n : vertex g,
  coconeIn ccL n · x0 = coconeIn HHH n)
   ((λ j : I,
     (let d := HI i j in
      match
        d as c
        return
          (A ⟦ L j,
           coprod_rect
             (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
             (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) c
           ⟧)
      with
      | inl p =>
          (λ p0 : i = j,
           transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ L i, x ⟧) p0
             (pr1 t)) p
      | inr n =>
          (λ n0 : i != j,
           identity
             (coprod_rect
                (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
                (λ _ : i = j, x)
                (λ _ : i != j, L j) (inr n0))) n
      end)
     :
     A ⟦ L j, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧)
    :
    product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
    λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧)): ∑
x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
     λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
∏ n : vertex g,
coconeIn ccL n · x0 = coconeIn HHH n
t =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (L i))
  (ifI_eq i x (L i)) (x1 i),,
isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof0 g c L ccL i x ccx
  x1 p1

  
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0
      return
        (A ⟦ dob c n j,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
           (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
           c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧)
           p0 (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>
        (λ _ : i != j,
         # (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) j)
           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0
    end)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
   λ j : I,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
     (HI i j) ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof g c L ccL i
     x ccx)
:
cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j)): cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
x1: product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x1
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x0, t = x1,, p1
t: ∑ x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL)
  ccx x0
X:= ((λ j : I,
  (let d := HI i j in
   match
     d as c
     return
       (A ⟦ L j,
        coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
          (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) c ⟧)
   with
   | inl p =>
       (λ p0 : i = j,
        transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ L i, x ⟧) p0
          (pr1 t)) p
   | inr n =>
       (λ n0 : i != j,
        identity
          (coprod_rect
             (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
             (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
             (inr n0))) n
   end)
  :
  A ⟦ L j, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧)
 :
 product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
 λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧),,
(isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof1 g c L ccL i x
   ccx t
 :
 (λ x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
  ∏ n : vertex g,
  coconeIn ccL n · x0 = coconeIn HHH n)
   ((λ j : I,
     (let d := HI i j in
      match
        d as c
        return
          (A ⟦ L j,
           coprod_rect
             (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
             (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) c
           ⟧)
      with
      | inl p =>
          (λ p0 : i = j,
           transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ L i, x ⟧) p0
             (pr1 t)) p
      | inr n =>
          (λ n0 : i != j,
           identity
             (coprod_rect
                (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
                (λ _ : i = j, x)
                (λ _ : i != j, L j) (inr n0))) n
      end)
     :
     A ⟦ L j, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧)
    :
    product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
    λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧)): ∑
x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
     λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
∏ n : vertex g,
coconeIn ccL n · x0 = coconeIn HHH n
pr1 t =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (L i))
  (ifI_eq i x (L i)) (x1 i)

  
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0
      return
        (A ⟦ dob c n j,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
           (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
           c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧)
           p0 (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>
        (λ _ : i != j,
         # (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) j)
           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0
    end)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
   λ j : I,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
     (HI i j) ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof g c L ccL i
     x ccx)
:
cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j)): cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
x1: product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x1
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x0, t = x1,, p1
t: ∑ x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL)
  ccx x0
X:= ((λ j : I,
  (let d := HI i j in
   match
     d as c
     return
       (A ⟦ L j,
        coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
          (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) c ⟧)
   with
   | inl p =>
       (λ p0 : i = j,
        transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ L i, x ⟧) p0
          (pr1 t)) p
   | inr n =>
       (λ n0 : i != j,
        identity
          (coprod_rect
             (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
             (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
             (inr n0))) n
   end)
  :
  A ⟦ L j, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧)
 :
 product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
 λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧),,
(isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof1 g c L ccL i x
   ccx t
 :
 (λ x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
  ∏ n : vertex g,
  coconeIn ccL n · x0 = coconeIn HHH n)
   ((λ j : I,
     (let d := HI i j in
      match
        d as c
        return
          (A ⟦ L j,
           coprod_rect
             (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
             (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) c
           ⟧)
      with
      | inl p =>
          (λ p0 : i = j,
           transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ L i, x ⟧) p0
             (pr1 t)) p
      | inr n =>
          (λ n0 : i != j,
           identity
             (coprod_rect
                (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
                (λ _ : i = j, x)
                (λ _ : i != j, L j) (inr n0))) n
      end)
     :
     A ⟦ L j, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧)
    :
    product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
    λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧)): ∑
x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
     λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
∏ n : vertex g,
coconeIn ccL n · x0 = coconeIn HHH n
H:= toforallpaths
  (λ i0 : I, A ⟦ L i0, ifI i i0 x (L i0) ⟧)
  (λ j : I,
   match
     HI i j as c
     return
       (A ⟦ L j,
        coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
          (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) c ⟧)
   with
   | inl p =>
       transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ L i, x ⟧) p (pr1 t)
   | inr _ => identity (L j)
   end) x1 (maponpaths pr1 (p2 X)) i: match
  HI i i as c
  return
    (A ⟦ L i,
     coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = i) ⨿ (i != i), A)
       (λ _ : i = i, x) (λ _ : i != i, L i) c ⟧)
with
| inl p =>
    transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ L i, x ⟧) p (pr1 t)
| inr _ => identity (L i)
end = x1 i
pr1 t =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (L i))
  (ifI_eq i x (L i)) (x1 i)

  
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0
      return
        (A ⟦ dob c n j,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
           (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
           c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧)
           p0 (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>
        (λ _ : i != j,
         # (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) j)
           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0
    end)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
   λ j : I,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
     (HI i j) ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof g c L ccL i
     x ccx)
:
cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j)): cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
x1: product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x1
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x0, t = x1,, p1
t: ∑ x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL)
  ccx x0
X:= ((λ j : I,
  (let d := HI i j in
   match
     d as c
     return
       (A ⟦ L j,
        coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
          (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) c ⟧)
   with
   | inl p =>
       (λ p0 : i = j,
        transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ L i, x ⟧) p0
          (pr1 t)) p
   | inr n =>
       (λ n0 : i != j,
        identity
          (coprod_rect
             (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
             (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
             (inr n0))) n
   end)
  :
  A ⟦ L j, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧)
 :
 product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
 λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧),,
(isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof1 g c L ccL i x
   ccx t
 :
 (λ x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
  ∏ n : vertex g,
  coconeIn ccL n · x0 = coconeIn HHH n)
   ((λ j : I,
     (let d := HI i j in
      match
        d as c
        return
          (A ⟦ L j,
           coprod_rect
             (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
             (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) c
           ⟧)
      with
      | inl p =>
          (λ p0 : i = j,
           transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ L i, x ⟧) p0
             (pr1 t)) p
      | inr n =>
          (λ n0 : i != j,
           identity
             (coprod_rect
                (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
                (λ _ : i = j, x)
                (λ _ : i != j, L j) (inr n0))) n
      end)
     :
     A ⟦ L j, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧)
    :
    product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
    λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧)): ∑
x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
     λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
∏ n : vertex g,
coconeIn ccL n · x0 = coconeIn HHH n
pr1 t =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (L i))
  match
    HI i i as c
    return
      (coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = i) ⨿ (i != i), A)
         (λ _ : i = i, x) (λ _ : i != i, L i) c = x)
  with
  | inl _ => idpath x
  | inr n =>
      match
        n (idpath i)
        return
          (coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = i) ⨿ (i != i), A)
             (λ _ : i = i, x) (λ _ : i != i, L i)
             (inr n) = x)
      with
      end
  end
  match
    HI i i as c
    return
      (A ⟦ L i,
       coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = i) ⨿ (i != i), A)
         (λ _ : i = i, x) (λ _ : i != i, L i) c ⟧)
  with
  | inl p =>
      transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ L i, x ⟧) p (pr1 t)
  | inr _ => identity (L i)
  end

  
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0
      return
        (A ⟦ dob c n j,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
           (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
           c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧)
           p0 (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>
        (λ _ : i != j,
         # (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) j)
           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0
    end)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
   λ j : I,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
     (HI i j) ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof g c L ccL i
     x ccx)
:
cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j)): cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
x1: product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x1
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x0, t = x1,, p1
t: ∑ x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL)
  ccx x0
X:= ((λ j : I,
  (let d := HI i j in
   match
     d as c
     return
       (A ⟦ L j,
        coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
          (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) c ⟧)
   with
   | inl p =>
       (λ p0 : i = j,
        transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ L i, x ⟧) p0
          (pr1 t)) p
   | inr n =>
       (λ n0 : i != j,
        identity
          (coprod_rect
             (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
             (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
             (inr n0))) n
   end)
  :
  A ⟦ L j, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧)
 :
 product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
 λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧),,
(isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof1 g c L ccL i x
   ccx t
 :
 (λ x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
  ∏ n : vertex g,
  coconeIn ccL n · x0 = coconeIn HHH n)
   ((λ j : I,
     (let d := HI i j in
      match
        d as c
        return
          (A ⟦ L j,
           coprod_rect
             (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
             (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) c
           ⟧)
      with
      | inl p =>
          (λ p0 : i = j,
           transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ L i, x ⟧) p0
             (pr1 t)) p
      | inr n =>
          (λ n0 : i != j,
           identity
             (coprod_rect
                (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
                (λ _ : i = j, x)
                (λ _ : i != j, L j) (inr n0))) n
      end)
     :
     A ⟦ L j, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧)
    :
    product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
    λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧)): ∑
x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
     λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
∏ n : vertex g,
coconeIn ccL n · x0 = coconeIn HHH n
p: i = i
pr1 t =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (L i)) (idpath x)
  (transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ L i, x ⟧) p (pr1 t))

  
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
g: graph
c: diagram g (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
L: I → A
ccL: cocone c L
M: isColimCocone c L ccL
i: I
x: A
ccx: cocone (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c) x
HHH:= make_cocone
  ((λ (n : vertex g) (j : I),
    let d := HI i j in
    match
      d as c0
      return
        (A ⟦ dob c n j,
         coprod_rect
           (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
           (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
           c0 ⟧)
    with
    | inl p =>
        (λ p0 : i = j,
         transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ dob c n i, x ⟧)
           p0 (coconeIn ccx n)) p
    | inr n0 =>
        (λ _ : i != j,
         # (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) j)
           (coconeIn ccL n)) n0
    end)
   :
   ∏ v : vertex g,
   product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ dob c v,
   λ j : I,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
     (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
     (HI i j) ⟧)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof g c L ccL i
     x ccx)
:
cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j)): cocone c (λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j))
x1: product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧
p1: is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x1
p2: ∏
t : ∑
    x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
    is_cocone_mor ccL HHH x0, t = x1,, p1
t: ∑ x0 : A ⟦ L i, x ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) c ccL)
  ccx x0
X:= ((λ j : I,
  (let d := HI i j in
   match
     d as c
     return
       (A ⟦ L j,
        coprod_rect (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
          (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) c ⟧)
   with
   | inl p =>
       (λ p0 : i = j,
        transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ L i, x ⟧) p0
          (pr1 t)) p
   | inr n =>
       (λ n0 : i != j,
        identity
          (coprod_rect
             (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
             (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j)
             (inr n0))) n
   end)
  :
  A ⟦ L j, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧)
 :
 product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
 λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧),,
(isColimCocone_pr_functor_subproof1 g c L ccL i x
   ccx t
 :
 (λ x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
         λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
  ∏ n : vertex g,
  coconeIn ccL n · x0 = coconeIn HHH n)
   ((λ j : I,
     (let d := HI i j in
      match
        d as c
        return
          (A ⟦ L j,
           coprod_rect
             (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
             (λ _ : i = j, x) (λ _ : i != j, L j) c
           ⟧)
      with
      | inl p =>
          (λ p0 : i = j,
           transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ L i, x ⟧) p0
             (pr1 t)) p
      | inr n =>
          (λ n0 : i != j,
           identity
             (coprod_rect
                (λ _ : (i = j) ⨿ (i != j), A)
                (λ _ : i = j, x)
                (λ _ : i != j, L j) (inr n0))) n
      end)
     :
     A ⟦ L j, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧)
    :
    product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
    λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧)): ∑
x0 : product_precategory (λ _ : I, A) ⟦ L,
     λ j : I, ifI i j x (L j) ⟧,
∏ n : vertex g,
coconeIn ccL n · x0 = coconeIn HHH n
p: i = i
hp: p = idpath i
pr1 t =
transportf (precategory_morphisms (L i)) (idpath x)
  (transportf (λ i : I, A ⟦ L i, x ⟧) p (pr1 t))

  now rewrite hp, idpath_transportf.
Defined.


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
i: I
is_cocont (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i)


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
i: I
is_cocont (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i)

now intros c L ccL M H; apply isColimCocone_pr_functor.
Defined.


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
gr: graph
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ (i : I) (d : diagram gr A) (c : A)
(cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (F i) d) (F i c)
    (mapcocone (F i) d cc)
∏ (d : diagram gr (product_category (λ _ : I, A)))
(cd : I → A) (cc : cocone d cd),
isColimCocone d cd cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (family_functor I F) d)
    (family_functor I F cd)
    (mapcocone (family_functor I F) d cc)


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
gr: graph
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ (i : I) (d : diagram gr A) (c : A)
(cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (F i) d) (F i c)
    (mapcocone (F i) d cc)
∏ (d : diagram gr (product_category (λ _ : I, A)))
(cd : I → A) (cc : cocone d cd),
isColimCocone d cd cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (family_functor I F) d)
    (family_functor I F cd)
    (mapcocone (family_functor I F) d cc)


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
gr: graph
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ (i : I) (d : diagram gr A) (c : A)
(cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (F i) d) (F i c)
    (mapcocone (F i) d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
ml: I → A
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: I → B
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (family_functor I F) cAB) xy
∃! x : ∏ i : I, B ⟦ F i (ml i), xy i ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (family_functor I F) cAB ccml) ccxy x


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
gr: graph
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ (i : I) (d : diagram gr A) (c : A)
(cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (F i) d) (F i c)
    (mapcocone (F i) d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
ml: I → A
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: I → B
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (family_functor I F) cAB) xy
∏ i : I,
cocone
  (mapdiagram (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB))
  (xy i)
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
gr: graph
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ (i : I) (d : diagram gr A) 
(c : A) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (F i) d) 
    (F i c) (mapcocone (F i) d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
ml: I → A
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: I → B
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (family_functor I F) cAB) xy
cc:= ?Goal: ∏ i : I,
cocone
  (mapdiagram (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i)
        cAB)) (xy i)
∃! x : ∏ i : I, B ⟦ F i (ml i), xy i ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (family_functor I F) cAB ccml) ccxy x


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
gr: graph
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ (i : I) (d : diagram gr A) (c : A)
(cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (F i) d) (F i c)
    (mapcocone (F i) d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
ml: I → A
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: I → B
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (family_functor I F) cAB) xy
∏ i : I,
cocone
  (mapdiagram (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB))
  (xy i)
 
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
gr: graph
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ (i : I) (d : diagram gr A) (c : A)
(cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (F i) d) (F i c)
    (mapcocone (F i) d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
ml: I → A
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: I → B
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (family_functor I F) cAB) xy
i: I
∏ v : vertex gr,
B
⟦ dob
    (mapdiagram (F i)
       (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB))
    v, xy i ⟧
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
gr: graph
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ (i : I) (d : diagram gr A) 
(c : A) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (F i) d) 
    (F i c) (mapcocone (F i) d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
ml: I → A
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: I → B
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (family_functor I F) cAB) xy
i: I
forms_cocone
  (mapdiagram (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB))
  ?f

  
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
gr: graph
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ (i : I) (d : diagram gr A) (c : A)
(cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (F i) d) (F i c)
    (mapcocone (F i) d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
ml: I → A
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: I → B
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (family_functor I F) cAB) xy
i: I
∏ v : vertex gr,
B
⟦ dob
    (mapdiagram (F i)
       (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB))
    v, xy i ⟧
 intro n; use (pr1 ccxy n).
  
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
gr: graph
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ (i : I) (d : diagram gr A) (c : A)
(cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (F i) d) (F i c)
    (mapcocone (F i) d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
ml: I → A
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: I → B
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (family_functor I F) cAB) xy
i: I
forms_cocone
  (mapdiagram (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB))
  (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 ccxy n i)
 abstract (intros m n e; apply (toforallpaths _ _ _ (pr2 ccxy m n e) i)).

I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
gr: graph
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ (i : I) (d : diagram gr A) (c : A)
(cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (F i) d) (F i c)
    (mapcocone (F i) d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
ml: I → A
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: I → B
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (family_functor I F) cAB) xy
cc:= λ i : I,
make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 ccxy n i)
  (isColimCocone_family_functor_subproof gr F cAB
     xy ccxy i): ∏ i : I,
cocone
  (mapdiagram (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i)
        cAB)) (xy i)
∃! x : ∏ i : I, B ⟦ F i (ml i), xy i ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (family_functor I F) cAB ccml) ccxy x


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
gr: graph
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ (i : I) (d : diagram gr A) (c : A)
(cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (F i) d) (F i c)
    (mapcocone (F i) d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
ml: I → A
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: I → B
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (family_functor I F) cAB) xy
cc:= λ i : I,
make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 ccxy n i)
  (isColimCocone_family_functor_subproof gr F cAB
     xy ccxy i): ∏ i : I,
cocone
  (mapdiagram (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i)
        cAB)) (xy i)
X:= λ i : I,
HF i (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB)
  (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i ml)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB ccml)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor cAB ml ccml Hccml i)
  (xy i) (cc i): ∏ i : I,
∃! x : B ⟦ F i (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i ml),
       xy i ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB)
     (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB
        ccml)) (cc i) x
∃! x : ∏ i : I, B ⟦ F i (ml i), xy i ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (family_functor I F) cAB ccml) ccxy x


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
gr: graph
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ (i : I) (d : diagram gr A) (c : A)
(cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (F i) d) (F i c)
    (mapcocone (F i) d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
ml: I → A
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: I → B
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (family_functor I F) cAB) xy
cc:= λ i : I,
make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 ccxy n i)
  (isColimCocone_family_functor_subproof gr F cAB
     xy ccxy i): ∏ i : I,
cocone
  (mapdiagram (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i)
        cAB)) (xy i)
X:= λ i : I,
HF i (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB)
  (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i ml)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB ccml)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor cAB ml ccml Hccml i)
  (xy i) (cc i): ∏ i : I,
∃! x : B ⟦ F i (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i ml),
       xy i ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB)
     (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB
        ccml)) (cc i) x
∑ x : ∏ i : I, B ⟦ F i (ml i), xy i ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (family_functor I F) cAB ccml) ccxy x
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
gr: graph
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ (i : I) (d : diagram gr A) 
(c : A) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (F i) d) 
    (F i c) (mapcocone (F i) d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
ml: I → A
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: I → B
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (family_functor I F) cAB) xy
cc:= λ i : I,
make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 ccxy n i)
  (isColimCocone_family_functor_subproof gr F cAB
     xy ccxy i): ∏ i : I,
cocone
  (mapdiagram (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i)
        cAB)) (xy i)
X:= λ i : I,
HF i (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB)
  (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i ml)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB ccml)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor cAB ml ccml Hccml i)
  (xy i) (cc i): ∏ i : I,
∃! x : B ⟦ F i (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i ml),
       xy i ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB)
     (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB
        ccml)) (cc i) x
(λ cntr : ∑ x : ∏ i : I, B ⟦ F i (ml i), xy i ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor
            (mapcocone (family_functor I F) cAB ccml)
            ccxy x,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x : ∏ i : I, B ⟦ F i (ml i), xy i ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor
       (mapcocone (family_functor I F) cAB ccml) ccxy
       x, t = cntr) ?pr1


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
gr: graph
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ (i : I) (d : diagram gr A) (c : A)
(cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (F i) d) (F i c)
    (mapcocone (F i) d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
ml: I → A
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: I → B
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (family_functor I F) cAB) xy
cc:= λ i : I,
make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 ccxy n i)
  (isColimCocone_family_functor_subproof gr F cAB
     xy ccxy i): ∏ i : I,
cocone
  (mapdiagram (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i)
        cAB)) (xy i)
X:= λ i : I,
HF i (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB)
  (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i ml)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB ccml)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor cAB ml ccml Hccml i)
  (xy i) (cc i): ∏ i : I,
∃! x : B ⟦ F i (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i ml),
       xy i ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB)
     (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB
        ccml)) (cc i) x
∑ x : ∏ i : I, B ⟦ F i (ml i), xy i ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (family_functor I F) cAB ccml) ccxy x
 
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
gr: graph
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ (i : I) (d : diagram gr A) (c : A)
(cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (F i) d) (F i c)
    (mapcocone (F i) d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
ml: I → A
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: I → B
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (family_functor I F) cAB) xy
cc:= λ i : I,
make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 ccxy n i)
  (isColimCocone_family_functor_subproof gr F cAB
     xy ccxy i): ∏ i : I,
cocone
  (mapdiagram (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i)
        cAB)) (xy i)
X:= λ i : I,
HF i (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB)
  (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i ml)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB ccml)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor cAB ml ccml Hccml i)
  (xy i) (cc i): ∏ i : I,
∃! x : B ⟦ F i (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i ml),
       xy i ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB)
     (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB
        ccml)) (cc i) x
∏ i : I, B ⟦ F i (ml i), xy i ⟧
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
gr: graph
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ (i : I) (d : diagram gr A) 
(c : A) (cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (F i) d) 
    (F i c) (mapcocone (F i) d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
ml: I → A
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: I → B
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (family_functor I F) cAB) xy
cc:= λ i : I,
make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 ccxy n i)
  (isColimCocone_family_functor_subproof gr F cAB
     xy ccxy i): ∏ i : I,
cocone
  (mapdiagram (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i)
        cAB)) (xy i)
X:= λ i : I,
HF i (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB)
  (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i ml)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB ccml)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor cAB ml ccml Hccml i)
  (xy i) (cc i): ∏ i : I,
∃! x : B ⟦ F i (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i ml),
       xy i ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB)
     (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB
        ccml)) (cc i) x
(λ x : ∏ i : I, B ⟦ F i (ml i), xy i ⟧,
 is_cocone_mor
   (mapcocone (family_functor I F) cAB ccml) ccxy x)
  ?pr1

  
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
gr: graph
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ (i : I) (d : diagram gr A) (c : A)
(cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (F i) d) (F i c)
    (mapcocone (F i) d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
ml: I → A
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: I → B
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (family_functor I F) cAB) xy
cc:= λ i : I,
make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 ccxy n i)
  (isColimCocone_family_functor_subproof gr F cAB
     xy ccxy i): ∏ i : I,
cocone
  (mapdiagram (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i)
        cAB)) (xy i)
X:= λ i : I,
HF i (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB)
  (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i ml)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB ccml)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor cAB ml ccml Hccml i)
  (xy i) (cc i): ∏ i : I,
∃! x : B ⟦ F i (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i ml),
       xy i ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB)
     (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB
        ccml)) (cc i) x
∏ i : I, B ⟦ F i (ml i), xy i ⟧
 intro i; apply (pr1 (pr1 (X i))).
  
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
gr: graph
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ (i : I) (d : diagram gr A) (c : A)
(cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (F i) d) (F i c)
    (mapcocone (F i) d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
ml: I → A
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: I → B
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (family_functor I F) cAB) xy
cc:= λ i : I,
make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 ccxy n i)
  (isColimCocone_family_functor_subproof gr F cAB
     xy ccxy i): ∏ i : I,
cocone
  (mapdiagram (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i)
        cAB)) (xy i)
X:= λ i : I,
HF i (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB)
  (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i ml)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB ccml)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor cAB ml ccml Hccml i)
  (xy i) (cc i): ∏ i : I,
∃! x : B ⟦ F i (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i ml),
       xy i ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB)
     (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB
        ccml)) (cc i) x
(λ x : ∏ i : I, B ⟦ F i (ml i), xy i ⟧,
 is_cocone_mor
   (mapcocone (family_functor I F) cAB ccml) ccxy x)
  (λ i : I, pr1 (pr1 (X i)))
 abstract (intro n; apply funextsec; intro j; apply (pr2 (pr1 (X j)) n)).

I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
gr: graph
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ (i : I) (d : diagram gr A) (c : A)
(cc : cocone d c),
isColimCocone d c cc
→ isColimCocone (mapdiagram (F i) d) (F i c)
    (mapcocone (F i) d cc)
cAB: diagram gr (product_precategory (λ _ : I, A))
ml: I → A
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
xy: I → B
ccxy: cocone (mapdiagram (family_functor I F) cAB) xy
cc:= λ i : I,
make_cocone (λ n : vertex gr, pr1 ccxy n i)
  (isColimCocone_family_functor_subproof gr F cAB
     xy ccxy i): ∏ i : I,
cocone
  (mapdiagram (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i)
        cAB)) (xy i)
X:= λ i : I,
HF i (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB)
  (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i ml)
  (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB ccml)
  (isColimCocone_pr_functor cAB ml ccml Hccml i)
  (xy i) (cc i): ∏ i : I,
∃! x : B ⟦ F i (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i ml),
       xy i ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (F i)
     (mapdiagram (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB)
     (mapcocone (pr_functor I (λ _ : I, A) i) cAB
        ccml)) (cc i) x
(λ cntr : ∑ x : ∏ i : I, B ⟦ F i (ml i), xy i ⟧,
          is_cocone_mor
            (mapcocone (family_functor I F) cAB ccml)
            ccxy x,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x : ∏ i : I, B ⟦ F i (ml i), xy i ⟧,
     is_cocone_mor
       (mapcocone (family_functor I F) cAB ccml) ccxy
       x, t = cntr)
  ((λ i : I, pr1 (pr1 (X i))),,
   isColimCocone_family_functor_subproof0 gr F HF cAB
     ml ccml Hccml xy ccxy)
 abstract (intro t; apply subtypePath; simpl;
             [ intro x; apply impred; intro; apply impred_isaset; intro i; apply homset_property
             | destruct t as [f1 f2]; simpl in *;  apply funextsec; intro i;
               transparent assert (H : (∑ x : B ⟦ (F i) (ml i), xy i ⟧,
                                       ∏ n, # (F i) (coconeIn ccml n i) · x =
                                       coconeIn ccxy n i));
                [apply (tpair _ (f1 i)); intro n; apply (toforallpaths _ _ _ (f2 n) i)|];
               apply (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 (X i) H))]).
Defined.


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ i : I, is_cocont (F i)
is_cocont (family_functor I F)


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ i : I, is_cocont (F i)
is_cocont (family_functor I F)

  
I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ i : I, is_cocont (F i)
gr: graph
cAB: diagram gr (product_category (λ _ : I, A))
ml: product_category (λ _ : I, A)
ccml: cocone cAB ml
Hccml: isColimCocone cAB ml ccml
isColimCocone (mapdiagram (family_functor I F) cAB)
  (family_functor I F ml)
  (mapcocone (family_functor I F) cAB ccml)

  apply isColimCocone_family_functor; trivial; intro i; apply HF.
Defined.


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ i : I, is_omega_cocont (F i)
is_omega_cocont (family_functor I F)


I: UU
A, B: category
HI: isdeceq I
F: I → A ⟶ B
HF: ∏ i : I, is_omega_cocont (F i)
is_omega_cocont (family_functor I F)

  now intros cAB ml ccml Hccml; apply isColimCocone_family_functor.
Defined.

End family_functor.


(** ** The bindelta functor C -> C^2 mapping x to (x,x) is omega cocontinuous *)
Section bindelta_functor.

Context {C : category} (PC : BinProducts C).


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
is_cocont (bindelta_functor C)


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
is_cocont (bindelta_functor C)

  apply (left_adjoint_cocont _ _ _ (is_left_adjoint_bindelta_functor PC)).
Defined.


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
is_omega_cocont (bindelta_functor C)


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
is_omega_cocont (bindelta_functor C)

  now intros c L ccL; apply is_cocont_bindelta_functor.
Defined.

End bindelta_functor.

(** ** The generalized delta functor C -> C^I is omega cocontinuous *)
Section delta_functor.
(* TODO: factor this using [tuple_functor] results above, after redefining [delta_functor] in terms of [tuple_functor]. *)

Context {I : UU} {C : category} (PC : Products I C).


I: UU
C: category
PC: Products I C
is_cocont (delta_functor I C)


I: UU
C: category
PC: Products I C
is_cocont (delta_functor I C)

  apply (left_adjoint_cocont _ _ _ (is_left_adjoint_delta_functor _ PC)).
Defined.


I: UU
C: category
PC: Products I C
is_omega_cocont (delta_functor I C)


I: UU
C: category
PC: Products I C
is_omega_cocont (delta_functor I C)

  now intros c L ccL; apply is_cocont_delta_functor.
Defined.

End delta_functor.

(** ** The functor "+ : C^2 -> C" is cocontinuous *)
Section bincoprod_functor.

Context {C : category} (PC : BinCoproducts C).


C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
is_cocont (bincoproduct_functor PC)


C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
is_cocont (bincoproduct_functor PC)

  apply (left_adjoint_cocont _ _ _ (is_left_adjoint_bincoproduct_functor PC)).
Defined.


C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
is_omega_cocont (bincoproduct_functor PC)


C: category
PC: BinCoproducts C
is_omega_cocont (bincoproduct_functor PC)

  now intros c L ccL; apply is_cocont_bincoproduct_functor.
Defined.

End bincoprod_functor.

(** ** The functor "+ : C^I -> C" is cocontinuous *)
Section coprod_functor.

Context {I : UU} {C : category} (PC : Coproducts I C).


I: UU
C: category
PC: Coproducts I C
is_cocont (coproduct_functor I PC)


I: UU
C: category
PC: Coproducts I C
is_cocont (coproduct_functor I PC)

  apply (left_adjoint_cocont _ _ _ (is_left_adjoint_coproduct_functor _ PC)).
Defined.


I: UU
C: category
PC: Coproducts I C
is_omega_cocont (coproduct_functor I PC)


I: UU
C: category
PC: Coproducts I C
is_omega_cocont (coproduct_functor I PC)

  now intros c L ccL; apply is_cocont_coproduct_functor.
Defined.

End coprod_functor.

(** ** Binary coproduct of functors: F + G : C -> D is omega cocontinuous *)
Section BinCoproduct_of_functors.

Context {C D : category} (HD : BinCoproducts D).


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_cocont F
HG: is_cocont G
is_cocont (BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt HD F G)


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_cocont F
HG: is_cocont G
is_cocont (BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt HD F G)


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_cocont F
HG: is_cocont G
is_cocont
  (tuple_functor
     (λ b : bool, bool_rect (λ _ : bool, C ⟶ D) F G b))
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_cocont F
HG: is_cocont G
is_cocont (coproduct_functor bool (CoproductsBool HD))


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_cocont F
HG: is_cocont G
is_cocont
  (tuple_functor
     (λ b : bool, bool_rect (λ _ : bool, C ⟶ D) F G b))
 
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_cocont F
HG: is_cocont G
∏ i : bool,
is_cocont (bool_rect (λ _ : bool, C ⟶ D) F G i)

  induction i; assumption.

C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_cocont F
HG: is_cocont G
is_cocont (coproduct_functor bool (CoproductsBool HD))
 apply is_cocont_coproduct_functor.
Defined.


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont (BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt HD F G)


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont (BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt HD F G)


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont
  (tuple_functor
     (λ b : bool, bool_rect (λ _ : bool, C ⟶ D) F G b))
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont
  (coproduct_functor bool (CoproductsBool HD))


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont
  (tuple_functor
     (λ b : bool, bool_rect (λ _ : bool, C ⟶ D) F G b))
 
C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
∏ i : bool,
is_omega_cocont (bool_rect (λ _ : bool, C ⟶ D) F G i)

  induction i; assumption.

C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont
  (coproduct_functor bool (CoproductsBool HD))
 apply is_omega_cocont_coproduct_functor.
Defined.

Definition omega_cocont_BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt (F G : omega_cocont_functor C D) :
  omega_cocont_functor C D :=
    tpair _ _ (is_omega_cocont_BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt (pr2 F) (pr2 G)).


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_cocont F
HG: is_cocont G
is_cocont (BinCoproduct_of_functors C D HD F G)


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_cocont F
HG: is_cocont G
is_cocont (BinCoproduct_of_functors C D HD F G)

exact (transportf _
         (BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt_eq_BinCoproduct_of_functors _ _ _ F G)
         (is_cocont_BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt HF HG)).
Defined.


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont (BinCoproduct_of_functors C D HD F G)


C, D: category
HD: BinCoproducts D
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont (BinCoproduct_of_functors C D HD F G)

exact (transportf _
         (BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt_eq_BinCoproduct_of_functors _ _ _ F G)
         (is_omega_cocont_BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt HF HG)).
Defined.

Definition omega_cocont_BinCoproduct_of_functors
 (F G : omega_cocont_functor C D) :
  omega_cocont_functor C D :=
    tpair _ _ (is_omega_cocont_BinCoproduct_of_functors _ _ (pr2 F) (pr2 G)).

(* Keep these as they have better computational behavior than the one for _alt above *)

HD: BinCoproducts D
PC: BinProducts C
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_cocont F
HG: is_cocont G
is_cocont (BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt2 HD F G)

PC: BinProducts C
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_cocont F

apply is_cocont_bincoproduct_functor.
Defined.

Definition omega_cocont_BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt2
  (PC : BinProducts C) (F G : omega_cocont_functor C D) :
  omega_cocont_functor C D :=
    tpair _ _ (is_omega_cocont_BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt2 PC _ _ (pr2 F) (pr2 G)).

End BinCoproduct_of_functors.

(** ** Coproduct of families of functors: + F_i : C -> D is omega cocontinuous *)
Section coproduct_of_functors.

Context {I : UU} {C D : category} (HD : Coproducts I D).


I: UU
C, D: category
HD: Coproducts I D
F: I → C ⟶ D
HF: ∏ i : I, is_cocont (F i)
is_cocont (coproduct_of_functors I C D HD F)


I: UU
C, D: category
HD: Coproducts I D
F: I → C ⟶ D
HF: ∏ i : I, is_cocont (F i)
is_cocont (coproduct_of_functors I C D HD F)

  
I: UU
C, D: category
HD: Coproducts I D
F: I → C ⟶ D
HF: ∏ i : I, is_cocont (F i)
is_cocont (coproduct_of_functors_alt I HD F)

  
I: UU
C, D: category
HD: Coproducts I D
F: I → C ⟶ D
HF: ∏ i : I, is_cocont (F i)
is_cocont (tuple_functor F)
I: UU
C, D: category
HD: Coproducts I D
F: I → C ⟶ D
HF: ∏ i : I, is_cocont (F i)
is_cocont (coproduct_functor I HD)

  
I: UU
C, D: category
HD: Coproducts I D
F: I → C ⟶ D
HF: ∏ i : I, is_cocont (F i)
is_cocont (tuple_functor F)
 
I: UU
C, D: category
HD: Coproducts I D
F: I → C ⟶ D
HF: ∏ i : I, is_cocont (F i)
∏ i : I, is_cocont (F i)

    apply HF.
  
I: UU
C, D: category
HD: Coproducts I D
F: I → C ⟶ D
HF: ∏ i : I, is_cocont (F i)
is_cocont (coproduct_functor I HD)
 apply is_cocont_coproduct_functor.
Defined.


I: UU
C, D: category
HD: Coproducts I D
F: I → C ⟶ D
HF: ∏ i : I, is_omega_cocont (F i)
is_omega_cocont (coproduct_of_functors I C D HD F)


I: UU
C, D: category
HD: Coproducts I D
F: I → C ⟶ D
HF: ∏ i : I, is_omega_cocont (F i)
is_omega_cocont (coproduct_of_functors I C D HD F)

C, D: category
HD: Coproducts I D
F: I → C ⟶ D
HF: ∏ i : I, is_omega_cocont (F i)
is_omega_cocont (coproduct_of_functors_alt I HD F)

C, D: category
HD: Coproducts I D
F: I → C ⟶ D
HF: ∏ i : I, is_omega_cocont (F i)
is_omega_cocont (tuple_functor F)

C, D: category
HD: Coproducts I D
F: I → C ⟶ D
HF: ∏ i : I, is_omega_cocont (F i)
is_omega_cocont (coproduct_functor I HD)

C, D: category
HD: Coproducts I D
F: I → C ⟶ D
HF: ∏ i : I, is_omega_cocont (F i)
is_omega_cocont (tuple_functor F)
 
I: UU
C, D: category
HD: Coproducts I D
F: I → C ⟶ D
HF: ∏ i : I, is_omega_cocont (F i)
∏ i : I, is_omega_cocont (F i)

    apply HF.
  
I: UU
C, D: category
HD: Coproducts I D
F: I → C ⟶ D
HF: ∏ i : I, is_omega_cocont (F i)
is_omega_cocont (coproduct_functor I HD)
 apply is_omega_cocont_coproduct_functor.
Defined.

Definition omega_cocont_coproduct_of_functors
  (F : ∏ i, omega_cocont_functor C D) :
  omega_cocont_functor C D :=
    tpair _ _ (is_omega_cocont_coproduct_of_functors (λ i, pr2 (F i))).

End coproduct_of_functors.

(** ** Constant product functors: C -> C, x |-> a * x  and  x |-> x * a are cocontinuous *)
Section constprod_functors.

Context {C : category} (PC : BinProducts C) (hE : Exponentials PC).


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
hE: Exponentials PC
x: C
is_cocont (constprod_functor1 PC x)


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
hE: Exponentials PC
x: C
is_cocont (constprod_functor1 PC x)

  exact (left_adjoint_cocont _ _ _ (hE _)).
Defined.


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
hE: Exponentials PC
x: C
is_omega_cocont (constprod_functor1 PC x)


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
hE: Exponentials PC
x: C
is_omega_cocont (constprod_functor1 PC x)

  now intros c L ccL; apply is_cocont_constprod_functor1.
Defined.

Definition omega_cocont_constprod_functor1 (x : C) :
  omega_cocont_functor C C := tpair _ _ (is_omega_cocont_constprod_functor1 x).


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
hE: Exponentials PC
x: C
is_cocont (constprod_functor2 PC x)


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
hE: Exponentials PC
x: C
is_cocont (constprod_functor2 PC x)

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
hE: Exponentials PC
x: C
is_left_adjoint (constprod_functor2 PC x)

  apply (is_exponentiable_to_is_exponentiable' PC), hE.
Defined.


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
hE: Exponentials PC
x: C
is_omega_cocont (constprod_functor2 PC x)


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
hE: Exponentials PC
x: C
is_omega_cocont (constprod_functor2 PC x)

  now intros c L ccL; apply is_cocont_constprod_functor2.
Defined.

Definition omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 (x : C) :
  omega_cocont_functor C C := tpair _ _ (is_omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 x).

End constprod_functors.

(** ** The functor "* : C^2 -> C" is omega cocontinuous *)
Section binprod_functor.

Context {C : category} (PC : BinProducts C).

(* This hypothesis follow directly if C has exponentials *)
Variable omega_cocont_constprod_functor1 :
  ∏ x : C, is_omega_cocont (constprod_functor1 PC x).


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
∏ x : C, is_omega_cocont (constprod_functor2 PC x)


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
∏ x : C, is_omega_cocont (constprod_functor2 PC x)

now intro x; apply (is_omega_cocont_z_iso (flip_z_iso PC x)).
Defined.


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
∏ i j : nat,
i < j
→ C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)),
  PC (ob1 (dob cAB j)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)) ⟧


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
∏ i j : nat,
i < j
→ C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)),
  PC (ob1 (dob cAB j)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)) ⟧


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
i, j: nat
hij: i < j
C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)),
PC (ob1 (dob cAB j)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)) ⟧

apply (BinProductOfArrows _ _ _ (mor1 (chain_mor cAB hij)) (identity _)).
Defined.


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
∏ i j : nat,
i > j
→ C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)),
  PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB i)) ⟧


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
∏ i j : nat,
i > j
→ C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)),
  PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB i)) ⟧


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
i, j: nat
hij: i > j
C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)),
PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB i)) ⟧

apply (BinProductOfArrows _ _ _ (identity _) (mor2 (chain_mor cAB hij))).
Defined.

(* The map to K from the "grid" *)

C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)), K ⟧


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)), K ⟧


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i < j
C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)), K ⟧
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)), K ⟧


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i < j
C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)), K ⟧
 apply (fun_lt cAB _ _ h · coconeIn ccK j).

C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)), K ⟧
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
H: i > j
C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)), K ⟧
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
H: i = j
C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)), K ⟧

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
H: i > j
C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)), K ⟧
 apply (fun_gt cAB _ _ H · coconeIn ccK i).
  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
H: i = j
C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)), K ⟧
 destruct H; apply (coconeIn ccK i).
Defined.


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j, k: vertex nat_graph
e: edge j k
BinProduct_of_functors_mor C C PC
  (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
  (functor_identity C) (pr2 (dob cAB j))
  (pr2 (dob cAB k)) (mor2 (dmor cAB e))
· map_to_K cAB K ccK i k = map_to_K cAB K ccK i j


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j, k: vertex nat_graph
e: edge j k
BinProduct_of_functors_mor C C PC
  (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
  (functor_identity C) (pr2 (dob cAB j))
  (pr2 (dob cAB k)) (mor2 (dmor cAB e))
· map_to_K cAB K ccK i k = map_to_K cAB K ccK i j


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
BinProduct_of_functors_mor C C PC
  (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
  (functor_identity C) (pr2 (dob cAB j))
  (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))
  (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
· map_to_K cAB K ccK i (S j) = map_to_K cAB K ccK i j


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· match natlthorgeh i (S j) with
  | inl h => fun_lt cAB i (S j) h · coconeIn ccK (S j)
  | inr h =>
      match natgehchoice i (S j) h with
      | inl h0 =>
          fun_gt cAB i (S j) h0 · coconeIn ccK i
      | inr p =>
          match
            p in (_ = n)
            return
              (i ≥ n
               → C
                 ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i))
                     (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
          with
          | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
          end h
      end
  end =
match natlthorgeh i j with
| inl h => fun_lt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK j
| inr h =>
    match natgehchoice i j h with
    | inl h0 => fun_gt cAB i j h0 · coconeIn ccK i
    | inr p =>
        match
          p in (_ = n)
          return
            (i ≥ n
             → C
               ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i))
                   (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
        with
        | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
        end h
    end
end


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i < j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· match natlthorgeh i (S j) with
  | inl h => fun_lt cAB i (S j) h · coconeIn ccK (S j)
  | inr h =>
      match natgehchoice i (S j) h with
      | inl h0 =>
          fun_gt cAB i (S j) h0 · coconeIn ccK i
      | inr p =>
          match
            p in (_ = n)
            return
              (i ≥ n
               → C
                 ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i))
                     (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
          with
          | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
          end h
      end
  end = fun_lt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK j
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C 
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) 
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C 
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) 
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· match natlthorgeh i (S j) with
  | inl h => fun_lt cAB i (S j) h · coconeIn ccK (S j)
  | inr h =>
      match natgehchoice i (S j) h with
      | inl h0 =>
          fun_gt cAB i (S j) h0 · coconeIn ccK i
      | inr p =>
          match
          p in (_ = n)
          return
          (i ≥ n
          → 
          C ⟦ 
          PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
          with
          | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
          end h
      end
  end =
match natgehchoice i j h with
| inl h => fun_gt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK i
| inr p =>
    match
      p in (_ = n)
      return
        (i ≥ n
         → 
         C ⟦ 
         PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
    with
    | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
    end h
end


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i < j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· match natlthorgeh i (S j) with
  | inl h => fun_lt cAB i (S j) h · coconeIn ccK (S j)
  | inr h =>
      match natgehchoice i (S j) h with
      | inl h0 =>
          fun_gt cAB i (S j) h0 · coconeIn ccK i
      | inr p =>
          match
            p in (_ = n)
            return
              (i ≥ n
               → C
                 ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i))
                     (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
          with
          | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
          end h
      end
  end = fun_lt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK j
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i < j
h0: i < S j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· (fun_lt cAB i (S j) h0 · coconeIn ccK (S j)) =
fun_lt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK j
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i < j
h0: i ≥ S j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C 
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) 
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C 
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) 
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· match natgehchoice i (S j) h0 with
  | inl h => fun_gt cAB i (S j) h · coconeIn ccK i
  | inr p =>
      match
        p in (_ = n)
        return
          (i ≥ n
          → 
          C ⟦ 
          PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
      with
      | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
      end h0
  end = fun_lt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK j

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
