  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i < j
h0: i < S j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· (fun_lt cAB i (S j) h0 · coconeIn ccK (S j)) =
fun_lt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK j
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i < j
h0: i < S j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
  (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
· fun_lt cAB i (S j) h0 · coconeIn ccK (S j) =
fun_lt cAB i j h
· BinProductOfArrows C
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB (S j))) (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB j)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
    (pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
    (pr2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
· coconeIn ccK (S j)

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i < j
h0: i < S j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
  (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
· BinProductOfArrows C
    (PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))) (ob2 (dob cAB (S j))))
    (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB (S j))))
    (mor1 (chain_mor cAB h0))
    (identity (ob2 (dob cAB (S j)))) =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB j)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (mor1 (chain_mor cAB h))
  (identity (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
· BinProductOfArrows C
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB (S j))) (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB j)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
    (pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
    (pr2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i < j
h0: i < S j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
  (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
· BinProductOfArrows C
    (PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))) (ob2 (dob cAB (S j))))
    (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB (S j))))
    (mor1 (chain_mor cAB h0))
    (identity (ob2 (dob cAB (S j)))) =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB (S j))) (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (mor1 (chain_mor cAB h)
   · pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
  (pr2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i < j
h0: i < S j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))) (ob2 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
   · mor1 (chain_mor cAB h0))
  (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))
   · identity (ob2 (dob cAB (S j)))) =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB (S j))) (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (mor1 (chain_mor cAB h)
   · pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
  (pr2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i < j
h0: i < S j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))) (ob2 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
   · mor1 (chain_mor cAB h0))
  (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))) =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB (S j))) (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (mor1 (chain_mor cAB h)
   · pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
  (pr2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i < j
h0: i < S j
mor1
  match natlehchoice4 i j h0 with
  | inl h => chain_mor cAB h · dmor cAB (idpath (S j))
  | inr p => dmor cAB (maponpaths S p)
  end =
mor1 (chain_mor cAB h) · pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i < j
h0: i < S j
h1: i < j
mor1 (chain_mor cAB h1 · dmor cAB (idpath (S j))) =
mor1 (chain_mor cAB h) · pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i < j
h0: i < S j
h1: i = j
mor1 (dmor cAB (maponpaths S h1)) =
mor1 (chain_mor cAB h) · pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i < j
h0: i < S j
h1: i < j
mor1 (chain_mor cAB h1 · dmor cAB (idpath (S j))) =
mor1 (chain_mor cAB h) · pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))
 apply cancel_postcomposition, maponpaths, maponpaths, isasetbool.
    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i < j
h0: i < S j
h1: i = j
mor1 (dmor cAB (maponpaths S h1)) =
mor1 (chain_mor cAB h) · pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))
 destruct h1; destruct (isirreflnatlth _ h).
  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i < j
h0: i ≥ S j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· match natgehchoice i (S j) h0 with
  | inl h => fun_gt cAB i (S j) h · coconeIn ccK i
  | inr p =>
      match
        p in (_ = n)
        return
          (i ≥ n
           → C
             ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)),
             K ⟧)
      with
      | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
      end h0
  end = fun_lt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK j
 destruct (isirreflnatlth _ (natlthlehtrans _ _ _ (natlthtolths _ _ h) h0)).

C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· match natlthorgeh i (S j) with
  | inl h => fun_lt cAB i (S j) h · coconeIn ccK (S j)
  | inr h =>
      match natgehchoice i (S j) h with
      | inl h0 =>
          fun_gt cAB i (S j) h0 · coconeIn ccK i
      | inr p =>
          match
            p in (_ = n)
            return
              (i ≥ n
               → C
                 ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i))
                     (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
          with
          | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
          end h
      end
  end =
match natgehchoice i j h with
| inl h => fun_gt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK i
| inr p =>
    match
      p in (_ = n)
      return
        (i ≥ n
         → C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)),
           K ⟧)
    with
    | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
    end h
end
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
h0: i < S j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· (fun_lt cAB i (S j) h0 · coconeIn ccK (S j)) =
match natgehchoice i j h with
| inl h => fun_gt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK i
| inr p =>
    match
      p in (_ = n)
      return
        (i ≥ n
         → C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)),
           K ⟧)
    with
    | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
    end h
end
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
h0: i ≥ S j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C 
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) 
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C 
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) 
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· match natgehchoice i (S j) h0 with
  | inl h => fun_gt cAB i (S j) h · coconeIn ccK i
  | inr p =>
      match
        p in (_ = n)
        return
          (i ≥ n
          → 
          C ⟦ 
          PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
      with
      | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
      end h0
  end =
match natgehchoice i j h with
| inl h => fun_gt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK i
| inr p =>
    match
      p in (_ = n)
      return
        (i ≥ n
         → 
         C ⟦ 
         PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
    with
    | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
    end h
end

     PC x)

  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,

  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)

K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
h0: i < S j

  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· (fun_lt cAB i (S j) h0 · coconeIn ccK (S j)) =
match natgehchoice i j h with
| inl h => fun_gt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK i
| inr p =>
    match
      p in (_ = n)
      return
        (i ≥ n
         → C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)),
           K ⟧)
    with
    | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
    end h
end
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
h0: i < S j
h1: i > j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· (fun_lt cAB i (S j) h0 · coconeIn ccK (S j)) =
fun_gt cAB i j h1 · coconeIn ccK i
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
h0: i < S j
h1: i = j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C 
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) 
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C 
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) 
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· (fun_lt cAB i (S j) h0 · coconeIn ccK (S j)) =
match
  h1 in (_ = n)
  return
    (i ≥ n
     → C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
with
| idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
end h

  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)

K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
h0: i < S j
h1: i > j

  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· (fun_lt cAB i (S j) h0 · coconeIn ccK (S j)) =
fun_gt cAB i j h1 · coconeIn ccK i

i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
h0: i < S j
h1: i > j
h2: S j = i

  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· (fun_lt cAB i (S j) h0 · coconeIn ccK (S j)) =
fun_gt cAB i j h1 · coconeIn ccK i

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
h0: i < S j
h1: i > j
h2: S j = i
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· (fun_lt cAB i (S j) h0 · coconeIn ccK (S j)) =
fun_gt cAB i j h1 · coconeIn ccK i
 destruct h2; destruct (isirreflnatlth _ h0). }
    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
h0: i < S j
h1: i = j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· (fun_lt cAB i (S j) h0 · coconeIn ccK (S j)) =
match
  h1 in (_ = n)
  return
    (i ≥ n
     → C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
with
| idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
end h
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ i
h0: i < S i
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB (S i))))
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
  (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i))))
· (fun_lt cAB i (S i) h0 · coconeIn ccK (S i)) =
coconeIn ccK i

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ i
h0: i < S i
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB (S i))))
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
  (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i))))
· fun_lt cAB i (S i) h0 · coconeIn ccK (S i) =
dmor (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB)
  (idpath (1 + i)) · coconeIn ccK (S i)

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ i
h0: i < S i
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S i))) (ob2 (dob cAB (S i))))
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
   · mor1 (chain_mor cAB h0))
  (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i)))
   · identity (ob2 (dob cAB (S i))))
· coconeIn ccK (S i) =
dmor (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB)
  (idpath (1 + i)) · coconeIn ccK (S i)

PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)

is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)

K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ i
h0: i < S i
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S i))) (ob2 (dob cAB (S i))))
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
  (mor1 (chain_mor cAB h0))
  (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i))))
· coconeIn ccK (S i) =
dmor (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB)
  (idpath (1 + i)) · coconeIn ccK (S i)

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso

  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1

is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)

K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ i
h0: i < S i
mor1 (chain_mor cAB h0) =
pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (1 + i)))

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ i
h0: i < S i
h1: i = i
mor1 (dmor cAB (maponpaths S h1)) =
pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i)))

      apply maponpaths, maponpaths, isasetnat.
  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
h0: i ≥ S j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· match natgehchoice i (S j) h0 with
  | inl h => fun_gt cAB i (S j) h · coconeIn ccK i
  | inr p =>
      match
        p in (_ = n)
        return
          (i ≥ n
           → C
             ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)),
             K ⟧)
      with
      | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
      end h0
  end =
match natgehchoice i j h with
| inl h => fun_gt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK i
| inr p =>
    match
      p in (_ = n)
      return
        (i ≥ n
         → C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)),
           K ⟧)
    with
    | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
    end h
end
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
h0: i ≥ S j
h1: i > j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· match natgehchoice i (S j) h0 with
  | inl h => fun_gt cAB i (S j) h · coconeIn ccK i
  | inr p =>
      match
        p in (_ = n)
        return
          (i ≥ n
           → C
             ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)),
             K ⟧)
      with
      | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
      end h0
  end = fun_gt cAB i j h1 · coconeIn ccK i

  (constprod_functor1

  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1

  (PC
     (constant_functor C C 
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) 
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C 
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) 
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· match natgehchoice i (S j) h0 with
  | inl h => fun_gt cAB i (S j) h · coconeIn ccK i
  | inr p =>
      match
        p in (_ = n)
        return
          (i ≥ n
          →

          PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
      with
      | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
      end h0
  end =
match
  h1 in (_ = n)
  return
    (i ≥ n
     → C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
with
| idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
end h

  (PC

     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))

  (# (functor_identity C)

· match natgehchoice i (S j) h0 with
  | inl h => fun_gt cAB i (S j) h · coconeIn ccK i
  | inr p =>
      match
        p in (_ = n)
        return

           → C
             ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)),

PC: BinProducts C

h: i ≥ j
h0: i ≥ S j
h1: i > j
h2: i > S j

  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· (fun_gt cAB i (S j) h2 · coconeIn ccK i) =
fun_gt cAB i j h1 · coconeIn ccK i

  (constprod_functor1

  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1

is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2

cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
h0: i ≥ S j
h1: i > j
h2: i = S j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C 
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) 
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C 
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) 
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· match
    h2 in (_ = n)
    return
      (i ≥ n
       → C ⟦ 
         PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
  with
  | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
  end h0 = 
fun_gt cAB i j h1 · coconeIn ccK i

h0: i ≥ S j
h1: i > j
h2: i > S j

  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)

· (fun_gt cAB i (S j) h2 · coconeIn ccK i) =

C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
h0: i ≥ S j
h1: i > j
h2: i > S j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· BinProductOfArrows C
    (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB i)))
    (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB (S j))))
    (identity (ob1 (dob cAB i)))
    (mor2 (chain_mor cAB h2)) · coconeIn ccK i =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB i)))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (ob1 (dob cAB i)))
  (mor2 (chain_mor cAB h1)) · coconeIn ccK i

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
h0: i ≥ S j
h1: i > j
h2: i > S j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB i)))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
   · identity (ob1 (dob cAB i)))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
   · mor2 (chain_mor cAB h2)) · coconeIn ccK i =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB i)))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (ob1 (dob cAB i)))
  (mor2 (chain_mor cAB h1)) · coconeIn ccK i

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
h0: i ≥ S j
h1: i > j
h2: i > S j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB i)))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
   · mor2 (chain_mor cAB h2)) · coconeIn ccK i =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB i)))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (ob1 (dob cAB i)))
  (mor2 (chain_mor cAB h1)) · coconeIn ccK i

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
h0: i ≥ S j
h1: i > j
h2: i > S j
# (functor_identity C)
  (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
· mor2 (chain_mor cAB h2) = mor2 (chain_mor cAB h1)

        now rewrite <- (chain_mor_right h1 h2). 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
h0: i ≥ S j
h1: i > j
h2: i = S j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· match
    h2 in (_ = n)
    return
      (i ≥ n
       → C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K
         ⟧)
  with
  | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
  end h0 = fun_gt cAB i j h1 · coconeIn ccK i

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
h0: i ≥ S j
h1: i > j
h2: i = S j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· match
    h2 in (_ = n)
    return
      (i ≥ n
       → C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K
         ⟧)
  with
  | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
  end h0 = fun_gt cAB i j h1 · coconeIn ccK i
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h0: i ≥ S j
h1: i > j
h2: i = S j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
  (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
· match
    h2 in (_ = n)
    return
      (match n with
       | 0 => true
       | S m => natgtb i m
       end = true
       → C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K
         ⟧)
  with
  | idpath _ =>
      λ _ : match i with
            | 0 => true
            | S m => natgtb i m
            end = true, coconeIn ccK i
  end h0 =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB i)))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (ob1 (dob cAB i)))
  (mor2 (chain_mor cAB h1)) · coconeIn ccK i

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
j: vertex nat_graph
h0: S j ≥ S j
h1: S j > j
h2: S j = S j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S j))) (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S j))) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S j))))
  (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
· match
    h2 in (_ = n)
    return
      (match n with
       | 0 => true
       | S m => natgtb (S j) m
       end = true
       → C
         ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))) (ob2 (dob cAB n)),
         K ⟧)
  with
  | idpath _ =>
      λ _ : natgtb (S j) j = true, coconeIn ccK (S j)
  end h0 =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))) (ob2 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (mor2 (chain_mor cAB h1)) · coconeIn ccK (S j)

PC: BinProducts C

is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)

is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)

K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
j: vertex nat_graph
h0: S j ≥ S j
h1: S j > j
h2: S j = S j
h2 = idpath (S j)
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
j: vertex nat_graph
h0: S j ≥ S j
h1: S j > j
h2: S j = S j
eq: h2 = idpath (S j)
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S j))) (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S j))) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S j))))
  (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
· match
    h2 in (_ = n)
    return
      (match n with
       | 0 => true
       | S m => natgtb (S j) m
       end = true
       → C
         ⟦ 
         PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K
         ⟧)
  with
  | idpath _ =>
      λ _ : natgtb (S j) j = true, coconeIn ccK (S j)
  end h0 =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))) (ob2 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (mor2 (chain_mor cAB h1)) · 
coconeIn ccK (S j)

j: vertex nat_graph
h0: S j ≥ S j
h1: S j > j
h2: S j = S j
h2 = idpath (S j)
 apply isasetnat. 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)

  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)

K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
j: vertex nat_graph
h0: S j ≥ S j
h1: S j > j
h2: S j = S j
eq: h2 = idpath (S j)
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S j))) (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S j))) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S j))))
  (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
· match
    h2 in (_ = n)
    return
      (match n with
       | 0 => true
       | S m => natgtb (S j) m
       end = true
       → C
         ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))) (ob2 (dob cAB n)),
         K ⟧)
  with
  | idpath _ =>
      λ _ : natgtb (S j) j = true, coconeIn ccK (S j)
  end h0 =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))) (ob2 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (mor2 (chain_mor cAB h1)) · coconeIn ccK (S j)

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)

is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
j: vertex nat_graph
h0: S j ≥ S j
h1: S j > j
h2: S j = S j
eq: h2 = idpath (S j)
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S j))) (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S j))) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S j))))
  (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
· coconeIn ccK (S j) =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))) (ob2 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (mor2 (chain_mor cAB h1)) · coconeIn ccK (S j)

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
j: vertex nat_graph
h0: S j ≥ S j
h1: S j > j
h2: S j = S j
eq: h2 = idpath (S j)
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S j))) (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S j))) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S j))))
  (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))) =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))) (ob2 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (ob1 (dob cAB (S j))))
  (mor2 (chain_mor cAB h1))

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
j: vertex nat_graph
h0: S j ≥ S j
h1: S j > j
h2: S j = S j
eq: h2 = idpath (S j)
mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))) =
mor2
  match natlehchoice4 j j h1 with
  | inl h => chain_mor cAB h · dmor cAB (idpath (S j))
  | inr p => dmor cAB (maponpaths S p)
  end

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
j: vertex nat_graph
h0: S j ≥ S j
h1: S j > j
h2: S j = S j
eq: h2 = idpath (S j)
p: j = j
mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))) =
mor2 (dmor cAB (maponpaths S p))

        apply maponpaths, maponpaths, isasetnat. }
    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
h: i ≥ j
h0: i ≥ S j
h1: i = j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (mor2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
· match natgehchoice i (S j) h0 with
  | inl h => fun_gt cAB i (S j) h · coconeIn ccK i
  | inr p =>
      match
        p in (_ = n)
        return
          (i ≥ n
           → C
             ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)),
             K ⟧)
      with
      | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
      end h0
  end =
match
  h1 in (_ = n)
  return
    (i ≥ n
     → C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
with
| idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
end h
 destruct h1; destruct (negnatgehnsn _ h0).
Qed.

(* The cocone over K from the A_i * B chain *)

C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i: vertex nat_graph
cocone
  (mapchain (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i: vertex nat_graph
cocone
  (mapchain (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i: vertex nat_graph
∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
C
⟦ dob
    (mapchain
       (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
       (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) v, K ⟧
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i: vertex nat_graph
forms_cocone
  (mapchain 
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) 
  ?f


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i: vertex nat_graph
∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
C
⟦ dob
    (mapchain
       (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
       (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) v, K ⟧
 intro j; apply (map_to_K cAB K ccK i j).

C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
i: vertex nat_graph
forms_cocone
  (mapchain (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB))
  (λ j : vertex nat_graph, map_to_K cAB K ccK i j)
 simpl; intros j k e; apply map_to_K_commutes.
Defined.

Section omega_cocont_binproduct.

Context {cAB : chain (category_binproduct C C)} {LM : C × C}
        {ccLM : cocone cAB LM} (HccLM : isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM)
        {K : C} (ccK : cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K).

Let L := pr1 LM : C.
Let M := pr2 LM : (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM).
Let cA := mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB : chain C.
Let cB := mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB : chain C.
Let HA := isColimCocone_pr1_functor _ _ _ HccLM
  : isColimCocone cA L (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM).
Let HB := isColimCocone_pr2_functor _ _ _ HccLM
  : isColimCocone cB M (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM).

(* Form the colimiting cocones of "A_i * B_0 -> A_i * B_1 -> ..." *)
Let HAiB := λ i, omega_cocont_constprod_functor1 (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) _ _ _ HB.

(* Turn HAiB into a ColimCocone: *)
Let CCAiB := λ i, make_ColimCocone _ _ _ (HAiB i).

(* Define the HAiM ColimCocone: *)
Let HAiM := make_ColimCocone _ _ _ (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M _ _ _ HA).

Let ccAiB_K := λ i, ccAiB_K _ _ ccK i.

(* The f which is used in colimOfArrows *)

C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
C
⟦ BinProduct_of_functors_ob C C PC
    (constant_functor C C (pr1 (dob cAB i)))
    (functor_identity C) (pr2 (dob cAB j)),
BinProduct_of_functors_ob C C PC
  (constant_functor C C (pr1 (dob cAB (S i))))
  (functor_identity C) (pr2 (dob cAB j)) ⟧


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
C
⟦ BinProduct_of_functors_ob C C PC
    (constant_functor C C (pr1 (dob cAB i)))
    (functor_identity C) (pr2 (dob cAB j)),
BinProduct_of_functors_ob C C PC
  (constant_functor C C (pr1 (dob cAB (S i))))
  (functor_identity C) (pr2 (dob cAB j)) ⟧

  apply BinProductOfArrows; [apply (dmor cAB (idpath _)) | apply identity ].
Defined.


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
∏ (i u v : vertex nat_graph) (e : edge u v),
dmor
  (mapchain (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)))
     cB) e · f i v =
f i u
· dmor
    (mapchain
       (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (dob cAB (S i))))
       cB) e


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
∏ (i u v : vertex nat_graph) (e : edge u v),
dmor
  (mapchain (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)))
     cB) e · f i v =
f i u
· dmor
    (mapchain
       (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (dob cAB (S i))))
       cB) e

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
BinProduct_of_functors_mor C C PC
  (constant_functor C C (pr1 (dob cAB i)))
  (functor_identity C) (pr2 (dob cAB j))
  (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))
  (pr2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))) · f i (S j) =
f i j
· BinProduct_of_functors_mor C C PC
    (constant_functor C C (pr1 (dob cAB (S i))))
    (functor_identity C) (pr2 (dob cAB j))
    (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))
    (pr2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (dob cAB (S i)))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (dob cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (dob cAB i)))
     (pr2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
   · (let X := pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (1 + i))) in X))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (pr2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
   · identity
       (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))) =
f i j
· BinProduct_of_functors_mor C C PC
    (constant_functor C C (pr1 (dob cAB (S i))))
    (functor_identity C) (pr2 (dob cAB j))
    (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))
    (pr2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i, j: vertex nat_graph
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (dob cAB (S i)))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (dob cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  (# (constant_functor C C (pr1 (dob cAB i)))
     (pr2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
   · (let X := pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (1 + i))) in X))
  (# (functor_identity C)
     (pr2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j))))
   · identity
       (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))) =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (dob cAB (S i)))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S j))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S j)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (dob cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j))))
  ((let X := pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (1 + i))) in X)
   · # (constant_functor C C (pr1 (dob cAB (S i))))
       (pr2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))
  (identity (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
   · # (functor_identity C)
       (pr2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S j)))))

  now rewrite !id_left, !id_right.
Qed.

(* Define the chain A_i * M *)

C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
chain C


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)

cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram

  (mapcocone

  (mapdiagram

     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))

HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)

binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
chain C

PC: BinProducts C

vertex nat_graph → C
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
