LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
(λ f : vertex nat_graph → C,
 ∏ a b : vertex nat_graph, edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
  ?pr1

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
vertex nat_graph → C
 intro i; apply (colim (CCAiB i)).
  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
(λ f : vertex nat_graph → C,
 ∏ a b : vertex nat_graph, edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
  (λ i : vertex nat_graph, colim (CCAiB i))
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
C ⟦ colim (CCAiB i), colim (CCAiB (1 + i)) ⟧

    apply (colimOfArrows (CCAiB i) (CCAiB (S i)) (f i) (fNat i)).
Defined.


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
∏ i : nat,
dmor AiM_chain (idpath (S i)) =
dmor (mapchain (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (idpath (1 + i))


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
∏ i : nat,
dmor AiM_chain (idpath (S i)) =
dmor (mapchain (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (idpath (1 + i))

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: nat
colimArrow (CCAiB i) (colim (CCAiB (S i)))
  (make_cocone
     (λ u : nat, f i u · colimIn (CCAiB (S i)) u)
     (colimOfArrows_subproof C nat_graph
        (mapdiagram
           (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
           cB)
        (mapdiagram
           (constprod_functor1 PC
              (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S i)))) cB) (CCAiB (S i))
        (f i) (fNat i))) =
BinProductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 (dob cAB (S i))) M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) M)
  (pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i)))) (identity M)

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: nat
∏ u : vertex nat_graph,
colimIn (CCAiB i) u
· BinProductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 (dob cAB (S i))) M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) M)
    (pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i)))) (identity M) =
coconeIn
  (make_cocone
     (λ u0 : nat, f i u0 · colimIn (CCAiB (S i)) u0)
     (colimOfArrows_subproof C nat_graph
        (mapdiagram
           (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
           cB)
        (mapdiagram
           (constprod_functor1 PC
              (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S i)))) cB) (CCAiB (S i))
        (f i) (fNat i))) u

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i, j: nat
colimIn (CCAiB i) j
· BinProductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 (dob cAB (S i))) M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) M)
    (pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i)))) (identity M) =
f i j · colimIn (CCAiB (S i)) j

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i, j: nat
BinProductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j))
· BinProductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 (dob cAB (S i))) M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) M)
    (pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i)))) (identity M) =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB (S i))) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i))))
  (identity (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
· BinProductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S i))) M)
    (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S i))) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
    (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S i))))
    (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j))

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i, j: nat
BinProductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 (dob cAB (S i))) M)
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
   · pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i))))
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j) · identity M) =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB (S i))) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i))))
  (identity (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
· BinProductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S i))) M)
    (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S i))) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
    (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S i))))
    (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j))

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i, j: nat
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB (S i))) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i))))
  (identity (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
· BinProductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S i))) M)
    (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S i))) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
    (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S i))))
    (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j)) =
BinProductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 (dob cAB (S i))) M)
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
   · pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i))))
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j) · identity M)

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i, j: nat
BinProductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S i))) M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i)))
   · identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB (S i))))
  (identity (pr2 (dob cAB j)) · pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j)) =
BinProductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 (dob cAB (S i))) M)
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))
   · pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i))))
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j) · identity M)

  now rewrite !id_left, !id_right.
Qed.

(* Define a cocone over K from the A_i * M chain *)

C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
forms_cocone (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (λ u : vertex nat_graph,
   colimArrow (CCAiB u) K (ccAiB_K u))


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
forms_cocone (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (λ u : vertex nat_graph,
   colimArrow (CCAiB u) K (ccAiB_K u))

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
BinProduct_of_functors_mor C C PC (functor_identity C)
  (constant_functor C C M) (pr1 (dob cAB i))
  (pr1 (dob cAB (S i)))
  (pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i))))
· colimArrow (CCAiB (S i)) K (ccAiB_K (S i)) =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
colimOfArrows (CCAiB i) (CCAiB (S i)) (f i) (fNat i)
· colimArrow (CCAiB (S i)) K (ccAiB_K (S i)) =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
colimOfArrows (CCAiB i) (CCAiB (S i)) (f i) (fNat i)
· colimArrow (CCAiB (S i)) K (ccAiB_K (S i)) = ?b
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
?b = colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K
  (make_cocone
     (λ u : vertex nat_graph,
      f i u · coconeIn (ccAiB_K (S i)) u)
     (preCompWithColimOfArrows_subproof (CCAiB i)
        (CCAiB (S i)) (f i) (fNat i) K (ccAiB_K (S i)))) =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
∏ u : vertex nat_graph,
colimIn (CCAiB i) u
· colimArrow (CCAiB i) K
    (make_cocone
       (λ u0 : vertex nat_graph,
        f i u0 · coconeIn (ccAiB_K (S i)) u0)
       (preCompWithColimOfArrows_subproof (CCAiB i)
          (CCAiB (S i)) (f i) (fNat i) K
          (ccAiB_K (S i)))) = coconeIn (ccAiB_K i) u

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
j: nat
colimIn (CCAiB i) j
· colimArrow (CCAiB i) K
    (make_cocone
       (λ u : nat, f i u · map_to_K cAB K ccK (S i) u)
       (preCompWithColimOfArrows_subproof (CCAiB i)
          (CCAiB (S i)) (f i) (fNat i) K
          (ccAiB_K (S i)))) = map_to_K cAB K ccK i j

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
j: nat
f i j · map_to_K cAB K ccK (S i) j =
map_to_K cAB K ccK i j

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
j: nat
f i j
· match natlthorgeh (S i) j with
  | inl h => fun_lt cAB (S i) j h · coconeIn ccK j
  | inr h =>
      match natgehchoice (S i) j h with
      | inl h0 =>
          fun_gt cAB (S i) j h0 · coconeIn ccK (S i)
      | inr p =>
          match
            p in (_ = n)
            return
              (S i ≥ n
               → C
                 ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S i)))
                     (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
          with
          | idpath _ =>
              λ _ : S i ≥ S i, coconeIn ccK (S i)
          end h
      end
  end =
match natlthorgeh i j with
| inl h => fun_lt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK j
| inr h =>
    match natgehchoice i j h with
    | inl h0 => fun_gt cAB i j h0 · coconeIn ccK i
    | inr p =>
        match
          p in (_ = n)
          return
            (i ≥ n
             → C
               ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i))
                   (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
        with
        | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
        end h
    end
end

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
j: nat
h: S i < j
f i j · (fun_lt cAB (S i) j h · coconeIn ccK j) =
match natlthorgeh i j with
| inl h => fun_lt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK j
| inr h =>
    match natgehchoice i j h with
    | inl h0 => fun_gt cAB i j h0 · coconeIn ccK i
    | inr p =>
        match
          p in (_ = n)
          return
            (i ≥ n
             → C
               ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i))
                   (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
        with
        | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
        end h
    end
end
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
j: nat
h: S i ≥ j
f i j
· match natgehchoice (S i) j h with
  | inl h => fun_gt cAB (S i) j h · coconeIn ccK (S i)
  | inr p =>
      match
        p in (_ = n)
        return
          (S i ≥ n
          → 
          C
          ⟦ 
          PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S i))) (ob2 (dob cAB n)),
          K ⟧)
      with
      | idpath _ =>
          λ _ : S i ≥ S i, coconeIn ccK (S i)
      end h
  end =
match natlthorgeh i j with
| inl h => fun_lt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK j
| inr h =>
    match natgehchoice i j h with
    | inl h0 => fun_gt cAB i j h0 · coconeIn ccK i
    | inr p =>
        match
          p in (_ = n)
          return
          (i ≥ n
          → 
          C ⟦ 
          PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
        with
        | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
        end h
    end
end

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)

LM: C × C

cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
j: nat
h: S i < j
f i j · (fun_lt cAB (S i) j h · coconeIn ccK j) =
match natlthorgeh i j with
| inl h => fun_lt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK j
| inr h =>
    match natgehchoice i j h with
    | inl h0 => fun_gt cAB i j h0 · coconeIn ccK i
    | inr p =>
        match
          p in (_ = n)
          return
            (i ≥ n
             → C
               ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i))
                   (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
        with
        | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
        end h
    end

LM: C × C

ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
j: nat
h: S i < j
h0: i < j
f i j · (fun_lt cAB (S i) j h · coconeIn ccK j) =
fun_lt cAB i j h0 · coconeIn ccK j
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
j: nat
h: S i < j
h0: i ≥ j
f i j · (fun_lt cAB (S i) j h · coconeIn ccK j) =
match natgehchoice i j h0 with
| inl h => fun_gt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK i
| inr p =>
    match
      p in (_ = n)
      return
        (i ≥ n
         → 
         C ⟦ 
         PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
    with
    | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
    end h0
end

  (constprod_functor2

     (constprod_functor1 PC

     PC x)

  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)

  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,

  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))

make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))

  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
