  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
h0: S i > i
h: i ≥ i
mor2
  match natlehchoice4 i i h0 with
  | inl h => chain_mor cAB h · dmor cAB (idpath (S i))
  | inr p => dmor cAB (maponpaths S p)
  end = pr2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i)))

            
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
h0: S i > i
h: i ≥ i
p: i = i
mor2 (dmor cAB (maponpaths S p)) =
pr2 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i)))

            apply maponpaths, maponpaths, isasetnat.
       }
    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
j: nat
h: S i ≥ j
p: S i = j
f i j
· match
    p in (_ = n)
    return
      (S i ≥ n
       → C
         ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S i))) (ob2 (dob cAB n)),
         K ⟧)
  with
  | idpath _ => λ _ : S i ≥ S i, coconeIn ccK (S i)
  end h =
match natlthorgeh i j with
| inl h => fun_lt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK j
| inr h =>
    match natgehchoice i j h with
    | inl h0 => fun_gt cAB i j h0 · coconeIn ccK i
    | inr p =>
        match
          p in (_ = n)
          return
            (i ≥ n
             → C
               ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i))
                   (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
        with
        | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
        end h
    end
end
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
f i (S i) · coconeIn ccK (S i) =
match natlthorgeh i (S i) with
| inl h => fun_lt cAB i (S i) h · coconeIn ccK (S i)
| inr h =>
    match natgehchoice i (S i) h with
    | inl h0 => fun_gt cAB i (S i) h0 · coconeIn ccK i
    | inr p =>
        match
          p in (_ = n)
          return
            (i ≥ n
             → C
               ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i))
                   (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
        with
        | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
        end h
    end
end

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
h: i < S i
f i (S i) · coconeIn ccK (S i) =
fun_lt cAB i (S i) h · coconeIn ccK (S i)

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
h: i < S i
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (dob cAB (S i)))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S i))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S i)))))
  (PC
     (constant_functor C C (pr1 (dob cAB i))
        (pr2 (dob cAB (S i))))
     (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S i)))))
  (pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (1 + i))))
  (identity (functor_identity C (pr2 (dob cAB (S i))))) =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB (S i))) (ob2 (dob cAB (S i))))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB (S i))))
  (mor1 (chain_mor cAB h))
  (identity (ob2 (dob cAB (S i))))

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
h: i < S i
pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i))) =
mor1
  match natlehchoice4 i i h with
  | inl h => chain_mor cAB h · dmor cAB (idpath (S i))
  | inr p => dmor cAB (maponpaths S p)
  end

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
h: i < S i
p: i = i
pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i))) =
mor1 (dmor cAB (maponpaths S p))

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
h: i < S i
p: i = i
idpath (S i) = maponpaths S p
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
h: i < S i
p: i = i
H: idpath (S i) = maponpaths S p
pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i))) =
mor1 (dmor cAB (maponpaths S p))
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: vertex nat_graph
h: i < S i
p: i = i
H: idpath (S i) = maponpaths S p
pr1 (dmor cAB (idpath (S i))) =
mor1 (dmor cAB (maponpaths S p))

      now rewrite H.
Qed.

Local Definition ccAiM_K := make_cocone _ ccAiM_K_subproof.


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v))
· colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K = coconeIn ccK v


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v))
· colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K = coconeIn ccK v

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: nat
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))
· colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K = coconeIn ccK i

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: nat
colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K =
coconeIn ccAiM_K i
→ BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
    (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))
  · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K = coconeIn ccK i

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: nat
coconeIn ccAiM_K i =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: nat
H: coconeIn ccAiM_K i =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K =
coconeIn ccAiM_K i
→ BinProductOfArrows C 
    (PC L M) 
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
    (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) 
    (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))
  · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K = 
  coconeIn ccK i

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: nat
coconeIn ccAiM_K i =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
 apply idpath. 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: nat
H: coconeIn ccAiM_K i =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K =
coconeIn ccAiM_K i
→ BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
    (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))
  · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K = coconeIn ccK i

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: nat
H: coconeIn ccAiM_K i =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
HH: colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))
· colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K = coconeIn ccK i

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: nat
H: coconeIn ccAiM_K i =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
HH: colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
colimIn (CCAiB i) i
· colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i) =
coconeIn (ccAiB_K i) i
→ BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
    (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))
  · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K = coconeIn ccK i

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: nat
H: coconeIn ccAiM_K i =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
HH: colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
colimIn (CCAiB i) i
· (colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K) =
match natlthorgeh i i with
| inl h => fun_lt cAB i i h · coconeIn ccK i
| inr h =>
    match natgehchoice i i h with
    | inl h0 => fun_gt cAB i i h0 · coconeIn ccK i
    | inr p =>
        match
          p in (_ = n)
          return
            (i ≥ n
             → C
               ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i))
                   (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
        with
        | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
        end h
    end
end
→ BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
    (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))
  · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K = coconeIn ccK i

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: nat
H: coconeIn ccAiM_K i =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
HH: colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
h: i ≥ i
colimIn (CCAiB i) i
· (colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K) =
match natgehchoice i i h with
| inl h => fun_gt cAB i i h · coconeIn ccK i
| inr p =>
    match
      p in (_ = n)
      return
        (i ≥ n
         → C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)),
           K ⟧)
    with
    | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
    end h
end
→ BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
    (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))
  · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K = coconeIn ccK i

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: nat
H: coconeIn ccAiM_K i =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
HH: colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
h: i ≥ i
p: i = i
colimIn (CCAiB i) i
· (colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K) =
match
  p in (_ = n)
  return
    (i ≥ n
     → C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
with
| idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
end h
→ BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
    (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))
  · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K = coconeIn ccK i

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)

LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM

K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K

M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)

  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))

make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)

     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))

ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: nat
H: coconeIn ccAiM_K i =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
HH: colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
colimIn (CCAiB i) i
· (colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K) =
coconeIn ccK i
→ BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
    (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))
  · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K = coconeIn ccK i

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))

make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))

  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)

     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))

ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)

binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: nat
H: coconeIn ccAiM_K i =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
HH: colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
HHH: colimIn (CCAiB i) i
· (colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K) =
coconeIn ccK i
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))
· colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K = coconeIn ccK i

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: nat
H: coconeIn ccAiM_K i =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
HH: colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
HHH: colimIn (CCAiB i) i
· (colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K) =
coconeIn ccK i
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))
· colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K =
colimIn (CCAiB i) i · colimIn HAiM i
· colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)

  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)

LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM

  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)

  (mapdiagram
