  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: nat
H: coconeIn ccAiM_K i =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
HH: colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
HHH: colimIn (CCAiB i) i
· (colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K) =
coconeIn ccK i
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i)) =
colimIn (CCAiB i) i · colimIn HAiM i

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: nat
H: coconeIn ccAiM_K i =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
HH: colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
HHH: colimIn (CCAiB i) i
· (colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K) =
coconeIn ccK i
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i)) =
BinProductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))
· BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) M) (mor1 (coconeIn ccLM i))
    (identity M)

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: nat
H: coconeIn ccAiM_K i =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
HH: colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
HHH: colimIn (CCAiB i) i
· (colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K) =
coconeIn ccK i
BinProductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))
· BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) M) (mor1 (coconeIn ccLM i))
    (identity M) =
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
i: nat
H: coconeIn ccAiM_K i =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
HH: colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)
HHH: colimIn (CCAiB i) i
· (colimIn HAiM i · colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K) =
coconeIn ccK i
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) · mor1 (coconeIn ccLM i))
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i) · identity M) =
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))

  now rewrite id_left, id_right.
Qed.


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
∏
t : ∑ x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
    ∏ v : nat,
    BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
      (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
      (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v))
    · x = coconeIn ccK v,
t = colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K,, is_cocone_morphism


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
∏
t : ∑ x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
    ∏ v : nat,
    BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
      (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
      (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v))
    · x = coconeIn ccK v,
t = colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K,, is_cocone_morphism

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: ∑ x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · x = 
coconeIn ccK v
t = colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K,, is_cocone_morphism

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: ∑ x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · x = 
coconeIn ccK v
isPredicate
  (λ x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
   ∏ v : nat,
   BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
     (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
     (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v))
   · x = coconeIn ccK v)
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: ∑ x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · x = 
coconeIn ccK v
pr1 t = colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: ∑ x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · x = 
coconeIn ccK v
isPredicate
  (λ x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
   ∏ v : nat,
   BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
     (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
     (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v))
   · x = coconeIn ccK v)
 intro; apply impred; intros; apply homset_property.
  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: ∑ x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · x = 
coconeIn ccK v
pr1 t = colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: ∑ x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · x = 
coconeIn ccK v
∏ u : vertex nat_graph,
colimIn HAiM u · pr1 t = coconeIn ccAiM_K u

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i: nat
colimIn HAiM i · t =
colimArrow (CCAiB i) K (ccAiB_K i)

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i: nat
∏ u : vertex nat_graph,
colimIn (CCAiB i) u · (colimIn HAiM i · t) =
coconeIn (ccAiB_K i) u

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
colimIn (CCAiB i) j · (colimIn HAiM i · t) =
match natlthorgeh i j with
| inl h => fun_lt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK j
| inr h =>
    match natgehchoice i j h with
    | inl h0 => fun_gt cAB i j h0 · coconeIn ccK i
    | inr p =>
        match
          p in (_ = n)
          return
            (i ≥ n
             → C
               ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i))
                   (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
        with
        | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
        end h
    end
end

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)

LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM

cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)

     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i < j
colimIn (CCAiB i) j · (colimIn HAiM i · t) =
fun_lt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK j
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,

  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)

HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M

omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)

  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))

make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)

     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))

  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)

binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i ≥ j
colimIn (CCAiB i) j · (colimIn HAiM i · t) =
match natgehchoice i j h with
| inl h => fun_gt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK i
| inr p =>
    match
      p in (_ = n)
      return
        (i ≥ n
         → 
         C ⟦ 
         PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
    with
    | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
    end h
end

    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)

is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,

  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)

LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))

make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i < j
colimIn (CCAiB i) j · (colimIn HAiM i · t) =
fun_lt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK j
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i < j
colimIn (CCAiB i) j · (colimIn HAiM i · t) =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB j)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (mor1 (chain_mor cAB h))
  (identity (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
· (BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
     (PC (pr1 (dob cAB j)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
     (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM j)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j))
   · t)

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i < j
colimIn (CCAiB i) j · colimIn HAiM i · t =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB j)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (mor1 (chain_mor cAB h))
  (identity (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
· BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB j)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
    (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM j)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j))
· t

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i < j
colimIn (CCAiB i) j · colimIn HAiM i =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB j)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (mor1 (chain_mor cAB h))
  (identity (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
· BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB j)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
    (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM j)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j))

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i < j
BinProductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j))
· BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) M) (mor1 (coconeIn ccLM i))
    (identity M) =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB j)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (mor1 (chain_mor cAB h))
  (identity (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
· BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB j)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
    (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM j)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j))

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i < j
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) · mor1 (coconeIn ccLM i))
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j) · identity M) =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB j)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (mor1 (chain_mor cAB h))
  (identity (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
· BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB j)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
    (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM j)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j))

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i < j
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB j)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (mor1 (chain_mor cAB h))
  (identity (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
· BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB j)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
    (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM j)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j)) =
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) · mor1 (coconeIn ccLM i))
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j) · identity M)

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)

cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C

HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M

  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,

     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))

  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)

     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L

binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i < j
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (mor1 (chain_mor cAB h) · pr1 (coconeIn ccLM j))
  (identity (ob2 (dob cAB j)) · pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j)) =
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) · mor1 (coconeIn ccLM i))
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j) · identity M)

PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,

LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C

HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M

  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i < j
mor1 (chain_mor cAB h) · pr1 (coconeIn ccLM j) =
mor1 (coconeIn ccLM i)

      apply (maponpaths pr1 (chain_mor_coconeIn cAB LM ccLM i j h)).
    
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i ≥ j
colimIn (CCAiB i) j · (colimIn HAiM i · t) =
match natgehchoice i j h with
| inl h => fun_gt cAB i j h · coconeIn ccK i
| inr p =>
    match
      p in (_ = n)
      return
        (i ≥ n
         → C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)),
           K ⟧)
    with
    | idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
    end h
end
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i ≥ j
h0: i > j
colimIn (CCAiB i) j · (colimIn HAiM i · t) =
fun_gt cAB i j h0 · coconeIn ccK i
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i ≥ j
p0: i = j
colimIn (CCAiB i) j · (colimIn HAiM i · t) =
match
  p0 in (_ = n)
  return
    (i ≥ n
     → C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
with
| idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
end h

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i ≥ j
h0: i > j
colimIn (CCAiB i) j · (colimIn HAiM i · t) =
fun_gt cAB i j h0 · coconeIn ccK i
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i ≥ j
h0: i > j
colimIn (CCAiB i) j · colimIn HAiM i · t =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB i)))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (ob1 (dob cAB i)))
  (mor2 (chain_mor cAB h0))
· BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
    (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))
· t

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
