make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i ≥ j
h0: i > j
colimIn (CCAiB i) j · colimIn HAiM i =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB i)))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (ob1 (dob cAB i)))
  (mor2 (chain_mor cAB h0))
· BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
    (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i ≥ j
h0: i > j
BinProductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j))
· BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) M) (mor1 (coconeIn ccLM i))
    (identity M) =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB i)))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (ob1 (dob cAB i)))
  (mor2 (chain_mor cAB h0))
· BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
    (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))

PC: BinProducts C

is_omega_cocont

  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)

p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i ≥ j
h0: i > j
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) · mor1 (coconeIn ccLM i))
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j) · identity M) =
BinProductOfArrows C
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB i)))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (identity (ob1 (dob cAB i)))
  (mor2 (chain_mor cAB h0))

p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v

h0: i > j

  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB i)))
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))

  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j) · identity M)

h0: i > j
X:= chain_mor_coconeIn cAB LM ccLM j i h0: chain_mor cAB h0 · coconeIn ccLM i =
coconeIn ccLM j
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB j)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i))
  (mor2 (chain_mor cAB h0) · pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i)) =
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB j)))
  (mor1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j))

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i ≥ j
h0: i > j
X:= chain_mor_coconeIn cAB LM ccLM j i h0: chain_mor cAB h0 · coconeIn ccLM i =
coconeIn ccLM j
mor2 (chain_mor cAB h0) · pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i) =
pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j)

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)

is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)

  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,

  (mapdiagram

HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA

  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)

binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i ≥ j
h0: i > j
X:= chain_mor_coconeIn cAB LM ccLM j i h0: chain_mor cAB h0 · coconeIn ccLM i =
coconeIn ccLM j
mor2 (chain_mor cAB h0) · pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i) = ?b

h0: i > j

coconeIn ccLM j
?b = pr2 (coconeIn ccLM j)

omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram

  (mapdiagram

p: ∏ v : nat,

  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i ≥ j
h0: i > j
X:= chain_mor_coconeIn cAB LM ccLM j i h0: chain_mor cAB h0 · coconeIn ccLM i =
coconeIn ccLM j
?t1 = coconeIn ccLM j
 apply X.

PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,

  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)

  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)

ccLM: cocone cAB LM

cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C

  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))

make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i ≥ j
h0: i > j
X:= chain_mor_coconeIn cAB LM ccLM j i h0: chain_mor cAB h0 · coconeIn ccLM i =
coconeIn ccLM j
mor2 (chain_mor cAB h0) · pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i) =
pr2 (chain_mor cAB h0 · coconeIn ccLM i)

              apply idpath.

  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i ≥ j
p0: i = j
colimIn (CCAiB i) j · (colimIn HAiM i · t) =
match
  p0 in (_ = n)
  return
    (i ≥ n
     → C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
with
| idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
end h

      
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i, j: nat
h: i ≥ j
p0: i = j
colimIn (CCAiB i) j · (colimIn HAiM i · t) =
match
  p0 in (_ = n)
  return
    (i ≥ n
     → C ⟦ PC (ob1 (dob cAB i)) (ob2 (dob cAB n)), K ⟧)
with
| idpath _ => λ _ : i ≥ i, coconeIn ccK i
end h
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i: nat
h: i ≥ i
colimIn (CCAiB i) i · (colimIn HAiM i · t) =
coconeIn ccK i

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,

  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i: nat
h: i ≥ i
colimIn (CCAiB i) i · colimIn HAiM i · t =
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i)) · t

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i: nat
h: i ≥ i
colimIn (CCAiB i) i · colimIn HAiM i =
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i: nat
h: i ≥ i
BinProductOfArrows C (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i))) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))
· BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
    (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) M) (mor1 (coconeIn ccLM i))
    (identity M) =
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))

        
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
t: C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
p: ∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C 
  (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · t = 
coconeIn ccK v
i: nat
h: i ≥ i
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) · mor1 (coconeIn ccLM i))
  (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i) · identity M) =
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB i)) (pr2 (dob cAB i)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM i)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM i))

        now rewrite id_left, id_right. }
Qed.


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
∃! x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · x =
coconeIn ccK v


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
∃! x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · x =
coconeIn ccK v


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
∑ x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · x =
coconeIn ccK v
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
(λ cntr : ∑ 
          x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
          ∏ 
          v : nat,
          BinProductOfArrows C 
          (PC L M)
          (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
          (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v))
          (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · x = 
          coconeIn ccK v,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
     ∏ v : nat,
     BinProductOfArrows C 
       (PC L M)
       (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
       (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
       (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · x = 
     coconeIn ccK v, 
 t = cntr) 
  ?pr1


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
∑ x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · x =
coconeIn ccK v
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
(λ x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
 ∏ v : nat,
 BinProductOfArrows C 
   (PC L M) 
   (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
   (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) 
   (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · x = 
 coconeIn ccK v) 
  ?pr1

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧
 apply (colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K).
  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
(λ x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
 ∏ v : nat,
 BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
   (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
   (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · x =
 coconeIn ccK v) (colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K)
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
∏ v : nat,
BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
  (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
  (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v))
· (BinProduct_of_functors_commutes_invdata C C PC
     (constant_functor C C M) (functor_identity C) L
   · pr1
       (pr1
          (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1 M cA L
             (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA K
             (ccFy (flip_z_iso PC M) cA K ccAiM_K)))) =
coconeIn ccK v
 apply is_cocone_morphism.

C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
(λ cntr : ∑ x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
          ∏ v : nat,
          BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
            (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
            (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v))
            (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v)) · x =
          coconeIn ccK v,
 ∏
 t : ∑ x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
     ∏ v : nat,
     BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
       (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
       (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v))
     · x = coconeIn ccK v, t = cntr)
  (colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K,,
   (is_cocone_morphism
    :
    (λ x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
     ∏ v : nat,
     BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
       (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
       (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v))
     · x = coconeIn ccK v) (colimArrow HAiM K ccAiM_K)))
 
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (category_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapchain (binproduct_functor PC) cAB) K
L:= pr1 LM: C
M:= pr2 LM: (λ _ : C, C) (pr1 LM)
cA:= mapchain (pr1_functor C C) cAB: chain C
cB:= mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB: chain C
HA:= isColimCocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cA L
  (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HB:= isColimCocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM HccLM: isColimCocone cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM)
HAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
  (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) cB M
  (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM) HB: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
CCAiB:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
  (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)) M)
  (mapcocone
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB (cocone_pr2_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (HAiB i): ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (constprod_functor1 PC (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     cB)
HAiM:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
  (constprod_functor2 PC M L)
  (mapcocone 
     (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM))
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor2 M cA L
     (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (constprod_functor2 PC M) cA)
ccAiB_K:= λ i : vertex nat_graph,
binprod_functor.ccAiB_K cAB K ccK i: ∏ i : vertex nat_graph,
cocone
  (mapchain
     (constprod_functor1 PC
        (pr1 (pr1 cAB i)))
     (mapchain (pr2_functor C C) cAB)) K
∏
t : ∑ x : C ⟦ PC L M, K ⟧,
    ∏ v : nat,
    BinProductOfArrows C (PC L M)
      (PC (pr1 (dob cAB v)) (pr2 (dob cAB v)))
      (pr1 (coconeIn ccLM v)) (pr2 (coconeIn ccLM v))
    · x = coconeIn ccK v,
t =
BinProduct_of_functors_commutes_invdata C C PC
  (constant_functor C C M) (functor_identity C) L
· pr1
    (pr1
       (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1 M cA L
          (cocone_pr1_functor cAB LM ccLM) HA K
          (ccFy (flip_z_iso PC M) cA K ccAiM_K))),,
is_cocone_morphism
 apply is_unique_cocone_morphism.
Defined.

End omega_cocont_binproduct.


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
is_omega_cocont (binproduct_functor PC)


C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
is_omega_cocont (binproduct_functor PC)

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (precategory_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapdiagram (binproduct_functor PC) cAB)
  K
∃! x : C ⟦ PC (pr1 LM) (pr2 LM), K ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (binproduct_functor PC) cAB ccLM) ccK x

  
C: category
PC: BinProducts C
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PC x)
omega_cocont_constprod_functor2:= λ x : C,
is_omega_cocont_z_iso
  (flip_z_iso PC x)
  (omega_cocont_constprod_functor1
     x): ∏ x : C,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor2
     PC x)
cAB: chain (precategory_binproduct C C)
LM: C × C
ccLM: cocone cAB LM
HccLM: isColimCocone cAB LM ccLM
K: C
ccK: cocone (mapdiagram (binproduct_functor PC) cAB)
  K
∃! x : C ⟦ PC (pr1 LM) (pr2 LM), K ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (binproduct_functor PC) cAB ccLM) ccK x

apply isColimProductOfColims, HccLM.
Defined.

End binprod_functor.

(** ** Binary product of functors: F * G : C -> D is omega cocontinuous *)
Section BinProduct_of_functors.

Context {C D : category} (PC : BinProducts C) (PD : BinProducts D).

Variable omega_cocont_constprod_functor1 :
  ∏ x : D, is_omega_cocont (constprod_functor1 PD x).


C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
PD: BinProducts D
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : D,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PD x)
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont (BinProduct_of_functors_alt PD F G)


C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
PD: BinProducts D
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : D,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PD x)
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont (BinProduct_of_functors_alt PD F G)


C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
PD: BinProducts D
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : D,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PD x)
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont (bindelta_functor C)
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
PD: BinProducts D
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : D,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PD x)
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont
  (pair_functor F G ∙ binproduct_functor PD)


C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
PD: BinProducts D
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : D,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PD x)
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont (bindelta_functor C)
 apply (is_omega_cocont_bindelta_functor PC).

C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
PD: BinProducts D
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : D,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PD x)
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont
  (pair_functor F G ∙ binproduct_functor PD)
 
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
PD: BinProducts D
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : D,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PD x)
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont (pair_functor F G)
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
PD: BinProducts D
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : D,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PD x)
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont (binproduct_functor PD)

  
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
PD: BinProducts D
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : D,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PD x)
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont (pair_functor F G)
 apply (is_omega_cocont_pair_functor _ _ HF HG).
  
C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
PD: BinProducts D
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : D,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PD x)
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont (binproduct_functor PD)
 now apply is_omega_cocont_binproduct_functor.
Defined.

Definition omega_cocont_BinProduct_of_functors_alt (F G : omega_cocont_functor C D) :
  omega_cocont_functor C D :=
    tpair _ _ (is_omega_cocont_BinProduct_of_functors_alt _ _ (pr2 F) (pr2 G)).


C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
PD: BinProducts D
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : D,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PD x)
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont (BinProduct_of_functors C D PD F G)


C, D: category
PC: BinProducts C
PD: BinProducts D
omega_cocont_constprod_functor1: ∏ x : D,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     PD x)
F, G: C ⟶ D
HF: is_omega_cocont F
HG: is_omega_cocont G
is_omega_cocont (BinProduct_of_functors C D PD F G)

exact (transportf _
        (BinProduct_of_functors_alt_eq_BinProduct_of_functors C D PD F G)
        (is_omega_cocont_BinProduct_of_functors_alt _ _ HF HG)).
Defined.

Definition omega_cocont_BinProduct_of_functors (F G : omega_cocont_functor C D) :
  omega_cocont_functor C D :=
    tpair _ _ (is_omega_cocont_BinProduct_of_functors _ _ (pr2 F) (pr2 G)).

End BinProduct_of_functors.

(** ** Direct proof that the precomposition functor is cocontinuous *)
Section pre_composition_functor.

Context {A B C : category} (F : functor A B).
(* Context (CC : Colims C). *) (* This is too strong *)


A, B, C: category
F: A ⟶ B
g: graph
d: diagram g [B, C]
G: [B, C]
ccG: cocone d G
H: ∏ b : B, ColimCocone (diagram_pointwise d b)
preserves_colimit (pre_composition_functor A B C F) d
  G ccG


A, B, C: category
F: A ⟶ B
g: graph
d: diagram g [B, C]
G: [B, C]
ccG: cocone d G
H: ∏ b : B, ColimCocone (diagram_pointwise d b)
preserves_colimit (pre_composition_functor A B C F) d
  G ccG


A, B, C: category
F: A ⟶ B
g: graph
d: diagram g [B, C]
G: [B, C]
ccG: cocone d G
H: ∏ b : B, ColimCocone (diagram_pointwise d b)
HccG: isColimCocone d G ccG
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (pre_composition_functor A B C F) d)
  (pre_composition_functor A B C F G)
  (mapcocone (pre_composition_functor A B C F) d ccG)


A, B, C: category
F: A ⟶ B
g: graph
d: diagram g [B, C]
G: [B, C]
ccG: cocone d G
H: ∏ b : B, ColimCocone (diagram_pointwise d b)
HccG: isColimCocone d G ccG
a: A
isColimCocone
  (diagram_pointwise
     (mapdiagram (pre_composition_functor A B C F) d)
     a) (pr1 (pre_composition_functor A B C F G) a)
  (cocone_pointwise
     (mapdiagram (pre_composition_functor A B C F) d)
     (pre_composition_functor A B C F G)
     (mapcocone (pre_composition_functor A B C F) d
        ccG) a)

now apply (isColimFunctor_is_pointwise_Colim _ H _ _ HccG).
Defined.

(* Lemma is_cocont_pre_composition_functor *)
(*   (H : ∏ (g : graph) (d : diagram g [B,C,hsC]) (b : B), *)
(*        ColimCocone (diagram_pointwise hsC d b)) : *)
(*   is_cocont (pre_composition_functor _ _ _ hsB hsC F). *)
(* Proof. *)
(* now intros g d G ccG; apply preserves_colimit_pre_composition_functor. *)
(* Defined. *)


A, B, C: category
F: A ⟶ B
H: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
is_omega_cocont (pre_composition_functor A B C F)


A, B, C: category
F: A ⟶ B
H: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
is_omega_cocont (pre_composition_functor A B C F)

now intros c L ccL; apply preserves_colimit_pre_composition_functor.
Defined.

Definition omega_cocont_pre_composition_functor
  (H : Colims_of_shape nat_graph C) :
  omega_cocont_functor [B, C] [A, C] :=
  tpair _ _ (is_omega_cocont_pre_composition_functor H).

End pre_composition_functor.

(** ** Precomposition functor is cocontinuous using construction of right Kan extensions *)
Section pre_composition_functor_kan.

Context {A B C : category} (F : functor A B).
Context (LC : Lims C).


A, B, C: category
F: A ⟶ B
LC: Lims C
is_cocont (pre_composition_functor A B C F)


A, B, C: category
F: A ⟶ B
LC: Lims C
is_cocont (pre_composition_functor A B C F)

  
A, B, C: category
F: A ⟶ B
LC: Lims C
is_left_adjoint (pre_composition_functor A B C F)

  apply (RightKanExtension_from_limits _ _ _ _ LC).
Qed.


A, B, C: category
F: A ⟶ B
LC: Lims C
is_omega_cocont (pre_composition_functor A B C F)


A, B, C: category
F: A ⟶ B
LC: Lims C
is_omega_cocont (pre_composition_functor A B C F)

  now intros c L ccL; apply is_cocont_pre_composition_functor_kan.
Defined.

Definition omega_cocont_pre_composition_functor_kan :
  omega_cocont_functor [B, C] [A, C] :=
  tpair _ _ is_omega_cocont_pre_composition_functor_kan.

End pre_composition_functor_kan.

Section post_composition_functor.

Context {C D E : category}.
Context (F : functor D E) (HF : is_left_adjoint F).


C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
is_cocont (post_composition_functor C D E F)


C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
is_cocont (post_composition_functor C D E F)

  
C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
is_left_adjoint (post_composition_functor C D E F)

  apply (is_left_adjoint_post_composition_functor _ HF).
Defined.


C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
is_omega_cocont (post_composition_functor C D E F)


C, D, E: category
F: D ⟶ E
HF: is_left_adjoint F
is_omega_cocont (post_composition_functor C D E F)

  now intros c L ccL; apply is_cocont_post_composition_functor.
Defined.

End post_composition_functor.

(** * Swapping of functor category arguments *)
Section functor_swap.


C, D, E: category
is_cocont (functor_cat_swap C D E)


C, D, E: category
is_cocont (functor_cat_swap C D E)

  
C, D, E: category
is_left_adjoint (functor_cat_swap C D E)

  apply is_left_adjoint_functor_cat_swap.
Defined.


C, D, E: category
is_omega_cocont (functor_cat_swap C D E)


C, D, E: category
is_omega_cocont (functor_cat_swap C D E)

  
C, D, E: category
d: chain [C, [D, E]]
L: [C, [D, E]]
ccL: cocone d L
HccL: isColimCocone d L ccL
isColimCocone (mapdiagram (functor_cat_swap C D E) d)
  (functor_cat_swap C D E L)
  (mapcocone (functor_cat_swap C D E) d ccL)

  apply (is_cocont_functor_cat_swap _ _ _ _ d L ccL HccL).
Defined.

End functor_swap.

(** * The forgetful functor from Set/X to Set preserves colimits *)
Section cocont_slicecat_to_cat_HSET.

Local Notation "HSET / X" := (slice_cat HSET X) (only parsing).


X: SET
g: graph
d: diagram g (slice_cat SET X)
L: slice_cat SET X
ccL: cocone d L
preserves_colimit (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d L ccL


X: SET
g: graph
d: diagram g (slice_cat SET X)
L: slice_cat SET X
ccL: cocone d L
preserves_colimit (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d L ccL

  
X: SET
g: graph
d: diagram g (slice_cat SET X)
L: slice_cat SET X
ccL: cocone d L
is_left_adjoint (slicecat_to_cat SET X)

  
X: SET
g: graph
d: diagram g (slice_cat SET X)
L: slice_cat SET X
ccL: cocone d L
is_left_adjoint (slicecat_to_cat SET X)
 apply is_left_adjoint_slicecat_to_cat_HSET.
Defined.


X: SET
is_cocont (slicecat_to_cat SET X)


X: SET
is_cocont (slicecat_to_cat SET X)

  
X: SET
g: graph
d: diagram g (slice_cat SET X)
L: slice_cat SET X
cc: cocone d L
preserves_colimit (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d L cc

  now apply preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET.
Defined.


X: SET
is_omega_cocont (slicecat_to_cat SET X)


X: SET
is_omega_cocont (slicecat_to_cat SET X)

  
X: SET
d: chain (slice_cat SET X)
L: slice_cat SET X
cc: cocone d L
preserves_colimit (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d L cc

  now apply preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET.
Defined.

preserves_colimit (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d L ccL

is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d ccL) ccy x

  (mapcocone (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d ccL) ccy x

y: SET
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone d L ccL HccL: ColimCocone d
c:= ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
 preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
   X y),,
(pr1
 :
 (λ a : SET, SET ⟦ a, X ⟧)
   ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
    preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
      X y)): slice_cat SET X
n: vertex g
z: pr1 (dob d n)
pr1 X

g: graph
d: diagram g (slice_cat SET X)
L: slice_cat SET X
ccL: cocone d L
HccL: isColimCocone d L ccL
y: SET
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone d L ccL HccL: ColimCocone d
c:= ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
 preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
   X y),,
(pr1
 :
 (λ a : SET, SET ⟦ a, X ⟧)
   ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
    preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
      X y)): slice_cat SET X
n: vertex g
z: pr1 (dob d n)
(λ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y) ?pr1

        
X: SET
g: graph
d: diagram g (slice_cat SET X)
L: slice_cat SET X
ccL: cocone d L
HccL: isColimCocone d L ccL
y: SET
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone d L ccL HccL: ColimCocone d
c:= ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
 preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
   X y),,
(pr1
 :
 (λ a : SET, SET ⟦ a, X ⟧)
   ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
    preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
      X y)): slice_cat SET X
n: vertex g
z: pr1 (dob d n)
pr1 X
 exact (pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z)).
        
X: SET
g: graph
d: diagram g (slice_cat SET X)
L: slice_cat SET X
ccL: cocone d L
HccL: isColimCocone d L ccL
y: SET

CC:= make_ColimCocone d L ccL HccL: ColimCocone d
c:= ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
 preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
   X y),,
(pr1
 :
 (λ a : SET, SET ⟦ a, X ⟧)
   ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
    preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
      X y)): slice_cat SET X
n: vertex g
z: pr1 (dob d n)
(λ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y) (pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z))
 apply (coconeIn ccy n z).
      
X: SET
g: graph
d: diagram g (slice_cat SET X)
L: slice_cat SET X
ccL: cocone d L
HccL: isColimCocone d L ccL
y: SET
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone d L ccL HccL: ColimCocone d
c:= ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
 preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
   X y),,
(pr1
 :
 (λ a : SET, SET ⟦ a, X ⟧)
   ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
    preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
      X y)): slice_cat SET X
n: vertex g
pr2 (dob d n) =
(λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
 pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),, coconeIn ccy n z)
· pr1
 abstract (now apply funextsec; intro z;
                  apply (toforallpaths _ _ _ (pr2 (coconeIn ccL n)) z)).
    
X: SET
g: graph
d: diagram g (slice_cat SET X)
L: slice_cat SET X
ccL: cocone d L
HccL: isColimCocone d L ccL
y: SET
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone d L ccL HccL: ColimCocone d
c:= ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
 preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
   X y),,
(pr1
 :
 (λ a : SET, SET ⟦ a, X ⟧)
   ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
    preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
      X y)): slice_cat SET X
forms_cocone d
  (λ n : vertex g,
   ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
     pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),, coconeIn ccy n z)
    :
    SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧),,
   (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof0
      X g d L ccL y ccy n
    :
    (λ h : SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧,
     pr2 (dob d n) = h · pr2 c)
      ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
        pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
        coconeIn ccy n z)
       :
       SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧)))
 abstract (intros m n e; apply eq_mor_slicecat, funextsec; intro z;
                use total2_paths_f;
                [ apply (maponpaths _ (toforallpaths _ _ _
                                                     (maponpaths pr1 (coconeInCommutes ccL m n e)) z))|];
                cbn in *; induction (maponpaths pr1 _);
                simpl;
                now rewrite idpath_transportf, <- (coconeInCommutes ccy m n e)).
  
X: SET
g: graph
d: diagram g (slice_cat SET X)
L: slice_cat SET X
ccL: cocone d L
HccL: isColimCocone d L ccL
y: SET
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone d L ccL HccL: ColimCocone d
c:= ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
 preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
   X y),,
(pr1
 :
 (λ a : SET, SET ⟦ a, X ⟧)
   ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
    preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
      X y)): slice_cat SET X
cc:= make_cocone
  (λ n : vertex g,
   ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
     pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
     coconeIn ccy n z)
    :
    SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧),,
   (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof0
      X g d L ccL y ccy n
    :
    (λ h : SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧,
     pr2 (dob d n) = h · pr2 c)
      ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
        pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
        coconeIn ccy n z)
       :
       SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧)))
  (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof1
     X g d L ccL y ccy): cocone d c
∃! x : SET ⟦ slicecat_to_cat SET X L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d ccL) ccy x

  (λ n : vertex g,
   ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
     pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,

    :

     pr2 (dob d n) = h · pr2 c)
      ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
        pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
        coconeIn ccy n z)
       :

     X g d L ccL y ccy): cocone d c
SET ⟦ slicecat_to_cat SET X L, y ⟧
X: SET
g: graph
d: diagram g (slice_cat SET X)
L: slice_cat SET X
ccL: cocone d L
HccL: isColimCocone d L ccL
y: SET

CC:= make_ColimCocone d L ccL HccL: ColimCocone d
c:= ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
 preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
   X y),,
(pr1
 :
 (λ a : SET, SET ⟦ a, X ⟧)
   ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
    preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
      X y)): slice_cat SET X
cc:= make_cocone
  (λ n : vertex g,
   ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
     pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
     coconeIn ccy n z)
    :
    SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧),,
   (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof0
      X g d L ccL y ccy n
    :
    (λ h : SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧,
     pr2 (dob d n) = h · pr2 c)
      ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
        pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
        coconeIn ccy n z)
       :
       SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧)))
  (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof1
     X g d L ccL y ccy): cocone d c
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d ccL) ccy 
  ?x

g: graph

c:= ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
 preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
   X y),,
(pr1
 :
 (λ a : SET, SET ⟦ a, X ⟧)
   ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
    preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
      X y)): slice_cat SET X

  (λ n : vertex g,
   ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
     pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
     coconeIn ccy n z)
    :

   (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof0

        pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,

  (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof1
     X g d L ccL y ccy): cocone d c
∏ y0 : SET ⟦ slicecat_to_cat SET X L, y ⟧,
isaprop
  (is_cocone_mor
     (mapcocone (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d ccL) ccy y0)

→ y0 = ?x

c:= ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
 preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
   X y),,
(pr1
 :
 (λ a : SET, SET ⟦ a, X ⟧)
   ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
    preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
      X y)): slice_cat SET X
cc:= make_cocone
  (λ n : vertex g,
   ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
     pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
     coconeIn ccy n z)
    :
    SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧),,
   (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof0
      X g d L ccL y ccy n
    :
    (λ h : SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧,
     pr2 (dob d n) = h · pr2 c)
      ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
        pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
        coconeIn ccy n z)
       :
       SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧)))
  (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof1
     X g d L ccL y ccy): cocone d c
SET ⟦ slicecat_to_cat SET X L, y ⟧
 intros l; apply (pr2 (pr1 (colimArrow CC c cc) l)).

g: graph
d: diagram g (slice_cat SET X)

 preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
   X y),,
(pr1
 :
 (λ a : SET, SET ⟦ a, X ⟧)
   ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
    preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
      X y)): slice_cat SET X
cc:= make_cocone
  (λ n : vertex g,
   ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
     pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
     coconeIn ccy n z)
    :
    SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧),,
   (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof0
      X g d L ccL y ccy n
    :
    (λ h : SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧,
     pr2 (dob d n) = h · pr2 c)
      ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
        pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
        coconeIn ccy n z)
       :
       SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧)))
  (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof1
     X g d L ccL y ccy): cocone d c
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d ccL) ccy
  ((λ l : slicecat_to_cat SET X L,
    pr2 (pr1 (colimArrow CC c cc) l))
   :
   SET ⟦ slicecat_to_cat SET X L, y ⟧)
 
X: SET
g: graph
d: diagram g (slice_cat SET X)
L: slice_cat SET X
ccL: cocone d L
HccL: isColimCocone d L ccL
y: SET
