CC:= make_ColimCocone d L ccL HccL: ColimCocone d
c:= ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
 preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
   X y),,
(pr1
 :
 (λ a : SET, SET ⟦ a, X ⟧)
   ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
    preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
      X y)): slice_cat SET X
cc:= make_cocone
  (λ n : vertex g,
   ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
     pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
     coconeIn ccy n z)
    :
    SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧),,
   (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof0
      X g d L ccL y ccy n
    :
    (λ h : SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧,
     pr2 (dob d n) = h · pr2 c)
      ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
        pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
        coconeIn ccy n z)
       :
       SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧)))
  (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof1
     X g d L ccL y ccy): cocone d c
n: vertex g
coconeIn (mapcocone (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d ccL) n
· (λ l : pr1 L, pr2 (pr1 (colimArrow CC c cc) l)) =
coconeIn ccy n

    
X: SET
g: graph
d: diagram g (slice_cat SET X)
L: slice_cat SET X
ccL: cocone d L
HccL: isColimCocone d L ccL
y: SET
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone d L ccL HccL: ColimCocone d
c:= ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
 preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
   X y),,
(pr1
 :
 (λ a : SET, SET ⟦ a, X ⟧)
   ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
    preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
      X y)): slice_cat SET X
cc:= make_cocone
  (λ n : vertex g,
   ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
     pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
     coconeIn ccy n z)
    :
    SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧),,
   (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof0
      X g d L ccL y ccy n
    :
    (λ h : SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧,
     pr2 (dob d n) = h · pr2 c)
      ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
        pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
        coconeIn ccy n z)
       :
       SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧)))
  (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof1
     X g d L ccL y ccy): cocone d c
n: vertex g
x: dob (mapdiagram (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d) n
pr2
  (pr1 (colimArrow CC c cc) (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) x)) =
coconeIn ccy n x

    now etrans; [apply maponpaths,
        (toforallpaths _ _ _ (maponpaths pr1 (colimArrowCommutes CC c cc n)) x)|].

  (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof1

isaprop

     (mapcocone (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d ccL) ccy y0)

   ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,

      X y)): slice_cat SET X

  (λ n : vertex g,
   ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
     pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
     coconeIn ccy n z)
    :
    SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧),,
   (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof0
      X g d L ccL y ccy n
    :
    (λ h : SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧,
     pr2 (dob d n) = h · pr2 c)
      ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
        pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
        coconeIn ccy n z)
       :
       SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧)))
  (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof1
     X g d L ccL y ccy): cocone d c
y0: SET ⟦ slicecat_to_cat SET X L, y ⟧
∏ t : vertex g,
isaprop
  (coconeIn (mapcocone (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d ccL)
     t · y0 = coconeIn ccy t)

    intro ; apply homset_property.
  
X: SET
g: graph
d: diagram g (slice_cat SET X)
L: slice_cat SET X
ccL: cocone d L
HccL: isColimCocone d L ccL
y: SET
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone d L ccL HccL: ColimCocone d
c:= ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
 preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
   X y),,
(pr1
 :
 (λ a : SET, SET ⟦ a, X ⟧)
   ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
    preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
      X y)): slice_cat SET X
cc:= make_cocone
  (λ n : vertex g,
   ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
     pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
     coconeIn ccy n z)
    :
    SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧),,
   (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof0
      X g d L ccL y ccy n
    :
    (λ h : SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧,
     pr2 (dob d n) = h · pr2 c)
      ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
        pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
        coconeIn ccy n z)
       :
       SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧)))
  (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof1
     X g d L ccL y ccy): cocone d c
∏ y0 : SET ⟦ slicecat_to_cat SET X L, y ⟧,
is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d ccL) ccy y0
→ y0 =
  ((λ l : slicecat_to_cat SET X L,
    pr2 (pr1 (colimArrow CC c cc) l))
   :
   SET ⟦ slicecat_to_cat SET X L, y ⟧)

  (λ n : vertex g,

(λ h : SET ⟦ pr1 (colim CC), pr1 c ⟧,

  ((λ l' : pr1 (colim CC), pr2 L l',, f l')
   :
   SET ⟦ pr1 (colim CC), pr1 c ⟧)
 abstract (now apply funextsec).

        coconeIn ccy n z)
       :
       SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧)))
  (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof1
     X g d L ccL y ccy): cocone d c
f: pr1 L → y
Hf: is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d ccL) ccy f
l: pr1 L
k:= ((λ l' : pr1 (colim CC), pr2 L l',, f l')
 :
 SET ⟦ pr1 (colim CC), pr1 c ⟧),,
preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof2
  X g d L ccL HccL y f: slice_cat SET X ⟦ colim CC, c ⟧
f l = pr2 (pr1 (colimArrow CC c cc) l)

    
X: SET
g: graph
d: diagram g (slice_cat SET X)
L: slice_cat SET X
ccL: cocone d L
HccL: isColimCocone d L ccL
y: SET
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone d L ccL HccL: ColimCocone d
c:= ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
 preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
   X y),,
(pr1
 :
 (λ a : SET, SET ⟦ a, X ⟧)
   ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
    preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
      X y)): slice_cat SET X
cc:= make_cocone
  (λ n : vertex g,
   ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
     pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
     coconeIn ccy n z)
    :
    SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧),,
   (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof0
      X g d L ccL y ccy n
    :
    (λ h : SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧,
     pr2 (dob d n) = h · pr2 c)
      ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
        pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
        coconeIn ccy n z)
       :
       SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧)))
  (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof1
     X g d L ccL y ccy): cocone d c
f: pr1 L → y
Hf: is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d ccL) ccy f
l: pr1 L
k:= ((λ l' : pr1 (colim CC), pr2 L l',, f l')
 :
 SET ⟦ pr1 (colim CC), pr1 c ⟧),,
preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof2
  X g d L ccL HccL y f: slice_cat SET X ⟦ colim CC, c ⟧
∏ n : vertex g, colimIn CC n · k = coconeIn cc n

   X y),,

 :
 (λ a : SET, SET ⟦ a, X ⟧)

      X y)): slice_cat SET X

  (λ n : vertex g,

Hf: is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d ccL) ccy f
l: pr1 L
k:= ((λ l' : pr1 (colim CC), pr2 L l',, f l')
 :
 SET ⟦ pr1 (colim CC), pr1 c ⟧),,
preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof2
  X g d L ccL HccL y f: slice_cat SET X ⟦ colim CC, c ⟧
Hk: ∏ n : vertex g, colimIn CC n · k = coconeIn cc n
f l = pr2 (pr1 (colimArrow CC c cc) l)

g: graph

 preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
   X y),,
(pr1
 :
 (λ a : SET, SET ⟦ a, X ⟧)
   ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
    preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
      X y)): slice_cat SET X

  (λ n : vertex g,
   ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
     pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
     coconeIn ccy n z)
    :
    SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧),,
   (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof0
      X g d L ccL y ccy n
    :
    (λ h : SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧,
     pr2 (dob d n) = h · pr2 c)

        pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,

preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof2

g: graph

 preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
   X y),,
(pr1
 :
 (λ a : SET, SET ⟦ a, X ⟧)
   ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
    preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
      X y)): slice_cat SET X
cc:= make_cocone
  (λ n : vertex g,
   ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
     pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
     coconeIn ccy n z)
    :
    SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧),,
   (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof0
      X g d L ccL y ccy n
    :
    (λ h : SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧,
     pr2 (dob d n) = h · pr2 c)
      ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
        pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
        coconeIn ccy n z)
       :
       SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧)))

     X g d L ccL y ccy): cocone d c

k:= ((λ l' : pr1 (colim CC), pr2 L l',, f l')
 :
 SET ⟦ pr1 (colim CC), pr1 c ⟧),,
preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof2
  X g d L ccL HccL y f: slice_cat SET X ⟦ colim CC, c ⟧

z: pr1 (dob d n)
pr1 (colimIn CC n · k) z = pr1 (coconeIn cc n) z

      
X: SET
g: graph
d: diagram g (slice_cat SET X)
L: slice_cat SET X
ccL: cocone d L
HccL: isColimCocone d L ccL
y: SET
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone d L ccL HccL: ColimCocone d
c:= ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
 preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
   X y),,
(pr1
 :
 (λ a : SET, SET ⟦ a, X ⟧)
   ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
    preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
      X y)): slice_cat SET X
cc:= make_cocone
  (λ n : vertex g,
   ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
     pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
     coconeIn ccy n z)
    :
    SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧),,
   (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof0
      X g d L ccL y ccy n
    :
    (λ h : SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧,
     pr2 (dob d n) = h · pr2 c)
      ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
        pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
        coconeIn ccy n z)
       :
       SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧)))
  (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof1
     X g d L ccL y ccy): cocone d c
f: pr1 L → y
Hf: is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d ccL) ccy f
l: pr1 L
k:= ((λ l' : pr1 (colim CC), pr2 L l',, f l')
 :
 SET ⟦ pr1 (colim CC), pr1 c ⟧),,
preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof2
  X g d L ccL HccL y f: slice_cat SET X ⟦ colim CC, c ⟧
n: vertex g
z: pr1 (dob d n)
transportf (λ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y)
  (idpath (pr1 (pr1 (coconeIn cc n) z)))
  (pr2 (pr1 (colimIn CC n · k) z)) =
pr2 (pr1 (coconeIn cc n) z)

      now rewrite idpath_transportf; cbn; rewrite <- (toforallpaths _ _ _ (Hf n) z).
    
X: SET
g: graph
d: diagram g (slice_cat SET X)
L: slice_cat SET X
ccL: cocone d L
HccL: isColimCocone d L ccL
y: SET
ccy: cocone (mapdiagram (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d) y
CC:= make_ColimCocone d L ccL HccL: ColimCocone d
c:= ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
 preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
   X y),,
(pr1
 :
 (λ a : SET, SET ⟦ a, X ⟧)
   ((∑ _ : pr1 X, pr1 y),,
    preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof
      X y)): slice_cat SET X
cc:= make_cocone
  (λ n : vertex g,
   ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
     pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
     coconeIn ccy n z)
    :
    SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧),,
   (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof0
      X g d L ccL y ccy n
    :
    (λ h : SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧,
     pr2 (dob d n) = h · pr2 c)
      ((λ z : pr1 (dob d n),
        pr2 L (pr1 (coconeIn ccL n) z),,
        coconeIn ccy n z)
       :
       SET ⟦ pr1 (dob d n), pr1 c ⟧)))
  (preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof1
     X g d L ccL y ccy): cocone d c
f: pr1 L → y
Hf: is_cocone_mor
  (mapcocone (slicecat_to_cat SET X) d ccL) ccy f
l: pr1 L
k:= ((λ l' : pr1 (colim CC), pr2 L l',, f l')
 :
 SET ⟦ pr1 (colim CC), pr1 c ⟧),,
preserves_colimit_slicecat_to_cat_HSET_direct_subproof2
  X g d L ccL HccL y f: slice_cat SET X ⟦ colim CC, c ⟧
Hk: ∏ n : vertex g, colimIn CC n · k = coconeIn cc n
f l = pr2 (pr1 (colimArrow CC c cc) l)

    apply (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
                      (toforallpaths _ _ _ (maponpaths pr1 (colimArrowUnique CC c cc k Hk)) l)).
Defined.

End cocont_slicecat_to_cat_HSET.
End cocont_functors.

(** Specialized notations for HSET *)
Declare Scope cocont_functor_hset_scope.
Delimit Scope cocont_functor_hset_scope with CS.

Notation "' x" := (omega_cocont_constant_functor x)
                    (at level 10) : cocont_functor_hset_scope.

Notation "'Id'" := (omega_cocont_functor_identity _) :
                     cocont_functor_hset_scope.

Notation "F * G" :=
  (omega_cocont_BinProduct_of_functors_alt BinProductsHSET _
     (is_omega_cocont_constprod_functor1 _ Exponentials_HSET)
     F G) : cocont_functor_hset_scope.

Notation "F + G" :=
  (omega_cocont_BinCoproduct_of_functors_alt2
     BinCoproductsHSET BinProductsHSET F G) : cocont_functor_hset_scope.

Notation "1" := (unitHSET) : cocont_functor_hset_scope.
Notation "0" := (emptyHSET) : cocont_functor_hset_scope.


Section NotationTest.
Variable A : HSET.

Local Open Scope cocont_functor_hset_scope.

(** F(X) = 1 + (A * X) *)
Definition L_A : omega_cocont_functor HSET HSET := '1 + 'A * Id.

End NotationTest.
